### #/texts/54
- type: `text`
- order index: `44`
- page: `6`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(104.12358093261719, 518.7137451171875) -> (521.2215576171875, 484.28521728515625)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/54`
- text/content preview: `The components of other manufacturers which are used within the plant (e.g. e-motors), have a risk assessment from the respective manufacturer. The obligation to ensure that their design complies with the applicable national and European regulations is certificated by these manufacturers.`

- raw_ref: `#/texts/89`
- text/content preview: `The technical manual must be treated confidential. It is distributed exclusively for those persons working on and with the plant. All content-related information, text, drawings, pictures, and other representations are protected as defined by copyright protection law and are subject to other industrial property righ...`

### #/texts/90
- type: `text`
- order index: `84`
- page: `7`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(104.56897735595703, 198.6017303466797) -> (521.2216186523438, 164.47776794433594)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/90`
- text/content preview: `It is not permitted to pass on the technical manual to third parties, to copy it in any way or form even extracts - or to recycle and/or communicate the contents without written permission of FMD (the manufacturer).`

### #/texts/91
- type: `text`
- order index: `85`
- page: `7`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``

- raw_ref: `#/texts/91`
- text/content preview: `Violations incur the obligation to pay compensation, all other rights reserved. FMD reserves the right to exercise industrial property rights.`

- raw_ref: `#/texts/102`
- text/content preview: `This technical manual has been compiled while taking into consideration the applicable regulations, current technology and the experiences and developments of many years. FMD assumes no liability for any damages or malfunctions that occur from non-compliance to the contents of the technical manual. The English versi...`

### #/texts/103
- type: `text`
- order index: `94`
- page: `8`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(104.24787902832031, 485.1607666015625) -> (521.2216186523438, 450.8061218261719)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/103`
- text/content preview: `All obligations of the manufacturer are defined in the purchase contract, which also includes the entire and sole valid warranty agreement. The contents of the technical manual will not amplify or restrict any contractual warranty.`

### #/texts/104
- type: `text`
- order index: `95`
- page: `8`
- section title: ``

- raw_ref: `#/texts/104`
- text/content preview: `The texts and illustrations do not necessarily correspond exactly to the scope of delivery. The drawings and diagrams are not scaled 1:1. FMD reserves the right to make technical changes to the product within the context of improving the functionality and further development.`

Before carrying out any work which involves complete or partial opening of the plant, the person responsible must ensure that power to the plant is locked out (following the ships' isolation procedu...`

### #/texts/117
- type: `section_header`
- order index: `106`
- page: `9`
- section title: `2.2 Operator Safety`
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(77.508544921875, 418.46563720703125) -> (178.75216674804688, 408.6416931152344)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/117`
- text/content preview: `2.2 Operator Safety`

### #/texts/118
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `107`
- page: `9`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(104.41251373291016, 390.0895690917969) -> (496.77392578125, 381.0827941894531)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/118`
- text/content preview: `Do not operate the equipment without the proper instructions as given within this manual.`

### #/texts/119
- type: `section_header`
- order index: `108`
- page: `9`
- section title: `· WHEN IN DOUBT ASK`
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(104.41251373291016, 371.42425537109375) -> (208.50933837890625, 364.6069030761719)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/119`
- text/content preview: `· WHEN IN DOUBT ASK`

### #/texts/120
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `109`
- page: `9`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(104.41251373291016, 353.6097717285156) -> (493.148681640625, 344.6029968261719)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/120`
- text/content preview: `Remember that the equipment operates automatically and can start and stop at any time.`

### #/texts/121
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `110`
- page: `9`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(104.41251373291016, 335.4010009765625) -> (457.62030029296875, 326.36309814453125)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/121`
- text/content preview: `Isolate any equipment before working on it, or before asking others to work on it.`

### #/texts/122
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `111`
- page: `9`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(104.41251373291016, 317.16107177734375) -> (521.2400512695312, 295.5231018066406)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/122`
- text/content preview: `When opening a component of the system such as a pump, pipe or housing WEAR PPE including, but not limited to, protective clothing, gloves and a face shield.`

### #/texts/123
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `112`
- page: `9`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(104.41251373291016, 286.2039489746094) -> (521.2625732421875, 264.5658874511719)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/123`
- text/content preview: `DO NOT ASK a tradesman to repair the equipment if they may come in contact with the process stream by doing so.`

### #/texts/124
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `113`
- page: `9`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(104.41251373291016, 255.3639373779297) -> (521.2387084960938, 233.72586059570312)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/124`
- text/content preview: `MAKE IT SAFE FIRST flush out bio-residues from the pumps and pipelines and isolate the equipment. Many pipes contain wastewater even when shut down for some time.`

### #/texts/125
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `114`
- page: `9`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(104.41251373291016, 224.3693084716797) -> (521.1728515625, 202.76242065429688)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/125`
- text/content preview: `Always electrically isolate the equipment and lock out the local isolator BEFORE you dismantle any electrical equipment. Remember that equipment can be turned on by accident.`

### #/texts/126
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `115`
- page: `9`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(104.41251373291016, 193.56040954589844) -> (470.25732421875, 184.52249145507812)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/126`
- text/content preview: `Do not undertake any works unless the consequences are carefully thought through.`

### #/texts/127
- type: `section_header`
- order index: `116`
- page: `9`
- section title: `2.3 Maintenance Safety`
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(77.508544921875, 169.3437957763672) -> (197.21652221679688, 159.51986694335938)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/127`
- text/content preview: `2.3 Maintenance Safety`

### #/texts/128
- type: `text`
- order index: `117`
- page: `9`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(104.7864990234375, 143.4006805419922) -> (521.2216186523438, 123.4095458984375)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/128`
- text/content preview: `It is in your best interest to clean the FWC plant prior to working on it to minimize the danger of infection.`

### #/pictures/17
- type: `picture`
- order index: `118`
- page: `9`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``

- raw_ref: `#/texts/129`
- text/content preview: `WARNING: Biohazard.`

- section title: ``

- raw_ref: `#/texts/130`
- text/content preview: `FMD`

### #/texts/131
- type: `text`
- order index: `122`
- page: `9`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(426.6666666666667, 703.0) -> (524.3333333333333, 694.6666666666666)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/131`
- text/content preview: `FundamentalMarineDevelopments`

### #/texts/136
- type: `section_header`
- order index: `123`
- page: `10`
- section title: `Environmentally Responsible Solutions Engineered`
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(72.0, 757.0) -> (219.0, 705.0)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/136`
- text/content preview: `Environmentally Responsible Solutions Engineered`

### #/texts/137
- type: `section_header`
- order index: `124`
- page: `10`
- section title: `2.4 Proper Use`
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(77.508544921875, 661.93017578125) -> (157.13534545898438, 652.6025390625)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/137`
- text/content preview: `2.4 Proper Use`

### #/texts/138
- type: `text`
- order index: `125`
- page: `10`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(104.12358093261719, 636.3594970703125) -> (440.3251037597656, 627.3215942382812)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/138`
- text/content preview: `The FWC12 may only be operated within the performance parameters specified.`

### #/texts/139
- type: `text`
- order index: `126`
- page: `10`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(104.12358093261719, 611.0103759765625) -> (521.2216796875, 589.40283203125)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/139`
- text/content preview: `The FWC12 may only be used in conjunction with auxiliary equipment that is recommended and approved by FMD.`

### #/texts/140
- type: `text`
- order index: `127`
- page: `10`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(104.54826354980469, 573.36083984375) -> (521.221435546875, 551.605712890625)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/140`
- text/content preview: `For safety and functionality reasons the FWC12 may not be altered or modified. If any modification of the system is required, FMD is to be consulted for prior written approval.`

### #/texts/141
- type: `text`
- order index: `128`
- page: `10`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(104.12358093261719, 535.442138671875) -> (487.24700927734375, 526.4042358398438)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/141`
- text/content preview: `The FWC12 is designed and manufactured with the latest technology and is safe to operate.`

### #/texts/142
- type: `text`
- order index: `129`
- page: `10`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(104.23751831054688, 510.1916809082031) -> (521.2216186523438, 488.4854736328125)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/142`
- text/content preview: `Any change in the plant which indicates a malfunction (increased noise level, higher temperatures than normal etc.) must be immediately investigated and where possible the fault rectified.`

### #/texts/143
- type: `text`
- order index: `130`
- page: `10`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(104.12358093261719, 472.5115966796875) -> (521.2216186523438, 438.08251953125)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/143`
- text/content preview: `The operator/operating company are required to immediately report to FMD all changes that may or will detrimentally affect the condition and safety of the system. This also applies to warranty and warranty claims.`

### #/texts/144
- type: `section_header`
- order index: `131`
- page: `10`
- section title: `2.5 Qualified Personnel`
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(77.508544921875, 422.9024353027344) -> (195.5277099609375, 414.1612548828125)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/144`
- text/content preview: `2.5 Qualified Personnel`

### #/texts/145
- type: `text`
- order index: `132`
- page: `10`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(104.24787902832031, 396.8092041015625) -> (521.2216186523438, 337.2817077636719)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/145`
- text/content preview: `All personnel that are instructed to work with or on the system must observe the rules and regulations for operational safety and accident prevention and must have read the system documentation, including all warning notices, prior to starting work. The plant must be operated, serviced, and maintained by suitably tr...`

### #/texts/146
- type: `text`
- order index: `133`
- page: `10`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(104.23751831054688, 321.00225830078125) -> (521.2216796875, 261.5671081542969)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/146`
- text/content preview: `Qualified personnel are by reason of their training, experience, instruction and their knowledge of the relevant standards, regulations, accident prevention rules and working conditions, authorized by the person responsible for the safety of the plant to perform the appropriate activities required, and thereby able...`

### #/texts/147
- type: `text`
- order index: `134`
- page: `10`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(104.23751831054688, 245.2812957763672) -> (521.2216186523438, 223.64334106445312)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/147`
- text/content preview: `Persons under the influence of drugs, alcohol or reaction-impairing medication must not be allowed to operate or work on the plant.`

### #/texts/148
- type: `text`
- order index: `135`
- page: `10`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(104.12358093261719, 207.4841766357422) -> (521.2216186523438, 174.8865966796875)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/148`
- text/content preview: `The personnel responsible for the installation, operation and maintenance of the equipment must be appropriately qualified. The operator must ensure that they have completely understood the instructions contained within this manual.`

### #/texts/149
- type: `text`
- order index: `136`
- page: `10`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(104.23751831054688, 169.6807098388672) -> (521.2217407226562, 147.92550659179688)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/149`
- text/content preview: `All warranties and guarantees with respect to the machine function and durability shall be void should the operator fail to adhere to these safety instructions or any other instructions within this manual.`

### #/texts/150
- type: `section_header`
- order index: `137`
- page: `10`
- section title: `2.6 Protective Equipment`
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(77.508544921875, 132.365234375) -> (205.09765625, 123.03756713867188)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/150`
- text/content preview: `2.6 Protective Equipment`

### #/texts/151
- type: `text`
- order index: `138`
- page: `10`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(104.36181640625, 106.68339538574219) -> (521.2216186523438, 74.20611572265625)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/151`
- text/content preview: `Protective clothing such as safety helmet, safety glasses, safety gloves and safety shoes must be worn when applicable to working on the plant. Rubber gloves suitable for contact with wastewater must be worn.`

### #/pictures/19
- type: `picture`
- order index: `139`
- page: `10`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(366.5334167480469, 757.847957611084) -> (538.6368408203125, 694.6110610961914)`
- raw_ref: `#/pictures/19`
- text/content preview: ``

- type: `text`
- order index: `140`
- page: `10`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(419.3333333333333, 763.6666666666666) -> (527.3333333333333, 720.6666666666666)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/152`
- text/content preview: `FMD`

### #/texts/153
- type: `text`
- order index: `141`
- page: `10`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(426.6666666666667, 703.0) -> (524.3333333333333, 694.6666666666666)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/153`
- text/content preview: `FundamentalMarineDevelopments`

### #/texts/157
- type: `section_header`
- order index: `142`
- page: `11`
- section title: `2.7 Risk of Ignored Safety Instructions`
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(77.508544921875, 662.4264526367188) -> (260.8284606933594, 652.6025390625)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/157`
- text/content preview: `2.7 Risk of Ignored Safety Instructions`

### #/texts/158
- type: `text`
- order index: `143`
- page: `11`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(104.12358093261719, 636.3594970703125) -> (505.9950256347656, 627.3215942382812)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/158`
- text/content preview: `There is a danger to life and limb for personnel if the plant is operated incorrectly or improperly.`

### #/texts/159
- type: `text`
- order index: `144`
- page: `11`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(104.56897735595703, 611.0103759765625) -> (521.2216796875, 576.8021240234375)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/159`
- text/content preview: `Rotating parts and the energy released with a sudden stop can cause serious damage to personnel and equipment, which can also result in extended downtime and high repair costs with damaged parts.`

### #/texts/160
- type: `text`
- order index: `145`
- page: `11`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(104.12358093261719, 560.6436157226562) -> (521.2216796875, 540.7689208984375)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/160`
- text/content preview: `The associated risks due to failure to adhere to these safety instructions include but are not limited to:`

### #/texts/161
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `146`
- page: `11`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(103.97747802734375, 529.5112915039062) -> (486.830078125, 520.162109375)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/161`
- text/content preview: ` Endangering people due to electrical, mechanical, and/or chemical/biochemical hazards.`

### #/texts/162
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `147`
- page: `11`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(103.97747802734375, 513.312744140625) -> (521.21875, 491.59906005859375)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/162`
- text/content preview: ` Endangering the environment due to leakage of hazardous material (where chemicals are involved).`

### #/texts/163
- type: `text`
- order index: `148`
- page: `11`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(104.99365997314453, 475.44293212890625) -> (466.1165771484375, 466.405029296875)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/163`
- text/content preview: `Failure of important equipment and process functions leading to inferior performance.`

### #/texts/164
- type: `section_header`
- order index: `149`
- page: `11`
- section title: `2.8 Spare Parts`
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(77.508544921875, 450.72735595703125) -> (157.9234619140625, 441.3996887207031)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/164`
- text/content preview: `2.8 Spare Parts`

### #/texts/165
- type: `text`
- order index: `150`
- page: `11`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(104.60005187988281, 425.1628723144531) -> (476.68182373046875, 416.1249694824219)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/165`
- text/content preview: `Only original spare parts and equipment authorised by FMD are suitable and safe for use.`

### #/pictures/20
- type: `picture`
- order index: `151`
- page: `11`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(75.9954833984375, 393.04754638671875) -> (117.07067108154297, 351.3858642578125)`
- raw_ref: `#/pictures/20`
- text/content preview: ``

### #/texts/166
- type: `text`
- order index: `152`
- page: `11`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(133.23243713378906, 380.5352783203125) -> (484.737060546875, 360.8567199707031)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/166`
- text/content preview: `Note: Incorrect or faulty spare parts can lead to damage, malfunction or complete breakdown of the equipment!`

### #/texts/167
- type: `text`
- order index: `153`
- page: `11`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(104.89007568359375, 324.00103759765625) -> (521.2216796875, 289.8832702636719)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/167`
- text/content preview: `Installation of any parts or any modifications not authorised by FMD will nullify liability for any resulting damage or injury and change in performance, all guarantee, service, compensation, and liability claim against the manufacturer, its agents or representatives are forfeit.`

### #/pictures/21
- type: `picture`
- order index: `154`
- page: `11`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(366.6514587402344, 757.844310760498) -> (538.5026245117188, 694.6525497436523)`
- raw_ref: `#/pictures/21`
- text/content preview: ``

### #/texts/181
- type: `text`
- order index: `165`
- page: `12`
- section title: ``

### #/texts/190
- type: `section_header`
- order index: `173`
- page: `13`
- section title: `3.3 What it Does`
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(77.41847229003906, 662.392578125) -> (165.4668426513672, 654.5198974609375)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/190`
- text/content preview: `3.3 What it Does`

### #/texts/191
- type: `text`
- order index: `174`
- page: `13`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(104.12358093261719, 636.3594970703125) -> (521.2216796875, 589.40283203125)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/191`
- text/content preview: `The FWC system is designed to collect food waste from attached macerator stations using vacuum generated by the integrated pump and transfer the macerated slurry to the food waste dewatering press for separation of the solids from the liquid or to the holding tank for later processing or discharge overboard.`

### #/texts/192
- type: `section_header`
- order index: `175`
- page: `13`
- section title: `3.4 How it Works`
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(77.41847229003906, 574.1934814453125) -> (167.71859741210938, 566.32080078125)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/192`
- text/content preview: `3.4 How it Works`

### #/texts/193
- type: `text`
- order index: `176`
- page: `13`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(104.23751831054688, 548.159423828125) -> (521.2215576171875, 488.72357177734375)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/193`
- text/content preview: `When a macerator station lid is closed and the start button is pressed, the control system of the FWC12 opens the appropriate valves based on the selected mode and then starts the vacuum pump. When vacuum builds up in the piping system to the required level the macerator will start and the transport water solenoid w...`

### #/texts/194
- type: `text`
- order index: `177`
- page: `13`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(104.36181640625, 472.4441223144531) -> (521.2216796875, 438.202880859375)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/194`
- text/content preview: `Normal operation will see the food waste sent to the dewatering press immediately with the food waste tank remaining empty during normal operation, this prevents the anaerobic breakdown of any organic material sitting in the tank and the production of associated smells.`

### #/texts/195
- type: `text`
- order index: `178`
- page: `13`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(104.12358093261719, 422.04052734375) -> (521.2217407226562, 375.0851745605469)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/195`
- text/content preview: `The food waste press separates the solids and the liquids at 150 microns, the liquid is transferred via pump to the ships grease trap. The solids fall by gravity into an endless bag that seals in all smells whilst the unit is in operation. The bag is monitored by a sensor that measures how full the bag is stopping t...`

### #/texts/196
- type: `text`
- order index: `179`
- page: `13`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(104.89007568359375, 358.8885803222656) -> (521.2216186523438, 337.2817077636719)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/196`
- text/content preview: `Food waste can be discharged in accordance with the most recent revision Marpol Annex V regulations.`

- type: `section_header`
- order index: `232`
- page: `16`
- section title: `5.1 General`
- section path: ``

- raw_ref: `#/texts/253`
- text/content preview: `5.1 General`

### #/texts/254
- type: `text`
- order index: `233`
- page: `16`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(104.24787902832031, 606.7196044921875) -> (345.1345520019531, 597.6817016601562)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/254`
- text/content preview: `All safety regulations and instructions are to be observed.`

### #/texts/255
- type: `text`
- order index: `234`
- page: `16`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(104.12358093261719, 593.9712524414062) -> (430.58856201171875, 584.9644775390625)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/255`
- text/content preview: `The requirements and instructions in the Technical Manual must be observed.`

### #/texts/256
- type: `text`
- order index: `235`
- page: `16`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(104.99365997314453, 581.3704833984375) -> (305.6704406738281, 572.3637084960938)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/256`
- text/content preview: `Prior to commissioning FMD must be consulted.`

### #/texts/257
- type: `text`
- order index: `236`
- page: `16`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(104.99365997314453, 568.9224853515625) -> (471.192138671875, 559.8845825195312)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/257`
- text/content preview: `It is recommended that commissioning be completed by a service technician from FMD.`

### #/texts/258
- type: `section_header`
- order index: `237`
- page: `16`
- section title: `5.2 Objective`
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(77.3734359741211, 544.6689453125) -> (149.59197998046875, 534.87890625)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/258`
- text/content preview: `5.2 Objective`

### #/texts/259
- type: `text`
- order index: `238`
- page: `16`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(104.12358093261719, 518.64111328125) -> (521.2214965820312, 496.88592529296875)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/259`
- text/content preview: `The overall objective of commissioning is to ensure that the components of the system are complete, that installation is fit for purpose and the system is safe and ready to be set to work.`

### #/texts/260
- type: `text`
- order index: `239`
- page: `16`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(104.57933807373047, 480.69061279296875) -> (293.5515441894531, 471.683837890625)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/260`
- text/content preview: `Commissioning requirements should include:`

### #/texts/261
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `240`
- page: `16`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(103.97747802734375, 461.88018798828125) -> (348.55010986328125, 452.84228515625)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/261`
- text/content preview: ` Installation check of all main and auxiliary components.`

### #/texts/262
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `241`
- page: `16`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(103.97747802734375, 445.77197265625) -> (424.8890380859375, 436.76519775390625)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/262`
- text/content preview: ` Check all interconnecting pipework is complete and correct with no leaks.`

### #/texts/263
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `242`
- page: `16`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(103.97747802734375, 429.9603576660156) -> (445.70855712890625, 420.9224548339844)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/263`
- text/content preview: ` Testing of all individual components and instrumentation for correct operation`

### #/texts/264
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `243`
- page: `16`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(103.97747802734375, 413.8832702636719) -> (521.2189331054688, 404.8453674316406)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/264`
- text/content preview: ` Testing of the control system to ensure correct function as per design and contract requirements.`

### #/texts/265
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `244`
- page: `16`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(103.97747802734375, 397.8922119140625) -> (521.2188720703125, 376.28533935546875)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/265`
- text/content preview: ` Establish plants operation in automatic and manual modes as required by contract documents and specifications.`

### #/texts/266
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `245`
- page: `16`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(103.97747802734375, 369.2398376464844) -> (387.18560791015625, 360.2019348144531)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/266`
- text/content preview: ` Confirm that all relevant acceptance test criteria have been met.`

### #/texts/267
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `246`
- page: `16`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(103.97747802734375, 353.4034118652344) -> (290.3379211425781, 346.1295166015625)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/267`
- text/content preview: ` Confirm that all alarms work as intended.`

### #/texts/268
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `247`
- page: `16`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(103.97747802734375, 337.32000732421875) -> (419.19207763671875, 328.2821044921875)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/268`
- text/content preview: ` Running of the system in auto for process establishment and evaluation.`

### #/texts/300
- type: `text`
- order index: `276`
- page: `17`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(104.24787902832031, 424.89105224609375) -> (521.2214965820312, 403.16387939453125)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/300`
- text/content preview: `All equipment is on site installed as per relevant instructions, GA, schematics & drawings with electrical connections and tests completed.`

### #/texts/301
- type: `text`
- order index: `277`
- page: `17`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(104.23751831054688, 386.9984130859375) -> (521.2216186523438, 365.3667297363281)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/301`
- text/content preview: `Pre-commissioning starts after completion of the installation of the Plant and includes all activities that are needed to verify the correct installation of each individual component.`

### #/texts/302
- type: `text`
- order index: `278`
- page: `17`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(104.04071807861328, 349.0809326171875) -> (521.2215576171875, 327.44293212890625)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/302`
- text/content preview: `At the start of this phase the power should be connected to the main isolator and locked out by the commissioning engineer in charge.`

### #/texts/303
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `279`
- page: `17`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(103.97747802734375, 307.8896789550781) -> (346.27130126953125, 298.8829040527344)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/303`
- text/content preview: ` Check all supplies are connected correctly and isolated`

- page: `17`

- section path: ``

### #/texts/349
- type: `text`
- order index: `320`
- page: `19`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(111.80159759521484, 339.0046691894531) -> (521.2196044921875, 304.76336669921875)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/349`
- text/content preview: `Normal use mode with all control and safety systems active. From the home page select the Auto button on the screen, the Automatic Operation Page will appear on screen. Pressing the Home button will return to the home page where the red Stop All button is available to stop the plant running.`

- type: `text`

- bbox: `(111.5115737915039, 634.439208984375) -> (521.2359619140625, 600.2048950195312)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/383`
- text/content preview: `All main components fitted to the system can be operated manually from the HMI. All components usable in manual appear on the screen with a yellow box highlighting them, this forms the Start / Stop button for the specific component.`

- text/content preview: `CAUTION: When operating in manual it may be possible to start pumps with valves closed, particular care must be taken not to damage the plant with this type of operation.`

- type: `section_header`
- order index: `539`
- page: `23`
- section title: `6.2 Operating Modes Food Waste Collection System`
- section path: ``

- raw_ref: `#/texts/574`

### #/texts/575
- type: `text`
- order index: `540`
- page: `23`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(104.12358093261719, 351.96258544921875) -> (521.2216186523438, 330.2042541503906)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/575`
- text/content preview: `The day-to-day operator involvement required during normal operation is minimal and consists of basic daily observations, minor maintenance that has come due and response to any alarms.`

### #/texts/576
- type: `text`
- order index: `541`
- page: `23`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(104.24787902832031, 314.0387878417969) -> (521.2216796875, 294.0476379394531)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/576`
- text/content preview: `Any changes or adjustments should be made by appropriately qualified persons and should ideally be recorded.`

### #/texts/577
- type: `section_header`
- order index: `542`
- page: `23`
- section title: `Auto to Tank 6.2.1`
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(75.33333333333333, 275.66666666666663) -> (172.22933959960938, 263.66666666666663)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/577`
- text/content preview: `Auto to Tank 6.2.1`

### #/texts/578
- type: `text`
- order index: `543`
- page: `23`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(111.8637466430664, 247.8879852294922) -> (521.254638671875, 213.56387329101562)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/578`
- text/content preview: `Select Auto to Tank on the home page then press the Automatic Run button, this will set the FWC12 plant to automatic operation whereby pressing of the macerator Start button will set the run sequence in operation and discharge the macerated food waste into the holding tank.`

### #/texts/579
- type: `section_header`
- order index: `544`

- type: `text`

- raw_ref: `#/texts/580`
- text/content preview: `Select Auto to De-watering Press on the home page then press the Automatic Run button, this will set the FWC12 plant to automatic operation whereby pressing of the macerator Start button will set the run sequence in operation and discharge the macerated food waste into the de-watering press.`

- raw_ref: `#/texts/591`
- text/content preview: `Select Auto Ashore on the home page then press the Automatic Run button, this will set the FWC12 plant to automatic operation whereby pressing of the macerator Start button will set the run sequence in operation and discharge the macerated food waste to the bunker station.`

### #/texts/598
- type: `text`
- order index: `562`
- page: `24`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(104.12358093261719, 280.1688537597656) -> (521.2650146484375, 209.68804931640625)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/598`
- text/content preview: `To start the macerator, it must be in the ready status, the E-Stop should not be illuminated, and the Start / Run button should be illuminated solid green. Once the macerator is filled with food and the lid is closed the press Start / Run button it will change from solid green to flashing green to show the macerator...`

### #/texts/610
- type: `text`
- order index: `570`
- page: `25`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(111.56336212158203, 553.511962890625) -> (521.20361328125, 531.5620727539062)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/610`
- text/content preview: `The owner and/or user must have a sound understanding of the operating instructions and warnings before using this equipment.`

### #/texts/611
- type: `text`
- order index: `571`
- page: `25`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(111.56336212158203, 515.281982421875) -> (521.20361328125, 493.643310546875)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/611`
- text/content preview: `There are several forewarnings indicated throughout this manual that may stress a possible unsafe condition or important information regarding the use of this equipment.`

### #/texts/612
- type: `text`
- order index: `572`
- page: `25`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(111.56336212158203, 477.4790954589844) -> (521.2037353515625, 443.244140625)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/612`
- text/content preview: `The system operator must ensure that all relevant accident prevention regulations of their industry are observed and complied with. These safety regulations are only supplementary to the existing safety regulations of the entire system.`

### #/texts/613
- type: `text`
- order index: `573`
- page: `25`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(111.56336212158203, 426.9615173339844) -> (521.20361328125, 392.7265930175781)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/613`
- text/content preview: `This manual has been prepared to provide you with a simple and understandable guide for equipment operation and maintenance. To keep your unit in top running condition, follow the specific maintenance procedures given in this manual.`

### #/texts/614
- type: `section_header`
- order index: `574`
- page: `25`
- section title: `General Warnings:`
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(111.98804473876953, 376.4096374511719) -> (191.19601440429688, 367.4028625488281)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/614`
- text/content preview: `General Warnings:`

### #/texts/615
- type: `text`
- order index: `576`
- page: `25`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(133.30352783203125, 347.2952575683594) -> (486.0818786621094, 315.2577209472656)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/615`
- text/content preview: `WARNING: Ensure you have read the safety definitions and symbols and understand all instructions before installing, operating, or servicing this machine . Failure to do so could result in severe personal injury or property damage .`

### #/texts/617
- type: `text`
- order index: `581`
- page: `25`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(134.0244598388672, 294.3711853027344) -> (484.892822265625, 264.7707214355469)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/617`
- text/content preview: `CAUTION: When installing or maintaining the pre-screen, shut off and lock out power before removing any covers. Never make adjustments while in operation, except for those prescribed in this manual.`

### #/texts/618
- type: `text`
- order index: `582`
- page: `25`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(134.1552734375, 239.5049285888672) -> (490.46234130859375, 219.860107421875)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/618`
- text/content preview: `DANGER: Keep doors and guards in place at all times to avoid exposure to rotating parts. While the power is on, severe injury can occur if hands or feet reach inside the unit.`

### #/texts/619
- type: `text`
- order index: `583`
- page: `25`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(133.85797119140625, 189.73155212402344) -> (467.5599365234375, 170.05865478515625)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/619`
- text/content preview: `WARNING: A qualified electrician must perform all wiring. Failure to comply may result in severe personal injury or property damage.`

- order index: `590`
- page: `26`
- section title: `Electrical System Precautions`
- section path: ``

- raw_ref: `#/texts/629`

### #/texts/630
- type: `text`
- order index: `591`
- page: `26`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(111.56336212158203, 637.41259765625) -> (521.2034912109375, 615.8051147460938)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/630`
- text/content preview: `The electrical equipment must be secured against unauthorised access and may only be tested and maintained by trained specialists.`

- type: `picture`
- order index: `592`
- page: `26`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``

### #/texts/631
- type: `text`
- order index: `593`
- page: `26`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(134.0137176513672, 584.7608032226562) -> (455.16888427734375, 575.722900390625)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/631`
- text/content preview: `WARNING: Electrical Hazard! ALWAYS check for no voltage before starting work!`

### #/texts/632
- type: `text`
- order index: `594`
- page: `26`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(111.84303283691406, 545.3720092773438) -> (521.20361328125, 511.1637268066406)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/632`
- text/content preview: `When working on the switchgear and motors, the system must de-energized, tagged out and secured against re-connection in accordance with the ship's working practices and permit to work policy.`

### #/texts/633
- type: `section_header`
- order index: `595`
- page: `26`
- section title: `Biohazard`
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(112.43344116210938, 494.9690246582031) -> (155.25360107421875, 487.72625732421875)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/633`
- text/content preview: `Biohazard`

### #/texts/634
- type: `text`
- order index: `596`
- page: `26`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(111.56336212158203, 469.80316162109375) -> (521.2034301757812, 437.2055358886719)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/634`
- text/content preview: `The food waste press can contain a variety of bacteria and viruses. In general, these are nonpathogenic strains, however, the inhalation of aerosols and contact with the skin and mucous membranes should be avoided.`

### #/pictures/59
- type: `picture`
- order index: `597`
- page: `26`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(75.11861419677734, 423.5550231933594) -> (124.00402069091797, 381.9923095703125)`
- raw_ref: `#/pictures/59`
- text/content preview: ``

### #/texts/635
- type: `text`
- order index: `598`
- page: `26`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(134.50355529785156, 415.78704833984375) -> (483.1478271484375, 386.33184814453125)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/635`
- text/content preview: `WARNING: Biohazard! When working on the system the operator must wear suitable clothes, eye protection and rubber gloves suitable for contact with wastewater. Failure to do so could lead to illness or death.`

### #/texts/636
- type: `text`
- order index: `599`
- page: `26`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(111.56336212158203, 367.5118103027344) -> (521.20361328125, 345.565673828125)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/636`
- text/content preview: `The nature, control and extent of the necessary vaccinations and pre/post treatment examinations should be determined by the ship or company medical professionals.`

### #/texts/654
- type: `section_header`
- order index: `615`
- page: `27`
- section title: `What it Does 7.1.3`
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(75.0, 221.33333333333337) -> (172.90487670898438, 208.66666666666663)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/654`
- text/content preview: `What it Does 7.1.3`

### #/texts/655
- type: `text`
- order index: `616`
- page: `27`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(112.3298568725586, 192.84153747558594) -> (521.203369140625, 171.32388305664062)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/655`
- text/content preview: `Food waste is fed into the machine and ground into small particles for transport by vacuum to the holding tank or dewatering press.`

### #/texts/656
- type: `section_header`
- order index: `617`
- page: `27`
- section title: `How it Works 7.1.4`
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(75.0, 155.0) -> (175.1566162109375, 142.66666666666663)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/656`
- text/content preview: `How it Works 7.1.4`

### #/texts/657
- type: `text`
- order index: `618`
- page: `27`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(111.67729949951172, 126.72190856933594) -> (521.2034912109375, 105.08395385742188)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/657`
- text/content preview: `Food waste disposers use flails mounted on a spinning plate taking advantage of centrifugal power to force food waste particles against a grinding ring breaking the food down into small particles.`

### #/texts/665
- type: `section_header`
- order index: `624`
- page: `28`
- section title: `Transport of the Macerator 7.1.5`
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(75.0, 664.6666666666666) -> (238.3182373046875, 652.0)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/665`
- text/content preview: `Transport of the Macerator 7.1.5`

### #/texts/666
- type: `text`
- order index: `625`
- page: `28`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(111.67729949951172, 636.3594970703125) -> (521.203369140625, 614.7258911132812)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/666`
- text/content preview: `If the machine is to be stored before installation it should be stored in a dry and clean room where the relative humidity may not exceed 60%.`

### #/texts/667
- type: `text`
- order index: `626`
- page: `28`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(112.43344116210938, 611.04150390625) -> (349.36334228515625, 602.0036010742188)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/667`
- text/content preview: `Recommended storage temperature of -20 °C to + 60 °C.`

### #/texts/668
- type: `text`
- order index: `627`
- page: `28`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(111.56336212158203, 598.4407348632812) -> (521.20361328125, 576.8021240234375)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/668`
- text/content preview: `The machine should not be lifted or moved by hand. During installation, we recommend using a pallet jack or forklift.`

### #/texts/669
- type: `section_header`
- order index: `628`
- page: `28`
- section title: `Mounting 7.1.6`
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(75.0, 561.0) -> (158.49365234375, 548.0)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/669`
- text/content preview: `Mounting 7.1.6`

### #/texts/670
- type: `text`
- order index: `629`
- page: `28`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(111.67729949951172, 532.321044921875) -> (521.20361328125, 485.4859924316406)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/670`
- text/content preview: `In order to weld a strong joint and to be able to grind to an even and fine surface between the discharge cone and the working bench/tabletop, the cone is welded with its upper flange against the underside of the working top. The opening in the worktop must be at least 398 ± 2 mm in diameter. The disposer is then sc...`

### #/texts/671
- type: `section_header`
- order index: `630`
- page: `28`
- section title: `Mounting of models 520, 530, 550 and 575, delivered with legs as standard`
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(112.43344116210938, 469.3218078613281) -> (423.6513671875, 460.2839050292969)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/671`
- text/content preview: `Mounting of models 520, 530, 550 and 575, delivered with legs as standard`

### #/texts/672
- type: `text`
- order index: `631`
- page: `28`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(111.56336212158203, 443.99810791015625) -> (521.20361328125, 422.3664245605469)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/672`
- text/content preview: `The weights of models 520, 530, 550 and 575 require legs for support. At installation site the separately delivered 3 legs must be fixed to the 3 clamps in the disposer bottom plate.`

### #/pictures/64
- type: `picture`
- order index: `632`
- page: `28`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(126.1246109008789, 410.79180908203125) -> (192.2833709716797, 357.0131530761719)`
- raw_ref: `#/pictures/64`
- text/content preview: ``

### #/texts/673
- type: `text`
- order index: `633`
- page: `28`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(110.52298736572266, 338.7297058105469) -> (217.53196716308594, 329.7229309082031)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/673`
- text/content preview: `When mounting the legs:`

### #/texts/674
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `634`
- page: `28`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(110.6990737915039, 318.6714172363281) -> (500.67608642578125, 296.6029052734375)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/674`
- text/content preview: ` Measure the height (X mm) between the flange of the mounting assembly and the floor/floor plate.`

### #/texts/675
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `635`
- page: `28`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(110.6990737915039, 292.15386962890625) -> (491.9751281738281, 283.0433044433594)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/675`
- text/content preview: ` Measure the height (Y mm) of the disposer without legs including the 3 mm rubber seal.`

### #/texts/676
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `636`
- page: `28`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(110.6990737915039, 278.6387634277344) -> (500.67596435546875, 256.5257873535156)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/676`
- text/content preview: ` Lay down the disposer carefully on its side. Slide the three legs into respective clamp. Each leg should protrude X – Y - 4 mm.`

### #/texts/677
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `637`
- page: `28`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(110.6990737915039, 252.1212615966797) -> (500.67608642578125, 230.12228393554688)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/677`
- text/content preview: ` Tighten the clamps. Make sure that the legs are fixated, and that their position have not changed during the tightening of the screw.`

### #/texts/678
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `638`
- page: `28`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(110.6990737915039, 225.60057067871094) -> (500.6759033203125, 203.60476684570312)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/678`
- text/content preview: ` Place the disposer so that it stands on its legs. Move the disposer carefully into position under the flange of the mounting assembly.`

### #/texts/679
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `639`
- page: `28`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(110.6990737915039, 199.0830535888672) -> (500.676025390625, 164.00259399414062)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/679`
- text/content preview: ` Using the six screws with nuts fixate the disposer onto the flange with the 3 mm rubber seal in between. Tighten the screws alternately and evenly until the rubber seal is compressed approximately 1 mm.`

### #/texts/680
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `640`
- page: `28`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(110.6990737915039, 159.4808807373047) -> (500.7795104980469, 150.44296264648438)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/680`
- text/content preview: ` Use a jack or a lever to push up the disposer towards the flange of the mounting assembly.`

### #/texts/681
- type: `text`
- order index: `641`
- page: `28`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(111.67729949951172, 132.08995056152344) -> (521.20361328125, 85.16567993164062)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/681`
- text/content preview: `While this upward pressure is maintained, untighten each leg and pull it downwards. Make sure that all legs are firmly pressed against the floor. Tighten the clamps using a torque of 17 Nm. As this is a critical matter, a torque wrench should be used. If no torque wrench is available use a leaver of approximately 30...`

### #/pictures/65
- type: `picture`
- order index: `642`
- page: `28`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(366.67572021484375, 757.8021965026855) -> (538.4971923828125, 694.6683807373047)`
- raw_ref: `#/pictures/65`
- text/content preview: ``

- type: `text`
- order index: `643`
- page: `28`
- section title: ``

- bbox: `(419.3333333333333, 763.6666666666666) -> (527.3333333333333, 720.6666666666666)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/682`
- text/content preview: `FMD`

### #/texts/683
- type: `text`
- order index: `644`
- page: `28`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(426.6666666666667, 703.0) -> (524.3333333333333, 694.6666666666666)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/683`
- text/content preview: `FundamentalMarineDevelopments`

### #/texts/688
- type: `section_header`
- order index: `645`
- page: `29`
- section title: `Environmentally Responsible Solutions Engineered`
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(72.0, 757.0) -> (219.0, 705.0)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/688`
- text/content preview: `Environmentally Responsible Solutions Engineered`

### #/texts/689
- type: `section_header`
- order index: `646`
- page: `29`
- section title: `Electrical Installation 7.1.7`
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(75.0, 664.6666666666666) -> (208.03219604492188, 652.3333333333334)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/689`
- text/content preview: `Electrical Installation 7.1.7`

### #/texts/690
- type: `text`
- order index: `647`
- page: `29`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(111.56336212158203, 636.328369140625) -> (521.2034912109375, 614.7258911132812)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/690`
- text/content preview: `The electrical connection must be done by an authorized electrician and in accordance to valid local regulations.`

### #/texts/691
- type: `text`
- order index: `648`
- page: `29`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(111.56336212158203, 611.04150390625) -> (521.2052001953125, 566.0869140625)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/691`
- text/content preview: `The wiring made at the factory, and the electrical connections to be done during installation, are shown in the electrical wiring diagram attached to this manual. The machine's specific electrical data are given in this manual, as well as on its serial number plate located on the outer cover of the macerator.`

### #/texts/692
- type: `section_header`
- order index: `649`
- page: `29`
- section title: `Supply Voltage`
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(111.8637466430664, 548.01171875) -> (175.45179748535156, 539.0049438476562)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/692`
- text/content preview: `Supply Voltage`

### #/texts/693
- type: `text`
- order index: `650`
- page: `29`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(112.01911926269531, 522.7197875976562) -> (521.2034301757812, 501.08111572265625)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/693`
- text/content preview: `Check that the supply voltage to be connected corresponds to the specified voltage on the machine's serial number plate.`

### #/texts/694
- type: `text`
- order index: `651`
- page: `29`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(112.01911926269531, 497.52337646484375) -> (521.2035522460938, 477.64874267578125)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/694`
- text/content preview: `Check that the supply voltage for the delivered machine is fused and protected as specified in this manual.`

### #/texts/695
- type: `section_header`
- order index: `652`
- page: `29`
- section title: `Cables`
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(112.01911926269531, 459.5690612792969) -> (140.95950317382812, 452.3262939453125)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/695`
- text/content preview: `Cables`

### #/texts/696
- type: `text`
- order index: `653`
- page: `29`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(111.91553497314453, 435.1014099121094) -> (521.20361328125, 400.1650695800781)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/696`
- text/content preview: `Use connection cable having 1.5 mm² wires for machines having a rated current up to 14A. For machines having a rated current above 14A, use 2.5 mm² wires. The rated voltage and current is specified on the machine's serial number plate.`

### #/texts/697
- type: `section_header`
- order index: `654`
- page: `29`
- section title: `Direction of Rotation`
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(112.43344116210938, 383.8824157714844) -> (200.82899475097656, 376.6085205078125)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/697`
- text/content preview: `Direction of Rotation`

### #/texts/698
- type: `text`
- order index: `655`
- page: `29`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(111.56336212158203, 358.6822204589844) -> (521.2035522460938, 337.0442199707031)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/698`
- text/content preview: `The disposer operates correctly irrespective of the motor's rotational direction. It is therefore irrelevant in which sequence the electrical phases are connected to the disposer motor.`

### #/texts/699
- type: `section_header`
- order index: `656`
- page: `29`
- section title: `Safety Interlock Switch`
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(111.8637466430664, 320.8787536621094) -> (208.390380859375, 311.8408508300781)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/699`
- text/content preview: `Safety Interlock Switch`

### #/texts/700
- type: `text`
- order index: `657`
- page: `29`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(112.01911926269531, 295.68487548828125) -> (521.2035522460938, 273.9233703613281)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/700`
- text/content preview: `Check the function of the interlock switch, if necessary, adjust the position of this switch and ensure it functions correctly.`

### #/texts/701
- type: `section_header`
- order index: `658`
- page: `29`
- section title: `Commissioning & Shutdown 7.1.8`
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(75.33333333333333, 244.66666666666663) -> (241.69586181640625, 232.66666666666663)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/701`
- text/content preview: `Commissioning & Shutdown 7.1.8`

### #/texts/702
- type: `section_header`
- order index: `659`
- page: `29`
- section title: `Check before Start Up`
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(112.01911926269531, 216.8415985107422) -> (205.38653564453125, 207.80368041992188)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/702`
- text/content preview: `Check before Start Up`

### #/texts/703
- type: `text`
- order index: `660`
- page: `29`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(112.01911926269531, 191.61033630371094) -> (521.2036743164062, 144.68289184570312)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/703`
- text/content preview: `Disconnect the power at the main isolator and lock out according to vessel lockout procedures. Check that the rotary shredder in the inlet opening of the disposer turns freely 360° in both directions by hand, and make sure that no foreign object has been dropped into the grinding unit during installation.`

### #/pictures/66
- type: `picture`
- order index: `661`
- page: `29`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(366.661376953125, 757.8022384643555) -> (538.5216064453125, 694.6600189208984)`
- raw_ref: `#/pictures/66`
- text/content preview: ``

### #/texts/704
- type: `text`
- order index: `662`
- page: `29`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(419.3333333333333, 763.6666666666666) -> (527.3333333333333, 720.6666666666666)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/704`
- text/content preview: `FMD`

### #/texts/705
- type: `text`
- order index: `663`
- page: `29`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(426.6666666666667, 703.0) -> (524.3333333333333, 694.6666666666666)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/705`
- text/content preview: `FundamentalMarineDevelopments`

### #/texts/709
- type: `section_header`
- order index: `664`
- page: `30`
- section title: `Environmentally Responsible Solutions Engineered`
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(72.0, 757.0) -> (219.0, 705.0)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/709`
- text/content preview: `Environmentally Responsible Solutions Engineered`

### #/texts/710
- type: `section_header`
- order index: `665`
- page: `30`
- section title: `Checks during Start Up`
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(112.01911926269531, 662.7305908203125) -> (208.4939727783203, 653.7238159179688)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/710`
- text/content preview: `Checks during Start Up`

### #/texts/711
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `666`
- page: `30`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(110.6990737915039, 634.04833984375) -> (361.9815673828125, 625.0415649414062)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/711`
- text/content preview: ` Start the disposer and determine that the grinder rotate.`

### #/texts/712
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `667`
- page: `30`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(110.6990737915039, 620.5211181640625) -> (500.676025390625, 600.2867431640625)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/712`
- text/content preview: ` Check for automatic flushing water. The water should come directly when starting the machine.`

### #/texts/713
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `668`
- page: `30`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(110.6990737915039, 594.0023803710938) -> (479.1311340332031, 584.9644775390625)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/713`
- text/content preview: ` Check assembly, flushing water connections and drain connections for possible leaks.`

### #/texts/714
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `669`
- page: `30`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(110.6990737915039, 580.560546875) -> (500.6759948730469, 571.5226440429688)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/714`
- text/content preview: ` Make sure that the safety interlock switch functions and stops the machine if the lid is lifted.`

### #/pictures/67
- type: `picture`
- order index: `670`
- page: `30`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(76.1224365234375, 557.5730285644531) -> (120.62975311279297, 517.8723754882812)`
- raw_ref: `#/pictures/67`
- text/content preview: ``

### #/texts/715
- type: `text`
- order index: `671`
- page: `30`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(82.66666666666667, 539.0) -> (114.0, 519.0)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/715`
- text/content preview: `AL`

### #/texts/716
- type: `text`
- order index: `672`
- page: `30`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(134.27847290039062, 545.9874267578125) -> (490.4920654296875, 526.3426513671875)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/716`
- text/content preview: `DANGER: Keep doors and guards in place at all times to avoid exposure to rotating parts. While the power is on, severe injury can occur if hands or feet reach inside the unit.`

### #/texts/717
- type: `section_header`
- order index: `673`
- page: `30`
- section title: `Operation 7.1.9`
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(75.0, 492.0) -> (159.95729064941406, 479.3333333333333)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/717`
- text/content preview: `Operation 7.1.9`

### #/texts/718
- type: `text`
- order index: `674`
- page: `30`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(111.91553497314453, 463.5616760253906) -> (521.2035522460938, 443.68768310546875)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/718`
- text/content preview: `Food waste that is difficult to grind, such as fibrous vegetables, tough fish skins and sinewy meat, should be broken down in size and mixed with other food waste.`

### #/texts/719
- type: `text`
- order index: `675`
- page: `30`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(111.80159759521484, 425.7168884277344) -> (521.2034912109375, 404.0030517578125)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/719`
- text/content preview: `Dry and sticky food waste (such as steamed rice, pasta, mashed potatoes, bread) should soaked in water before being fed into the machine.`

### #/texts/720
- type: `text`
- order index: `676`
- page: `30`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(112.00875854492188, 387.7930603027344) -> (521.2034301757812, 366.2027282714844)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/720`
- text/content preview: `Hard shells in various forms (e.g. from clams, oysters, crabs etc.) must not be fed into the machine as it among other things causes drainpipe blockages.`

### #/texts/721
- type: `text`
- order index: `677`
- page: `30`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(111.68766021728516, 362.6405334472656) -> (521.2035522460938, 341.00567626953125)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/721`
- text/content preview: `Also larger amounts of eggshells must not be fed into the machine as it also causes drainpipe blockages.`

### #/texts/722
- type: `text`
- order index: `678`
- page: `30`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(111.67729949951172, 337.32000732421875) -> (521.20361328125, 304.8459167480469)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/722`
- text/content preview: `For batch fed machines of 2.5kW or more, and with tightly sealed top cover above the inlet for food waste, also any single larger sized bone can be mixed with other food waste when being fed into the machine.`

### #/texts/723
- type: `section_header`
- order index: `679`
- page: `30`
- section title: `Start and stop`
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(110.543701171875, 286.7402038574219) -> (170.92074584960938, 277.7645568847656)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/723`
- text/content preview: `Start and stop`

### #/texts/724
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `680`
- page: `30`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(109.52799987792969, 258.31201171875) -> (162.88943481445312, 249.20449829101562)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/724`
- text/content preview: `Open lid`

### #/texts/725
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `681`
- page: `30`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(109.20149230957031, 237.16127014160156) -> (357.931396484375, 227.96261596679688)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/725`
- text/content preview: `Fill the feeding hopper to a maximum half of its volume`

### #/texts/726
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `682`
- page: `30`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(109.19023895263672, 215.79652404785156) -> (162.68226623535156, 208.318603515625)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/726`
- text/content preview: `Close lid`

### #/texts/727
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `683`
- page: `30`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(108.92002868652344, 194.46099853515625) -> (355.652587890625, 185.36483764648438)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/727`
- text/content preview: `Press the start button – disposer and flush water starts`

### #/texts/728
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `684`
- page: `30`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(109.24652862548828, 173.30674743652344) -> (516.6167602539062, 152.24166870117188)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/728`
- text/content preview: `When complete and the grinder has stopped wait a further 10 seconds before opening the lid to the feed hopper`

- type: `picture`
- order index: `685`
- page: `30`
- section title: ``

- bbox: `(366.7735595703125, 757.6897621154785) -> (538.443115234375, 694.6999664306641)`

- page: `30`

- type: `text`
- order index: `687`
- page: `30`

- type: `picture`
- order index: `688`
- page: `31`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(65.97425079345703, 757.625186920166) -> (218.3194122314453, 704.0143585205078)`
- raw_ref: `#/pictures/69`
- text/content preview: ``

### #/texts/735
- type: `text`
- order index: `689`
- page: `31`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(72.0, 757.0) -> (164.0, 743.6666666666666)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/735`
- text/content preview: `Environmentally`

### #/texts/736
- type: `text`
- order index: `690`
- page: `31`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(72.33333333333334, 738.6666666666666) -> (219.0, 724.6666666666666)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/736`
- text/content preview: `Responsible Solutions`

### #/texts/739
- type: `section_header`
- order index: `693`
- page: `31`
- section title: `Disposer Reduces Speed, Stops or does not Start`
- section path: ``

- raw_ref: `#/texts/739`
- text/content preview: `Disposer Reduces Speed, Stops or does not Start`

### #/texts/740
- type: `text`
- order index: `694`
- page: `31`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(111.68766021728516, 618.1195678710938) -> (355.888916015625, 609.0816650390625)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/740`
- text/content preview: `A humming sound may be heard from the disposer motor.`

### #/texts/741
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `695`
- page: `31`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(110.6990737915039, 599.2506713867188) -> (231.57379150390625, 590.243896484375)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/741`
- text/content preview: ` Press the red stop button`

### #/texts/742
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `696`
- page: `31`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(110.6990737915039, 585.6923217773438) -> (443.60308837890625, 576.685546875)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/742`
- text/content preview: ` Use the main electrical isolator to disconnect electrical supply and lock it out`

### #/texts/743
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `697`
- page: `31`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(110.6990737915039, 572.1289672851562) -> (215.00091552734375, 563.1221923828125)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/743`
- text/content preview: ` Use protective gloves`

### #/texts/744
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `698`
- page: `31`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(110.6990737915039, 558.5706176757812) -> (235.30270385742188, 549.5638427734375)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/744`
- text/content preview: ` Open the disposer inlet lid`

### #/texts/745
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `699`
- page: `31`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(110.6990737915039, 545.159912109375) -> (313.6094970703125, 536.1220092773438)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/745`
- text/content preview: ` Check if something is jammed in the disposer`

### #/texts/746
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `700`
- page: `31`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(110.6990737915039, 531.6016235351562) -> (440.59918212890625, 522.563720703125)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/746`
- text/content preview: ` If something is jammed, place the jam release wrench on the center washer`

### #/texts/747
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `701`
- page: `31`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(110.6990737915039, 518.0432739257812) -> (500.67596435546875, 496.0448913574219)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/747`
- text/content preview: ` The recess on the lower plate of the wrench should grab one of the two bars on the disc of the grinding unit, as shown below`

### #/texts/752
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `702`
- page: `31`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(110.6990737915039, 392.0397033691406) -> (500.6761474609375, 357.45330810546875)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/752`
- text/content preview: ` Release the disc of the grinding unit by rotating the wrench backwards and forwards until this shredder disc rotates freely a complete turn in both directions. If needed, extend the bar on the wrench and hit the bar with a hammer/rubber mallet.`

### #/texts/753
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `703`
- page: `31`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(110.6990737915039, 352.4096374511719) -> (262.1300354003906, 343.4028625488281)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/753`
- text/content preview: ` Remove the jam release wrench.`

### #/texts/754
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `704`
- page: `31`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(110.6990737915039, 338.88116455078125) -> (450.7501525878906, 329.84326171875)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/754`
- text/content preview: ` Remove any non-grindable object from the disposer grinding unit, e.g. cutlery.`

### #/texts/755
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `705`
- page: `31`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(110.6990737915039, 325.4075927734375) -> (234.88836669921875, 316.40081787109375)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/755`
- text/content preview: ` Close the disposer inlet lid`

### #/texts/756
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `706`
- page: `31`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(110.6990737915039, 311.8511657714844) -> (355.6631774902344, 302.8443908691406)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/756`
- text/content preview: ` Check and reset breakers & motor overload protection.`

### #/texts/757
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `707`
- page: `31`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(110.6990737915039, 298.29156494140625) -> (311.3307800292969, 291.0487976074219)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/757`
- text/content preview: ` Unlock and reset the main electrical isolator.`

### #/texts/758
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `708`
- page: `31`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(110.6990737915039, 284.7599182128906) -> (380.3153076171875, 275.7220153808594)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/758`
- text/content preview: ` Press start button and check the disposer functions correctly.`

### #/texts/759
- type: `section_header`
- order index: `714`
- page: `31`
- section title: `Disposer starts but there is no flushing water`
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(112.43344116210938, 259.2050476074219) -> (300.16265869140625, 250.16714477539062)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/759`
- text/content preview: `Disposer starts but there is no flushing water`

### #/texts/760
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `715`
- page: `31`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(110.6990737915039, 243.09056091308594) -> (294.0328063964844, 234.08377075195312)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/760`
- text/content preview: ` Is the water supply isolation valve open?`

### #/texts/761
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `716`
- page: `31`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(110.6990737915039, 229.6792449951172) -> (498.2936096191406, 220.64132690429688)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/761`
- text/content preview: ` Is a clicking sound heard when activating the water solenoid valve? If not, change the coil.`

### #/texts/762
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `717`
- page: `31`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(110.6990737915039, 216.09165954589844) -> (456.34344482421875, 207.08486938476562)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/762`
- text/content preview: ` Is the water strainer clogged? Isolate the water supply, open strainer and clean.`

### #/texts/764
- type: `section_header`
- order index: `720`
- page: `31`
- section title: `Machine does not Start and makes no Sound`
- section path: ``

- raw_ref: `#/texts/764`

### #/texts/765
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `721`
- page: `31`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(110.6990737915039, 126.32981872558594) -> (386.9444885253906, 117.32302856445312)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/765`
- text/content preview: ` Check that the disposer inlet lid is in place and properly closed.`

### #/texts/766
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `722`
- page: `31`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(110.6990737915039, 112.77336120605469) -> (345.6158447265625, 103.76657104492188)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/766`
- text/content preview: ` Check that the main power isolator is in ON-position.`

### #/texts/767
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `723`
- page: `31`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(110.6990737915039, 99.20750427246094) -> (454.8934020996094, 90.20071411132812)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/767`
- text/content preview: ` Make sure breakers & motor overload protection are in order and switched on.`

### #/texts/775
- type: `text`
- order index: `732`
- page: `32`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(132.70578002929688, 167.2905731201172) -> (485.4538269042969, 135.3758544921875)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/775`
- text/content preview: `WARNING: Ensure you have read the safety definitions and symbols and understand all instructions before installing, operating, or servicing this machine . Failure to do so could result in severe personal injury or property damage .`

- type: `text`

- section title: ``

- raw_ref: `#/texts/776`

### #/texts/784
- type: `section_header`
- order index: `739`
- page: `33`
- section title: `Dismantling of Disposer`
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(112.43344116210938, 662.76171875) -> (212.22286987304688, 653.7238159179688)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/784`
- text/content preview: `Dismantling of Disposer`

### #/texts/785
- type: `text`
- order index: `740`
- page: `33`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(111.56336212158203, 637.4437255859375) -> (521.2034912109375, 615.8051147460938)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/785`
- text/content preview: `The below designation within brackets refers to the position numbers on the exploded view drawing and spare part list.`

### #/texts/786
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `741`
- page: `33`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(112.43344116210938, 596.8490600585938) -> (506.82733154296875, 587.84228515625)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/786`
- text/content preview: `Isolate the power at the main isolator and lock out according to vessel lockout procedures.`

### #/texts/787
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `742`
- page: `33`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(112.133056640625, 581.3704833984375) -> (444.3681945800781, 572.3637084960938)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/787`
- text/content preview: `Isolate the water supply to the disposer by closing a valve in the supply line.`

### #/texts/788
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `743`
- page: `33`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(112.0501937866211, 565.9956665039062) -> (494.3262634277344, 556.8851318359375)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/788`
- text/content preview: `Disconnect the disposer motor (P1) connection cable from the start & stop control unit.`

### #/texts/789
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `744`
- page: `33`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(111.74980926513672, 550.5298461914062) -> (260.20208740234375, 541.5230712890625)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/789`
- text/content preview: `Disconnect the disposer outlet.`

### #/texts/790
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `745`
- page: `33`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(112.00875854492188, 535.0823974609375) -> (521.2249755859375, 500.72137451171875)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/790`
- text/content preview: `Use a trolley with lifting plate or similar that can be inserted under the disposer. Detach the disposer from the assembly (6 screws and nuts, P18), and move the disposer to a suitable workbench for the continued dismantling.`

### #/texts/791
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `746`
- page: `33`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(112.08126831054688, 494.4749755859375) -> (521.203125, 472.6433410644531)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/791`
- text/content preview: `Turn the grinder upside down and remove the housing (P20) by loosening the two screws (P23) , and loosen the cable gland (P22) and insert the cable into the housing.`

### #/texts/792
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `747`
- page: `33`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(112.02947235107422, 466.3956604003906) -> (521.190673828125, 444.6849670410156)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/792`
- text/content preview: `Mark on the end shield (P3) the position of the strap (P19) and then remove it by loosening two nuts (P16). Turn the grinder over again. Loosen the remaining two nuts with washers (P16) .`

### #/texts/793
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `748`
- page: `33`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(111.94660949707031, 438.31695556640625) -> (521.2218017578125, 378.6824951171875)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/793`
- text/content preview: `These four nuts (P16) must always be changed for new ones before reassembly, as they are lock nuts. Note the location of the disposer outlet on the end shield (P3) relative to the hole pattern on the hood (P15) upper side, so that the outlet later may be reassembled in the same direction. For this purpose, is also a...`

### #/texts/794
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `749`
- page: `33`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(111.9362564086914, 372.434814453125) -> (521.2245483398438, 352.3646545410156)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/794`
- text/content preview: `Remove the seal (P14) on the stationary shredder. This seal must always be replaced with a new seal when reassembled.`

### #/texts/795
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `750`
- page: `33`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(112.43344116210938, 344.3561096191406) -> (521.2216796875, 310.0422058105469)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/795`
- text/content preview: `Pry the stationary shredder (P13) loose from the end shield (P3) using a crowbar that levers against the large tooth on the inside edge and is supported by the rotary shredder (P10) close to one of the two shredder blades. (See photo below.)`

### #/texts/796
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `751`
- page: `33`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(112.43344116210938, 162.79307556152344) -> (521.2377319335938, 115.88534545898438)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/796`
- text/content preview: `Loosen the axle screw (P12). If the rotating shredder (P10) keeps turning, and cannot be held still manually, use a pipe wrench to hold one of its shredder blades. Alternatively, lock the rotary shredder with a screwdriver placed through one of the holes at the disposer outlet. (See photo below.)`

- order index: `752`
- page: `33`

- type: `section_header`
- order index: `759`
- page: `34`
- section title: `Responsible Solutions`
- section path: ``
