- raw_ref: `#/texts/804`
- text/content preview: `Responsible Solutions`

### #/texts/805
- type: `text`
- order index: `760`
- page: `34`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(72.0, 719.3333333333334) -> (136.66666666666669, 705.0)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/805`
- text/content preview: `Engineered`

### #/pictures/80
- type: `picture`
- order index: `761`
- page: `34`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(128.68003845214844, 666.8827438354492) -> (303.4826354980469, 545.2404632568359)`
- raw_ref: `#/pictures/80`
- text/content preview: ``

### #/texts/806
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `762`
- page: `34`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(112.43344116210938, 527.4739990234375) -> (521.18701171875, 505.7626953125)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/806`
- text/content preview: `Remove the rotary shredder (P10) by placing two crowbars opposite one another under the edge of the shredder, supported by the side of the end shield (P3). (See photo below.)`

### #/texts/807
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `763`
- page: `34`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(112.43344116210938, 353.3525695800781) -> (521.2059326171875, 306.4448547363281)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/807`
- text/content preview: `Remove the V-ring seal (P8) and loosen the 4 fixing screws (P7) of the end shield (P3). Note the position of the outlet on the end shield (P3) relative to the terminal box for cable connection on the motor (P1), so that this outlet will receive the same direction when reassembling the disposer. Remove the end shield.`

### #/texts/808
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `764`
- page: `34`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(112.43344116210938, 300.0736999511719) -> (521.1776733398438, 278.3630065917969)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/808`
- text/content preview: `Inspect the washer (P4) for possible wear caused by the V-ring seal. Replace the washer if necessary.`

### #/texts/809
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `765`
- page: `34`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(112.43344116210938, 271.9949951171875) -> (521.2249755859375, 237.68106079101562)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/809`
- text/content preview: `Turn the end shield (P3) upside down and remove the locking ring (P6) by means of a circlip pliers. With some adequate protection in between (e.g. a piece of wood), apply pressure to the washer (P4) in order to get the two axle seals (P5) out. (See photo below.)`

### #/texts/810
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `766`
- page: `34`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(112.43344116210938, 91.51487731933594) -> (521.181396484375, 71.5682373046875)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/810`
- text/content preview: `After this dismantling make sure that the surface of the sealing washer (P4) remains in good condition.`

### #/pictures/81
- type: `picture`
- order index: `767`
- page: `34`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``

### #/texts/820
- type: `text`
- order index: `777`
- page: `35`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(419.3333333333333, 763.6666666666666) -> (527.3333333333333, 720.6666666666666)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/820`
- text/content preview: `FMD`

### #/texts/821
- type: `text`
- order index: `778`
- page: `35`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(426.6666666666667, 703.0) -> (524.3333333333333, 694.6666666666666)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/821`
- text/content preview: `FundamentalMarineDevelopments`

### #/texts/822
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `779`
- page: `35`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(112.43344116210938, 662.8343505859375) -> (521.2552490234375, 628.4058227539062)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/822`
- text/content preview: `Examine the contact surfaces of the carrier (P2) for wear caused by the axle seals. There should only be two small symmetrical (barely noticeable) tracks on the carrier (P2) if it is to be reused. If the tracks are noticeable, asymmetrical or more than two, replace the carrier.`

### #/texts/824
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `780`
- page: `35`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(112.43344116210938, 517.0316162109375) -> (521.1964111328125, 495.2038269042969)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/824`
- text/content preview: `Terminate dismantling here if carrier (P2) and motor (P1) are not to be replaced. Start the reassembling of the disposer from item 5 in section Assembly of Disposer below.`

### #/texts/825
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `781`
- page: `35`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(112.43344116210938, 488.95233154296875) -> (521.2247314453125, 467.1238708496094)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/825`
- text/content preview: `The V-ring seal (P8) and the two axle seals (P5) with special grease (P26) together with stationary seals (P14) and (P17) must be replaced at each dismantling.`

### #/texts/826
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `782`
- page: `35`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(112.133056640625, 460.8730163574219) -> (521.2677001953125, 413.8450012207031)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/826`
- text/content preview: `In Service Package 2 a disassembly screw (P31) for the carrier (P2) is included. Use this screw on top of the carrier and screw it down. This will remove the carrier from the motor axle. If needed, use the rotary shredder (P10) as a handle to prevent the motor axle from rotating. Alternatively, hold the carrier with...`

### #/texts/827
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `783`
- page: `35`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(112.133056640625, 279.91162109375) -> (521.2249755859375, 207.80368041992188)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/827`
- text/content preview: `When changing the motor (P1), make sure that the new motor has the same classification and quality as the original. The motor must have two holes in the upper flange to allow for ventilation and drainage of water condensation (see arrows on photo below and original motor). When drilling these holes in the motor uppe...`

### #/pictures/86
- type: `picture`
- order index: `784`
- page: `35`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(128.60118103027344, 621.5375366210938) -> (308.8009948730469, 526.6504821777344)`

- raw_ref: `#/texts/823`
- text/content preview: `i`

### #/texts/832
- type: `section_header`
- order index: `788`
- page: `36`
- section title: `Environmentally Responsible Solutions Engineered`
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(72.0, 757.0) -> (219.0, 705.0)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/832`
- text/content preview: `Environmentally Responsible Solutions Engineered`

### #/texts/833
- type: `section_header`
- order index: `789`
- page: `36`
- section title: `Assembly of Disposer`
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(111.68766021728516, 662.76171875) -> (202.38270568847656, 653.7238159179688)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/833`
- text/content preview: `Assembly of Disposer`

### #/texts/834
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `790`
- page: `36`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(111.11339569091797, 634.7550659179688) -> (521.1718139648438, 613.0437622070312)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/834`
- text/content preview: `Clean all components carefully. Wipe the surface of the motor (P1) upper flange and its shaft. Make sure that there is no dust or grease residue.`

### #/texts/835
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `791`
- page: `36`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(109.01249694824219, 606.6757202148438) -> (521.2293090820312, 584.9644775390625)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/835`
- text/content preview: `Make sure that the motor shaft key (P30) is in the correct position. Apply a thin layer of manufacturer specified special grease (P26) on the motor shaft.`

### #/texts/836
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `792`
- page: `36`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(108.92963409423828, 578.7129516601562) -> (351.54888916015625, 569.6024169921875)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/836`
- text/content preview: `Wipe the carrier (P2) clean on the inside and outside.`

### #/texts/837
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `793`
- page: `36`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(108.6292495727539, 563.234375) -> (521.2249145507812, 503.60430908203125)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/837`
- text/content preview: `Mark onto the motor shaft the depth of the hole in the carrier (P2). From the top of the motor shaft, this measure is 38 mm for models 510, 515, and 48 mm for model 520, and 58 mm for models 530, 550 and 575. Carefully press the carrier (P2) onto the motor shaft all the way down to the mark. If hand power is not eno...`

### #/texts/838
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `794`
- page: `36`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(108.88819885253906, 497.2362976074219) -> (403.9756164550781, 488.2398681640625)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/838`
- text/content preview: `On the end shield (P3), clean the center hole for the axle seals (P5)`

### #/texts/839
- type: `text`
- order index: `795`
- page: `36`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(405.5955810546875, 490.9066162109375) -> (409.58343505859375, 489.9416198730469)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/839`
- text/content preview: `.`

### #/texts/840
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `796`
- page: `36`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(108.96070861816406, 481.75390625) -> (521.2249145507812, 447.5634765625)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/840`
- text/content preview: `Place the washer (P4) in the end shield with the flange facing towards the motor (see the sketch below under item 8, where the parts are seen with the end shield placed upside down as on the photo to the left).`

### #/texts/841
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `797`
- page: `36`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(108.9089126586914, 441.1954650878906) -> (498.19439697265625, 432.08489990234375)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/841`
- text/content preview: `Grease the sealing face of this center hole in the end-shield (P3) with special grease (P26)`

### #/texts/842
- type: `text`
- order index: `798`
- page: `36`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(499.91741943359375, 434.86578369140625) -> (503.6981201171875, 433.9007873535156)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/842`
- text/content preview: `.`

### #/texts/843
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `799`
- page: `36`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(111.94660949707031, 425.7168884277344) -> (521.2252197265625, 378.6824951171875)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/843`
- text/content preview: `To avoid damaging the seals (P5, 2pcs), press each seal one at the time into position in the end shield using a tool (for example a shaft end or other round bar, see below photo) that has the same outer diameter as these seals. The seals shall be placed with the opening and stainless spring upwards towards the washe...`

### #/texts/848
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `800`
- page: `36`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(111.9362564086914, 220.87571716308594) -> (521.2249755859375, 186.68527221679688)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/848`
- text/content preview: `The seals are fixated by fitting the locking ring (P6) into the groove in the end shield (P3) according to the above sketch under item 8. Tap on this ring to ensure that it is seated properly in the groove in the end shield.`

- type: `picture`
- order index: `801`
- page: `36`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(127.0869140625, 366.852783203125) -> (269.9921875, 236.60009765625)`

### #/texts/849
- type: `text`
- order index: `808`
- page: `36`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(419.3333333333333, 763.6666666666666) -> (527.3333333333333, 720.6666666666666)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/849`
- text/content preview: `FMD`

### #/texts/850
- type: `text`
- order index: `809`
- page: `36`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(426.6666666666667, 703.0) -> (524.3333333333333, 694.6666666666666)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/850`
- text/content preview: `FundamentalMarineDevelopments`

- type: `text`
- order index: `814`

- raw_ref: `#/texts/858`
- text/content preview: `FMD`

### #/texts/859
- type: `text`
- order index: `815`
- page: `37`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(426.6666666666667, 703.0) -> (524.3333333333333, 694.6666666666666)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/859`
- text/content preview: `FundamentalMarineDevelopments`

### #/texts/860
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `816`
- page: `37`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(112.43344116210938, 662.8343505859375) -> (521.2572021484375, 641.1231079101562)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/860`
- text/content preview: `With a clean and soft putty knife fill the grooves along the sealing lips in the axle seals (P5) with special grease (P26). Be sure no dirt or particles happen to fall into this greasing.`

### #/texts/861
- type: `text`
- order index: `817`
- page: `37`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(76.8002700805664, 599.1849365234375) -> (282.987548828125, 592.3676147460938)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/861`
- text/content preview: `P26`

### #/pictures/93
- type: `picture`
- order index: `818`
- page: `37`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(126.1791000366211, 630.0101623535156) -> (281.7975769042969, 531.8385620117188)`
- raw_ref: `#/pictures/93`
- text/content preview: ``

### #/texts/862
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `819`
- page: `37`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(112.43344116210938, 521.9564208984375) -> (521.1952514648438, 500.3592529296875)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/862`
- text/content preview: `With a clean soft cloth lubricate a thin layer of special grease (P26) on the carrier (P2) sealing surface for the axle seals (P5) .`

### #/texts/863
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `820`
- page: `37`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(112.43344116210938, 493.8720397949219) -> (521.2464599609375, 434.2413635253906)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/863`
- text/content preview: `With reference to section 9.4, item 13 above, refit the end shield (P3) so that its outlet ends up 180° offset from the motor (P1) terminal box for cable connection. Take great care so that the lips on the axle seals (P5, 2pcs) not are damaged. For disposer models 510, 515 and 520 secure the end shield with tighteni...`

### #/texts/864
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `821`
- page: `37`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(112.43344116210938, 427.87335205078125) -> (521.203125, 406.1626892089844)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/864`
- text/content preview: `Grease the sealing lip of the V-ring seal (P8) and its seal washer (P4) using special grease (P26) . Fit the V-ring seal over the carrier (P2) with its seal lip against the seal washer (P4) .`

### #/texts/868
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `822`
- page: `37`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(112.43344116210938, 286.276611328125) -> (521.2528076171875, 277.1660461425781)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/868`
- text/content preview: `Insert a small click of special grease (P26) into the keyway of the carrier (P2) and push on the key (P9) .`

### #/texts/869
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `823`
- page: `37`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(112.43344116210938, 270.9151611328125) -> (521.2128295898438, 249.08096313476562)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/869`
- text/content preview: `Wipe clean the axle hole in the rotary shredder (P10). Also make sure that the mating surfaces on the end shield (P3) and the stationary shredder (P13) are clean.`

### #/texts/870
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `824`
- page: `37`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(112.43344116210938, 242.83641052246094) -> (361.24261474609375, 233.72586059570312)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/870`
- text/content preview: `Carefully fit the rotary shredder (P10) on the carrier (P2) .`

### #/texts/871
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `825`
- page: `37`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(112.43344116210938, 227.35789489746094) -> (321.64752197265625, 218.24734497070312)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/871`
- text/content preview: `Wipe the carrier (P2) clean from excess grease.`

### #/texts/872
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `826`
- page: `37`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(112.43344116210938, 211.8729705810547) -> (521.2274780273438, 190.16232299804688)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/872`
- text/content preview: `Apply a layer of rubber sealing compound (P27) over the joint between rotary shredder and carrier (see photo below). Make sure that no sealing compound enters the screw hole of the carrier.`

- type: `picture`
- order index: `827`

- type: `text`

- type: `section_header`
- order index: `832`
- page: `38`
- section title: `Environmentally Responsible Solutions Engineered`
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(72.0, 757.0) -> (219.0, 705.0)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/877`
- text/content preview: `Environmentally Responsible Solutions Engineered`

- type: `picture`
- order index: `833`
- page: `38`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(366.7745056152344, 757.8084678649902) -> (538.505126953125, 694.7175598144531)`
- raw_ref: `#/pictures/96`
- text/content preview: ``

### #/texts/878
- type: `text`
- order index: `834`
- page: `38`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(419.3333333333333, 763.6666666666666) -> (527.3333333333333, 720.6666666666666)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/878`
- text/content preview: `FMD`

### #/texts/879
- type: `text`
- order index: `835`
- page: `38`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(426.6666666666667, 703.0) -> (524.3333333333333, 694.6666666666666)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/879`
- text/content preview: `FundamentalMarineDevelopments`

### #/texts/880
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `836`
- page: `38`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(112.43344116210938, 662.8343505859375) -> (521.2249755859375, 590.6036376953125)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/880`
- text/content preview: `Fit the axle washer (P11) on the rotary shredder. Apply rubber sealing compound around the underside of the entire head of the axle screw (P12) and mount this screw. Make sure that sealing compound is squeezed out around the entire circumference of the axle washer, and also around the entire head of the axle screw....`

### #/texts/881
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `837`
- page: `38`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(112.133056640625, 584.3521118164062) -> (521.1932983398438, 562.5242919921875)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/881`
- text/content preview: `Apply a thin uninterrupted string of rubber sealing compound (P27) in the seat of the end shield (P3) in which the stationary shredder (P13) should be pressed down. See below photo.`

### #/texts/882
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `838`
- page: `38`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(112.133056640625, 397.87567138671875) -> (521.2362670898438, 375.7946472167969)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/882`
- text/content preview: `Carefully position the stationary shredder (P13) with its upper large tooth closest to the outlet of the end shield (P3) .`

### #/texts/883
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `839`
- page: `38`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(112.133056640625, 368.9546813964844) -> (521.239990234375, 335.4483947753906)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/883`
- text/content preview: `Tap around the top of the stationary shredder (P13) with a plastic hammer to fix it in the end shield (P3), and make sure that the stationary shredder is all the way down in the seat of the end shield.`

### #/texts/884
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `840`
- page: `38`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(112.133056640625, 327.0725402832031) -> (521.2249145507812, 291.92578125)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/884`
- text/content preview: `Secure the stationary shredder (P13) to the end shield (P3) by hammering 6 punch marks on the end shield with even distances around the joint between these two articles. See below photo.`

### #/texts/885
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `841`
- page: `38`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(112.133056640625, 123.07371520996094) -> (521.251953125, 102.645751953125)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/885`
- text/content preview: `Fit a new rubber seal (P14) on the top of the stationary shredder (P13). Make sure that it is centered.`

### #/texts/886
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `842`
- page: `38`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(112.133056640625, 94.15592956542969) -> (436.4845275878906, 85.04537963867188)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/886`
- text/content preview: `Wipe clean the surface of the hood (P15) that faces the rubber seal (P14) .`

### #/pictures/97
- type: `picture`
- order index: `843`
- page: `38`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(128.3814697265625, 550.2715606689453) -> (308.2503662109375, 415.2535095214844)`
- raw_ref: `#/pictures/97`

- text/content preview: ``

### #/texts/891
- type: `section_header`
- order index: `845`
- page: `39`
- section title: `Environmentally Responsible Solutions Engineered`
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(72.0, 757.0) -> (219.0, 705.0)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/891`

- type: `picture`

### #/texts/892
- type: `text`
- order index: `847`
- page: `39`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(419.3333333333333, 763.6666666666666) -> (527.3333333333333, 720.6666666666666)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/892`
- text/content preview: `FMD`

### #/texts/893
- type: `text`
- order index: `848`
- page: `39`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(426.6666666666667, 703.0) -> (524.3333333333333, 694.6666666666666)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/893`
- text/content preview: `FundamentalMarineDevelopments`

### #/texts/894
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `849`
- page: `39`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(112.133056640625, 662.8343505859375) -> (521.26953125, 601.7654418945312)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/894`
- text/content preview: `Carefully fit the hood (P15). For the upper hole pattern of the hood to end up in the same way as before dismantling, the outside arrow mark on the hood lower edge shall be positioned centrally above the waste outlet on the end shield (P3). This to make sure that the disposer outlet will have the same direction towa...`

### #/texts/895
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `850`
- page: `39`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(112.133056640625, 595.0325927734375) -> (521.259033203125, 535.7276611328125)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/895`
- text/content preview: `Secure the hood (P15) with 2 pcs. of washers and 2 pcs. of new unused locking nuts (P16) in the two positions that have no previously made markings for the strap (P19, see section Dismantling of Disposer, item 7 above). Tighten these two lock nuts (P16) only a little so that the seal (P14) is fixed. The final tighte...`

### #/texts/896
- type: `text`
- order index: `851`
- page: `39`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(128.81024169921875, 527.23583984375) -> (521.242431640625, 455.0876159667969)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/896`
- text/content preview: `For disposers installed in cabinet models (e.g. model 500-MB and 500-MC) the parts with position number P19 up to and including P25 are not used. For these disposers secure the hood (P15) with 4 pcs. of washers and 4 pcs. of new unused locking nuts (P16). Tighten all these lock nuts crosswise with torque 9,5 Nm for...`

### #/texts/897
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `852`
- page: `39`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(112.133056640625, 446.3704833984375) -> (261.6521911621094, 437.36370849609375)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/897`
- text/content preview: `Turn the disposer upside down.`

### #/texts/898
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `853`
- page: `39`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(112.133056640625, 430.7518615722656) -> (521.2223510742188, 395.6050720214844)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/898`
- text/content preview: `Place the strap (P19) diagonally over the two remaining screws and fix it with 2 pcs. of washers and 2 pcs. of new unused locking nuts (P16). Tighten all four lock nuts crosswise. For models 510, 515 and 520 with torque 9,5 Nm and for models 530, 550 and 575 with 21 Nm.`

### #/texts/899
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `854`
- page: `39`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(112.0501937866211, 230.5941619873047) -> (468.62823486328125, 221.48361206054688)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/899`
- text/content preview: `Pass the motor cable through the cable gland (P22) in the disposer housing (P20) .`

### #/texts/900
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `855`
- page: `39`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(112.0501937866211, 214.8717498779297) -> (521.2576904296875, 166.64364624023438)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/900`
- text/content preview: `Mount the disposer housing (P20) over the motor (P1). While the housing is being lowered over the motor, pull the cable so that the remaining part of the cable comes out through the cable gland. Make sure that the sealing strip (P21) is in the right place on the housing. Also make sure that the six small "heels" of...`

### #/pictures/100
- type: `picture`
- order index: `856`
- page: `39`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(128.53494262695312, 382.64300537109375) -> (227.75634765625, 248.1724853515625)`
- raw_ref: `#/pictures/100`
- text/content preview: ``

### #/texts/905
- type: `section_header`
- order index: `857`
- page: `40`
- section title: `Environmentally Responsible Solutions Engineered`
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(72.0, 757.0) -> (219.0, 705.0)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/905`
- text/content preview: `Environmentally Responsible Solutions Engineered`

### #/pictures/101
- type: `picture`
- order index: `858`
- page: `40`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(128.98086547851562, 666.6260833740234) -> (351.6620788574219, 523.626953125)`
- raw_ref: `#/pictures/101`
- text/content preview: ``

### #/texts/906
- type: `text`
- order index: `859`
- page: `40`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(332.0, 624.0) -> (352.0, 611.6666666666667)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/906`
- text/content preview: `P21`

### #/texts/907
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `860`
- page: `40`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(112.0501937866211, 513.0745849609375) -> (515.4437866210938, 503.96405029296875)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/907`
- text/content preview: `Fasten the housing (P20) to the strap (P19) with 2 pcs. of screws and 2 pcs. of washers (P23) .`

### #/texts/909
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `861`
- page: `40`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(112.0501937866211, 353.52056884765625) -> (521.224853515625, 318.56683349609375)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/909`
- text/content preview: `Pull out the cable as far as it goes through the cable gland. Then feed back about 5 cm to get a good relief of the cable. Lock the cable by tightening the nut of the cable gland (P22). Turn the disposer over again.`

### #/texts/910
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `862`
- page: `40`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(112.0501937866211, 311.8314514160156) -> (521.19970703125, 289.7599182128906)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/910`
- text/content preview: `Check with a blade measure that the stationary seal (P14) is properly fixed between stationary shredder (P13) and hood (P15) .`

### #/texts/911
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `863`
- page: `40`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(112.0501937866211, 282.8097839355469) -> (521.22509765625, 234.92605590820312)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/911`
- text/content preview: `The disposer is now ready to be remounted under the assembly using the same trolley with lifting plate (or the same steady jack with lifting plate) as previously used when the disposer was dismantled. Be aware of the motor power supply cable so it does not get pinched and damaged.`

### #/texts/912
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `864`
- page: `40`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(112.0501937866211, 228.1938934326172) -> (521.2074584960938, 206.00509643554688)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/912`
- text/content preview: `Make sure that the seal for the hood (P17) is placed correctly before you move the disposer into position under the assembly for mounting with 6 pcs. of screws and nuts (P18) .`

### #/texts/913
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `865`
- page: `40`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(112.0501937866211, 199.63189697265625) -> (409.04718017578125, 190.28268432617188)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/913`
- text/content preview: `Refit any disposer fixation to the wall/bulkhead or floor/floor plate.`

### #/texts/914
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `866`
- page: `40`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(112.0501937866211, 183.45298767089844) -> (521.2250366210938, 161.5992889404297)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/914`
- text/content preview: `Reconnect and seal the water trap with sewer pipe to the outlet on the disposer end shield (P3) .`

### #/texts/915
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `867`
- page: `40`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(112.0501937866211, 154.87327575683594) -> (521.1869506835938, 132.68447875976562)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/915`
- text/content preview: `Reconnect the disposer motor (P1) connection cable to the start & stop control unit according to the electrical connection diagram supplied with the machine from Disperator.`

### #/texts/916
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `868`
- page: `40`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(111.74980926513672, 126.31439208984375) -> (502.2696533203125, 116.96517944335938)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/916`
- text/content preview: `Reconnect electrical supply using the main electrical safety breaker on the wall/bulkhead.`

### #/texts/917
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `869`
- page: `40`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(111.74980926513672, 110.04319763183594) -> (497.815673828125, 101.00527954101562)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/917`
- text/content preview: `Reconnect the flushing water supply to the disposer by open the valve in the supply line.`

### #/texts/918
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `870`
- page: `40`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(111.74980926513672, 94.28965759277344) -> (521.2247314453125, 74.08575439453125)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/918`
- text/content preview: `Start up and test the disposer according to applicable start-up procedures described in section 6.5 of this user manual.`

### #/texts/1043
- type: `section_header`
- order index: `979`
- page: `48`
- section title: `Owner / User Responsibility`
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(112.03983306884766, 608.353271484375) -> (229.10647583007812, 599.0040893554688)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1043`
- text/content preview: `Owner / User Responsibility`

### #/texts/1044
- type: `text`
- order index: `980`
- page: `48`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(111.56336212158203, 595.8741455078125) -> (521.20361328125, 573.8026733398438)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1044`
- text/content preview: `The owner and/or user must have a sound understanding of the operating instructions and warnings before using this equipment.`

### #/texts/1045
- type: `text`
- order index: `981`
- page: `48`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(111.56336212158203, 557.6390991210938) -> (521.20361328125, 536.0054931640625)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1045`
- text/content preview: `There are several forewarnings indicated throughout this manual that may stress a possible unsafe condition or important information regarding the use of this equipment.`

### #/texts/1046
- type: `text`
- order index: `982`
- page: `48`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(111.56336212158203, 519.7203369140625) -> (521.2037353515625, 485.4859924316406)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1046`
- text/content preview: `The system operator must ensure that all relevant accident prevention regulations of their industry are observed and complied with. These safety regulations are only supplementary to the existing safety regulations of the entire system.`

### #/texts/1047
- type: `text`
- order index: `983`
- page: `48`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(111.56336212158203, 469.3218078613281) -> (521.20361328125, 434.960205078125)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1047`
- text/content preview: `This manual has been prepared to provide you with a simple and understandable guide for equipment operation and maintenance. To keep your unit in top running condition, follow the specific maintenance procedures given in this manual.`

### #/texts/1048
- type: `section_header`
- order index: `984`
- page: `48`
- section title: `General Warnings:`
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(111.98804473876953, 418.77313232421875) -> (191.19601440429688, 409.766357421875)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1048`
- text/content preview: `General Warnings:`

- page: `48`

### #/texts/1049
- type: `text`
- order index: `986`
- page: `48`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(133.30352783203125, 389.53167724609375) -> (486.0818786621094, 357.6169738769531)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1049`
- text/content preview: `WARNING: Ensure you have read the safety definitions and symbols and understand all instructions before installing, operating, or servicing this machine . Failure to do so could result in severe personal injury or property damage .`

### #/texts/1051
- type: `text`
- order index: `991`
- page: `48`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(134.0244598388672, 338.6502990722656) -> (484.892822265625, 309.16986083984375)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1051`
- text/content preview: `CAUTION: When installing or maintaining the pre-screen, shut off and lock out power before removing any covers. Never make adjustments while in operation, except for those prescribed in this manual.`

### #/texts/1052
- type: `text`
- order index: `992`
- page: `48`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(134.1552734375, 285.3410339355469) -> (490.46234130859375, 265.69622802734375)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1052`
- text/content preview: `DANGER: Keep doors and guards in place at all times to avoid exposure to rotating parts. While the power is on, severe injury can occur if hands or feet reach inside the unit.`

### #/texts/1053
- type: `text`
- order index: `993`
- page: `48`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(133.85797119140625, 235.4504852294922) -> (467.5599365234375, 215.777587890625)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1053`
- text/content preview: `WARNING: A qualified electrician must perform all wiring. Failure to comply may result in severe personal injury or property damage.`

- bbox: `(111.56336212158203, 650.1298828125) -> (521.2034912109375, 628.4058227539062)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1064`
- text/content preview: `The electrical equipment must be secured against unauthorised access and may only be tested and maintained by trained specialists.`

### #/pictures/122
- type: `picture`
- order index: `1002`
- page: `49`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(75.8885726928711, 614.1607360839844) -> (121.89495086669922, 574.1373291015625)`
- raw_ref: `#/pictures/122`
- text/content preview: ``

### #/texts/1065
- type: `text`
- order index: `1003`
- page: `49`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(134.0137176513672, 597.483154296875) -> (455.16888427734375, 588.4452514648438)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1065`
- text/content preview: `WARNING: Electrical Hazard! ALWAYS check for no voltage before starting work!`

### #/texts/1066
- type: `text`
- order index: `1004`
- page: `49`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(111.84303283691406, 558.0892944335938) -> (521.20361328125, 523.7645263671875)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1066`
- text/content preview: `When working on the switchgear and motors, the system must de-energized, tagged out and secured against re-connection in accordance with the ship's working practices and permit to work policy.`

### #/texts/1067
- type: `section_header`
- order index: `1005`
- page: `49`
- section title: `Biohazard`
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(112.43344116210938, 507.56976318359375) -> (155.25360107421875, 500.3269958496094)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1067`
- text/content preview: `Biohazard`

### #/texts/1068
- type: `text`
- order index: `1006`
- page: `49`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(111.56336212158203, 495.0001525878906) -> (521.2034301757812, 462.5292663574219)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1068`
- text/content preview: `The food waste press can contain a variety of bacteria and viruses. In general, these are nonpathogenic strains, however, the inhalation of aerosols and contact with the skin and mucous membranes should be avoided.`

### #/pictures/123
- type: `picture`
- order index: `1007`
- page: `49`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(75.2386245727539, 448.90252685546875) -> (123.99211120605469, 407.114990234375)`
- raw_ref: `#/pictures/123`
- text/content preview: ``

### #/texts/1069
- type: `text`
- order index: `1008`
- page: `49`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(134.50355529785156, 441.10491943359375) -> (483.1478271484375, 411.5325622558594)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1069`
- text/content preview: `WARNING: Biohazard! When working on the system the operator must wear suitable clothes, eye protection and rubber gloves suitable for contact with wastewater. Failure to do so could lead to illness or death.`

### #/texts/1070
- type: `text`
- order index: `1009`
- page: `49`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(111.56336212158203, 392.8323669433594) -> (521.20361328125, 370.8830261230469)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1070`
- text/content preview: `The nature, control and extent of the necessary vaccinations and pre/post treatment examinations should be determined by the ship or company medical professionals.`

- section path: ``

- raw_ref: `#/texts/1077`
- text/content preview: `Environmentally Responsible Solutions Engineered`

### #/texts/1078
- type: `section_header`
- order index: `1014`
- page: `50`
- section title: `Food Waste Press Description 7.2.2`
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(75.0, 664.6666666666666) -> (249.12664794921875, 652.0)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1078`
- text/content preview: `Food Waste Press Description 7.2.2`

### #/texts/1079
- type: `text`
- order index: `1015`
- page: `50`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(111.56336212158203, 636.3594970703125) -> (521.2035522460938, 602.0036010742188)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1079`
- text/content preview: `The FMD food waste press is exclusively designed for separating solids from wastewater at a maximum inlet flow rate of up to 20 m³/hr (the 'intended use'). Intended use also includes compliance with the operating, maintenance and servicing conditions prescribed in this document.`

### #/texts/1080
- type: `text`
- order index: `1016`
- page: `50`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(111.56336212158203, 585.8400268554688) -> (521.2034912109375, 564.3229370117188)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1080`
- text/content preview: `The press must not be used for flow rates higher than those specified and must not be subjected to inlet pressure in excess of 100mbar.`

### #/texts/1081
- type: `text`
- order index: `1017`
- page: `50`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(111.68766021728516, 548.0428466796875) -> (521.2034912109375, 526.4042358398438)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1081`
- text/content preview: `Any use above and beyond the "intended use" is considered improper and the manufacturer assumes no liability for damage resulting from this, such risk is borne solely by the operator.`

### #/texts/1100
- type: `section_header`
- order index: `1035`
- page: `51`
- section title: `Environmentally Responsible Solutions Engineered`
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(72.0, 757.0) -> (219.0, 705.0)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1100`
- text/content preview: `Environmentally Responsible Solutions Engineered`

### #/texts/1101
- type: `section_header`
- order index: `1036`
- page: `51`
- section title: `What it Does 7.2.4`
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(75.0, 664.6666666666666) -> (172.90487670898438, 652.0)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1101`
- text/content preview: `What it Does 7.2.4`

### #/texts/1102
- type: `text`
- order index: `1037`
- page: `51`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(111.56336212158203, 636.3594970703125) -> (521.2035522460938, 602.0036010742188)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1102`
- text/content preview: `The press separates the solids from wastewater by means of a 150 micron screen and a rotating screw. The screened liquid falls by gravity to the intermediate tank and the solids fall into the wheelie bin, via the solids discharge chute, into an endless plastic bag.`

### #/texts/1103
- type: `section_header`
- order index: `1038`
- page: `51`
- section title: `How it Works 7.2.5`
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(75.0, 586.0) -> (175.1566162109375, 573.3333333333334)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1103`
- text/content preview: `How it Works 7.2.5`

### #/texts/1104
- type: `text`
- order index: `1039`
- page: `51`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(111.56336212158203, 557.6390991210938) -> (521.2034301757812, 536.0054931640625)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1104`
- text/content preview: `The press has been designed specifically for screening solids from wastewater and sludge streams. The inlet wastewater should be such that it freely flows into the press without being pressurized.`

### #/texts/1105
- type: `text`
- order index: `1040`
- page: `51`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(111.56336212158203, 519.7203369140625) -> (521.2034912109375, 485.4859924316406)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1105`
- text/content preview: `The principle is simple: a slow rotating screw is enclosed in a basket with a "press zone" integrated at the end which is controlled and adjusted automatically by the air cylinder load on the conical end cap.`

### #/texts/1106
- type: `text`
- order index: `1041`
- page: `51`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(111.56336212158203, 469.3218078613281) -> (521.2034912109375, 447.6838073730469)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1106`
- text/content preview: `The liquid passes through the openings of the screen basket while the slowly rotating screw transports the retained solids to the press zone.`

### #/texts/1107
- type: `text`
- order index: `1042`
- page: `51`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(111.67729949951172, 431.4043273925781) -> (521.2035522460938, 409.766357421875)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1107`
- text/content preview: `In the press zone the material is compressed, de-watered and finally pushed through the conically tapered end cap to remove the solids with a consistent dryness quality.`

### #/texts/1108
- type: `text`
- order index: `1043`
- page: `51`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(111.56336212158203, 393.48052978515625) -> (521.203369140625, 371.842529296875)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1108`
- text/content preview: `The solid content is a function of the input material, the installed basket screen size, and the press zone cone pre-load (which is adjusted using a precision air pressure regulating valve).`

### #/texts/1109
- type: `text`
- order index: `1044`
- page: `51`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(111.56336212158203, 355.6522521972656) -> (521.20361328125, 335.8094177246094)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1109`
- text/content preview: `The pressed solids drop by gravity through the solids discharge chute into the endless bag which is contained in the wheelie bin.`

- type: `picture`
- order index: `1045`
- page: `51`
- section title: ``

- type: `text`
- order index: `1054`

- text/content preview: `WARNING: During lifting and transporting of loads, there is the risk that lifting accessories may fail. Never step under a suspended load, keep a safe distance and cordon off the danger area.`

- type: `text`

- raw_ref: `#/texts/1123`
- text/content preview: `When lifting the press with a crane or chain block, it is only permitted to lift the machine by the provided holders:`

- type: `text`
- order index: `1061`
- page: `52`

- raw_ref: `#/texts/1126`
- text/content preview: `Under no circumstances is the machine to be lifted by the pneumatic cylinder or the front plate eye:`

### #/pictures/131
- type: `picture`
- order index: `1062`
- page: `52`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(212.6420440673828, 260.836669921875) -> (414.32855224609375, 69.39971923828125)`
- raw_ref: `#/pictures/131`

### #/texts/1138
- type: `section_header`
- order index: `1072`
- page: `53`
- section title: `7.2.6.1 Mounting`
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(77.39595794677734, 661.93017578125) -> (171.81396484375, 652.6025390625)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1138`
- text/content preview: `7.2.6.1 Mounting`

### #/texts/1139
- type: `text`
- order index: `1073`
- page: `53`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(124.88013458251953, 636.3594970703125) -> (521.2620849609375, 602.0036010742188)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1139`
- text/content preview: `The frame to which the press is bolted must be flat and horizontal. If this is not the case, the screw separator alignment will be distorted when bolted down to an uneven surface – and this will potentially damage the screw separator and invalidate the warranty.`

### #/pictures/133
- type: `picture`
- order index: `1074`
- page: `53`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(76.18040466308594, 587.1985473632812) -> (119.92050170898438, 548.2234649658203)`
- raw_ref: `#/pictures/133`
- text/content preview: ``

### #/texts/1140
- type: `text`
- order index: `1075`
- page: `53`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(133.2886199951172, 582.4970092773438) -> (485.598388671875, 553.7003173828125)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1140`
- text/content preview: `CAUTION: If the press is solidly bolted to an uneven surface there may be severe misalignment that can permanently damage the press! Inform FMD immediately and carefully document the incidence.`

### #/texts/1141
- type: `section_header`
- order index: `1076`
- page: `53`
- section title: `7.2.6.2 Electrical Installation`
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(77.39595794677734, 529.909423828125) -> (221.35247802734375, 522.0367431640625)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1141`
- text/content preview: `7.2.6.2 Electrical Installation`

### #/texts/1142
- type: `text`
- order index: `1077`
- page: `53`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(125.32553100585938, 503.8819885253906) -> (521.261962890625, 482.12176513671875)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1142`
- text/content preview: `If all mechanical connections are examined and satisfactory, the drive can be connected according to the switching plan attached to the terminal box.`

### #/texts/1143
- type: `text`
- order index: `1078`
- page: `53`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(124.88013458251953, 466.0346374511719) -> (397.06884765625, 456.924072265625)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1143`
- text/content preview: `Thermal motor protection (T1 and T2) is only optionally installed.`

### #/texts/1144
- type: `text`
- order index: `1079`
- page: `53`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(124.88013458251953, 440.6414489746094) -> (435.8079833984375, 431.6035461425781)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1144`
- text/content preview: `The press must be earthed according to the ship's electrical requirements.`

### #/texts/1145
- type: `text`
- order index: `1080`
- page: `53`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(133.25115966796875, 406.57025146484375) -> (480.63629150390625, 377.7781066894531)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1145`
- text/content preview: `WARNING: For the electrical connections, the relevant safety regulations should be followed! Electrical installation must be in accordance with relevant standards and completed by a qualified electrician.`

### #/texts/1146
- type: `text`
- order index: `1081`
- page: `53`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(133.25115966796875, 348.7351379394531) -> (481.34783935546875, 330.2593078613281)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1146`
- text/content preview: `CAUTION: The correct direction of rotation is to be observed; this is clearly marked by the red arrow on the drive. Incorrect direction of rotation can lead to the damage of system parts!`

- order index: `1082`

- type: `section_header`
- order index: `1090`
- page: `54`
- section title: `Commissioning & Shutdown 7.2.7`
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(75.0, 664.6666666666666) -> (241.69586181640625, 652.3333333333334)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1155`
- text/content preview: `Commissioning & Shutdown 7.2.7`

### #/texts/1156
- type: `section_header`
- order index: `1091`
- page: `54`
- section title: `7.2.7.1 Pre-commissioning Checks`
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(77.39595794677734, 634.0740966796875) -> (247.92315673828125, 624.2840576171875)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1156`
- text/content preview: `7.2.7.1 Pre-commissioning Checks`

### #/texts/1157
- type: `text`
- order index: `1092`
- page: `54`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(125.75021362304688, 608.0419921875) -> (377.69927978515625, 599.0040893554688)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1157`
- text/content preview: `Prior to the first test run, all points below should be verified:`

### #/texts/1158
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `1093`
- page: `54`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(130.61607360839844, 589.32080078125) -> (433.5045166015625, 580.2828979492188)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1158`
- text/content preview: ` Are all safety provisions available in accordance with the regulations?`

### #/texts/1159
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `1094`
- page: `54`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(130.61607360839844, 573.3297119140625) -> (498.55328369140625, 564.3229370117188)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1159`
- text/content preview: ` Are all electrical connections made, tested and accepted according to the standards?`

### #/texts/1160
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `1095`
- page: `54`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(130.61607360839844, 557.2482299804688) -> (280.72332763671875, 548.241455078125)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1160`
- text/content preview: ` Are all transport locks removed?`

### #/texts/1161
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `1096`
- page: `54`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(130.61607360839844, 541.288330078125) -> (318.01226806640625, 532.2815551757812)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1161`
- text/content preview: ` Are the inlet and outlet pipes connected?`

### #/texts/1162
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `1097`
- page: `54`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(130.61607360839844, 525.3594970703125) -> (521.2372436523438, 503.72589111328125)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1162`
- text/content preview: ` Open the inspection covers of the screen and check for any foreign objects such as construction or mounting materials, tools, rags etc.`

### #/texts/1163
- type: `section_header`
- order index: `1098`
- page: `54`
- section title: `7.2.7.2 Initial Test Run`
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(77.39595794677734, 482.39263916015625) -> (194.44406127929688, 474.51995849609375)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1163`
- text/content preview: `7.2.7.2 Initial Test Run`

### #/pictures/138
- type: `picture`
- order index: `1099`
- page: `54`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(76.02096557617188, 458.83819580078125) -> (120.88265228271484, 419.0785827636719)`
- raw_ref: `#/pictures/138`
- text/content preview: ``

### #/texts/1164
- type: `text`
- order index: `1100`
- page: `54`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(132.8953857421875, 448.25323486328125) -> (467.39776611328125, 428.2995300292969)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1164`
- text/content preview: `WARNING: Risk of crushing / rupture of limbs! Ensure the inspection covers are fitted and secured before starting the machine.`

### #/texts/1165
- type: `text`
- order index: `1101`
- page: `54`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(125.23230743408203, 402.8443298339844) -> (521.261962890625, 381.2031555175781)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1165`
- text/content preview: `If all the pre-commissioning points are checked and found in order, then the test run can be started by following the below procedure:`

### #/texts/1166
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `1102`
- page: `54`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(130.61607360839844, 371.3995056152344) -> (521.2373657226562, 349.7646484375)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1166`
- text/content preview: ` The press gearmotor should be bumped without water to verify the direction of rotation is correct. The press must not be operated in the wrong direction for more than a few seconds.`

### #/texts/1167
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `1103`
- page: `54`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(130.61607360839844, 345.72113037109375) -> (521.2372436523438, 311.3658447265625)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1167`
- text/content preview: ` Before the first test run with water, the system must be ensured clear of debris, tools, sharp-edged objects, iron filings or other objects located upstream of the inlet. Such objects can damage the press.`

### #/texts/1168
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `1104`
- page: `54`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(130.61607360839844, 307.1988220214844) -> (521.2371826171875, 272.9670715332031)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1168`
- text/content preview: ` For the first test run with water, the air pressure regulating valve for the press zone should be set to ~1.5 bar. Check that the cone seals the press zone, a drip every 5-10 seconds is normal at this stage.`

### #/texts/1169
- type: `text`
- order index: `1105`
- page: `54`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(125.15980529785156, 256.8016052246094) -> (485.1123352050781, 247.76370239257812)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1169`
- text/content preview: `When starting up the press, liquid may leak briefly from around the press zone gasket.`

### #/texts/1170
- type: `text`
- order index: `1106`
- page: `54`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(124.99407196044922, 231.6013641357422) -> (521.261962890625, 209.84622192382812)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1170`
- text/content preview: `For safety purposes protect yourself and other from any liquid that may potentially spray out if the doors on the discharge chute are open.`

### #/texts/1171
- type: `text`
- order index: `1107`
- page: `54`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(125.0147933959961, 193.6807098388672) -> (521.2620849609375, 172.04275512695312)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1171`
- text/content preview: `For the first run using wastewater do not run the feed pump at full power. Leave the TSP running for 30-60 minutes with the wastewater inlet flow at ~30% of maximum capacity during this period:`

### #/texts/1172
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `1108`
- page: `54`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(130.61607360839844, 162.2422332763672) -> (251.61720275878906, 153.20431518554688)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1172`
- text/content preview: ` Check the press for leaks.`

### #/texts/1173
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `1109`
- page: `54`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(130.61607360839844, 149.16087341308594) -> (329.71685791015625, 140.12295532226562)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1173`
- text/content preview: ` Check the solids bag is not filling with water.`

### #/texts/1174
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `1110`
- page: `54`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(130.61607360839844, 135.9622039794922) -> (521.2372436523438, 114.20388793945312)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1174`
- text/content preview: ` Observe the press discharge cone for leakage initially and later when using wastewater for movement to indicate a solids plug is forming.`

### #/texts/1175
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `1111`
- page: `54`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(130.61607360839844, 110.04319763183594) -> (521.2372436523438, 88.40200805664062)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1175`
- text/content preview: ` If the separation and the pressing result are within the required range, the inlet flow rate can be increased slowly.`

### #/pictures/139
- type: `picture`
- order index: `1112`
- page: `54`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(366.771240234375, 757.6510581970215) -> (538.47216796875, 694.7910079956055)`
- raw_ref: `#/pictures/139`
- text/content preview: ``

- order index: `1113`
- page: `54`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(419.3333333333333, 763.6666666666666) -> (527.3333333333333, 720.6666666666666)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1176`
- text/content preview: `FMD`

### #/texts/1177
- type: `text`
- order index: `1114`
- page: `54`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(426.6666666666667, 703.0) -> (524.3333333333333, 694.6666666666666)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1177`
- text/content preview: `FundamentalMarineDevelopments`

### #/texts/1182
- type: `section_header`
- order index: `1115`
- page: `55`
- section title: `Environmentally`
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(72.0, 757.0) -> (164.0, 743.6666666666666)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1182`
- text/content preview: `Environmentally`

### #/texts/1183
- type: `section_header`
- order index: `1116`
- page: `55`
- section title: `Responsible Solutions`
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(72.33333333333334, 738.6666666666666) -> (219.0, 724.6666666666666)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1183`
- text/content preview: `Responsible Solutions`

### #/texts/1184
- type: `section_header`
- order index: `1117`
- page: `55`
- section title: `Engineered`
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(72.0, 719.3333333333334) -> (136.66666666666669, 705.0)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1184`
- text/content preview: `Engineered`

### #/texts/1185
- type: `section_header`
- order index: `1118`
- page: `55`
- section title: `7.2.7.3 Setting & Optimising the Press Discharge`
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(77.39595794677734, 662.392578125) -> (311.87286376953125, 652.6025390625)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1185`
- text/content preview: `7.2.7.3 Setting & Optimising the Press Discharge`

### #/texts/1186
- type: `section_header`
- order index: `1119`
- page: `55`
- section title: `As general rules:`
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(125.00443267822266, 636.328369140625) -> (195.81202697753906, 627.3215942382812)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1186`
- text/content preview: `As general rules:`

### #/texts/1187
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `1120`
- page: `55`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(130.61607360839844, 617.4906005859375) -> (337.5889892578125, 608.4838256835938)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1187`
- text/content preview: ` Never set the air pressure higher than 2.0 bar.`

### #/texts/1188
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `1121`
- page: `55`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(130.61607360839844, 604.6343994140625) -> (521.237060546875, 584.5650024414062)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1188`
- text/content preview: ` Once the plug is established the optimum air pressure is generally 0.6 – 0.8 bar for GW/BW and 1.0-1.5 bar for food waste.`

### #/texts/1189
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `1122`
- page: `55`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(130.61607360839844, 578.6403198242188) -> (521.2371826171875, 556.8851318359375)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1189`
- text/content preview: ` The higher the air pressure the higher the chance a blockage may form in the press, which in turn leads to increased wear, break down and possible irreparable damage.`

### #/texts/1190
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `1123`
- page: `55`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(130.61607360839844, 552.7193603515625) -> (521.2373657226562, 531.0858154296875)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1190`
- text/content preview: ` Observe the press for a while. Reduce or increase the pressing force until the solid discharge runs evenly and continuously.`

### #/texts/1191
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `1124`
- page: `55`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(130.61607360839844, 526.9200439453125) -> (521.2371215820312, 505.4029541015625)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1191`
- text/content preview: ` If the press begins to vibrate, this is often a sign of excessive pressing force and an impending blockage.`

### #/texts/1192
- type: `section_header`
- order index: `1125`
- page: `55`
- section title: `7.2.7.4 Shutdown`
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(77.39595794677734, 486.95269775390625) -> (173.277587890625, 479.08001708984375)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1192`
- text/content preview: `7.2.7.4 Shutdown`

### #/texts/1193
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `1126`
- page: `55`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(130.61607360839844, 457.4405517578125) -> (430.604248046875, 448.40264892578125)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1193`
- text/content preview: ` Turn off and isolate the inlet supply pumps to prevent them starting.`

### #/texts/1194
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `1127`
- page: `55`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(130.61607360839844, 444.241943359375) -> (310.14019775390625, 435.20404052734375)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1194`
- text/content preview: ` Wait until the feed pipes have emptied.`

### #/texts/1195
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `1128`
- page: `55`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(130.61607360839844, 431.1604919433594) -> (463.95709228515625, 422.1225891113281)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1195`
- text/content preview: ` Reduce the pressing force and move the compressed air cylinder to the rear.`

### #/texts/1196
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `1129`
- page: `55`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(130.61607360839844, 417.9619140625) -> (521.2372436523438, 396.32391357421875)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1196`
- text/content preview: ` Let the separator run for a short while longer until the solids in the machine have been completely discharged.`

### #/texts/1197
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `1130`
- page: `55`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(130.61607360839844, 392.1632080078125) -> (429.9827880859375, 383.12530517578125)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1197`
- text/content preview: ` Turn off the press motor and protect against inadvertent re-starting.`

### #/texts/1198
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `1131`
- page: `55`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(130.61607360839844, 378.9334716796875) -> (314.386962890625, 369.92669677734375)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1198`
- text/content preview: ` The system must be thoroughly cleaned.`

### #/texts/1199
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `1132`
- page: `55`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(130.61607360839844, 365.8831787109375) -> (442.61962890625, 356.84527587890625)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1199`
- text/content preview: ` Put up signage to notify that the press has been taken out of operation.`

### #/texts/1200
- type: `text`
- order index: `1133`
- page: `55`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(132.8953857421875, 332.2908630371094) -> (488.59796142578125, 312.617919921875)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1200`
- text/content preview: `Take Note: If the press is to be idle or shut down for more than 72 hours, there is a risk that the solids plug (formed against the cone) will begin dry out and solidify – see below:`

### #/pictures/140
- type: `picture`
- order index: `1134`
- page: `55`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(123.60049438476562, 291.03460693359375) -> (302.3963623046875, 76.33331298828125)`
- raw_ref: `#/pictures/140`
- text/content preview: ``

### #/texts/1201
- type: `text`
- order index: `1135`
- page: `55`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(323.13836669921875, 287.1602478027344) -> (521.2360229492188, 227.60476684570312)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1201`
- text/content preview: `If the plug has dried out and the press is restarted, after a short time of operation the pressure behind the plug will increase until it releases suddenly - and there is the potential for wastewater to carry over into the solids bag.`

### #/texts/1202
- type: `section_header`
- order index: `1136`
- page: `55`
- section title: `Avoid unexpected stress testing of the solids bag.`
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(323.12799072265625, 211.3253631591797) -> (521.2359619140625, 189.68417358398438)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1202`
- text/content preview: `Avoid unexpected stress testing of the solids bag.`

### #/texts/1203
- type: `text`
- order index: `1137`
- page: `55`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(323.3558654785156, 173.61106872558594) -> (521.2360229492188, 139.28378295898438)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1203`
- text/content preview: `Open the service port, retract the cone and remove the solidified solids plug before restarting the press.`

### #/texts/1204
- type: `text`
- order index: `1138`
- page: `55`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(323.873779296875, 85.20079040527344) -> (495.8587951660156, 76.16287231445312)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1204`
- text/content preview: `Picture: Solids bag filled with wastewater`

- type: `section_header`
- order index: `1145`
- page: `56`
- section title: `Overview & Maintenance Intervals`
- section path: ``

- raw_ref: `#/texts/1213`
- text/content preview: `Overview & Maintenance Intervals`

### #/texts/1214
- type: `text`
- order index: `1146`
- page: `56`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(111.56336212158203, 611.0103759765625) -> (521.20361328125, 513.681884765625)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1214`
- text/content preview: `To maintain operational readiness, possible damage should be detected at an early stage. To preserve warranty and guarantee entitlements the operator is obliged to carry out regular inspection and maintenance work on the system in accordance with the respective operating and maintenance instructions as detailed in 7...`

### #/pictures/143
- type: `picture`
- order index: `1147`
- page: `56`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(76.34092712402344, 500.00189208984375) -> (119.9668197631836, 460.79608154296875)`
- raw_ref: `#/pictures/143`
- text/content preview: ``

### #/texts/1215
- type: `text`
- order index: `1148`
- page: `56`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(133.25115966796875, 489.1346435546875) -> (476.19842529296875, 469.4617614746094)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1215`
- text/content preview: `CAUTION: Pay attention to all safety instructions during all maintenance and servicing work and the safety policies of the vessel.`

### #/pictures/144
- type: `picture`
- order index: `1149`
- page: `56`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(75.95301818847656, 453.2178649902344) -> (120.36140441894531, 413.8968200683594)`
- raw_ref: `#/pictures/144`
- text/content preview: ``

### #/texts/1216
- type: `text`
- order index: `1150`
- page: `56`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(133.61630249023438, 439.9359436035156) -> (488.3134765625, 420.25738525390625)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1216`
- text/content preview: `WARNING: Before working on the press, isolate the power supply and lock out or remove fuses. There is a risk of crushed hands and limbs from the rotating shaft/screw in the drive area.`

### #/texts/1217
- type: `text`
- order index: `1151`
- page: `56`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(111.68766021728516, 394.08221435546875) -> (521.20361328125, 374.20819091796875)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1217`
- text/content preview: `All system parts and operating media connected upstream of the press must be protected against unintended start.`

### #/texts/1218
- type: `section_header`
- order index: `1152`
- page: `56`
- section title: `Modifications to the Press 7.2.9`
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(75.0, 356.3333333333333) -> (232.57627868652344, 343.6666666666667)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1218`
- text/content preview: `Modifications to the Press 7.2.9`

### #/texts/1219
- type: `text`
- order index: `1153`
- page: `56`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(112.00875854492188, 327.9625549316406) -> (521.2034912109375, 308.0885314941406)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1219`
- text/content preview: `No modifications, attachments or rebuilding of the press may occur without the prior written authorisation of FMD.`

### #/texts/1220
- type: `text`
- order index: `1154`
- page: `56`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(112.43344116210938, 290.0387268066406) -> (467.5488586425781, 281.0008239746094)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1220`
- text/content preview: `Machine parts that are not in a safe usable condition are to be replaced immediately.`

- raw_ref: `#/texts/1221`
- text/content preview: `Take Note: Only original spare and wear parts may be used. Other parts are not warranted.`

- raw_ref: `#/texts/1244`
- text/content preview: `The essential maintenance for the TSP is summarised in the Preventive Maintenance Tasks table where the following abbreviations/codes are used:`

### #/texts/1250
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `1182`
- page: `58`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``

- text/content preview: `WARNING: Before starting, ensure the compressed air hose to the pneumatic cylinder is disconnected, the cylinder is de-pressurised and has been secured against reactivation.`

- text/content preview: `Loosen and remove the screws on the discharge chute retaining plate, remove the retaining plate including the air cylinder and press cone.`

### #/texts/1289
- type: `section_header`
- order index: `1223`
- page: `61`
- section title: `Removal of the Screen Basket`
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(112.43344116210938, 662.76171875) -> (237.28933715820312, 655.48779296875)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1289`
- text/content preview: `Removal of the Screen Basket`

### #/texts/1290
- type: `text`
- order index: `1224`
- page: `61`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(112.43344116210938, 650.1610107421875) -> (399.7033996582031, 641.1231079101562)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1290`
- text/content preview: `Now the screen basket can be pulled out of the separator using care.`

### #/texts/1291
- type: `section_header`
- order index: `1225`
- page: `61`
- section title: `Ensure that this is carried out as straight as possible to prevent the screen basket jamming!`
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(112.00875854492188, 624.8118896484375) -> (490.2326965332031, 615.8051147460938)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1291`
- text/content preview: `Ensure that this is carried out as straight as possible to prevent the screen basket jamming!`

### #/texts/1292
- type: `text`
- order index: `1226`
- page: `61`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(112.03983306884766, 599.6415405273438) -> (521.2037353515625, 578.0028686523438)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1292`
- text/content preview: `Once the screen basket has been pulled out of the housing by roughly half of its length, the initial resistance experienced reduces considerably.`

### #/texts/1293
- type: `caption`
- order index: `1231`
- page: `61`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(133.0667724609375, 359.14617919921875) -> (480.2179870605469, 328.09661865234375)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1293`
- text/content preview: `Take Note: Care must be taken that neither the screen basket nor the screw conveyor are damaged by the removal process. Particular care must be taken that the flange of the screen basket does not tilted when removing it, otherwise it may jam in place.`

### #/texts/1302
- type: `section_header`
- order index: `1237`
- page: `62`
- section title: `Check the Screen Basket`
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(112.01911926269531, 662.7305908203125) -> (215.53744506835938, 655.48779296875)`

### #/texts/1303
- type: `text`
- order index: `1238`
- page: `62`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(111.84303283691406, 650.1610107421875) -> (521.2037353515625, 603.204345703125)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1303`
- text/content preview: `When the screen basket has been removed and carefully cleaned, prior to re-installation it should be checked to see if damage exists on the surface and that seamless movement of the screw is ensured. The screen basket should not have any deformations or oval distortions. If there is any uncertainty as to what distor...`

### #/texts/1304
- type: `text`
- order index: `1239`
- page: `62`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(111.68766021728516, 599.6415405273438) -> (521.2034912109375, 578.0028686523438)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1304`
- text/content preview: `Any new screen should also be subjected to an inspection for deformations and distortion prior to being fitted.`

- type: `text`

- page: `63`

- section path: ``

### #/texts/1314
- type: `section_header`
- order index: `1248`
- page: `63`
- section title: `Screen Basket Installation`
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(111.8637466430664, 662.7305908203125) -> (220.40570068359375, 655.48779296875)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1314`
- text/content preview: `Screen Basket Installation`

### #/texts/1315
- type: `text`
- order index: `1249`
- page: `63`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(111.26297760009766, 650.1610107421875) -> (521.2035522460938, 615.8051147460938)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1315`
- text/content preview: `The installation of a cleaned or new screen basket occurs in the reverse order to disassembly. When inserting the screen basket, be sure to push it in as straight as possible in order to prevent it jamming and potentially damaging the screw or basket.`

### #/texts/1316
- type: `section_header`
- order index: `1250`
- page: `63`
- section title: `Fitting the Press Zone`
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(112.43344116210938, 599.6104125976562) -> (203.72926330566406, 590.6036376953125)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1316`
- text/content preview: `Fitting the Press Zone`

### #/texts/1317
- type: `text`
- order index: `1251`
- page: `63`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(112.3298568725586, 587.040771484375) -> (521.2034912109375, 565.4021606445312)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1317`
- text/content preview: `If the screen basket has been inserted correctly, then the press zone can be re-attached to the press. Ensure it easily fastens without any gap to the main housing.`

- order index: `1252`
- page: `63`

- type: `text`
- order index: `1253`
- page: `63`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``

- raw_ref: `#/texts/1318`
- text/content preview: `O`

### #/texts/1319
- type: `text`
- order index: `1254`
- page: `63`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(111.68766021728516, 332.1647033691406) -> (493.85821533203125, 323.1268005371094)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1319`
- text/content preview: `After attaching the press zone, check all screws and tighten to the correct torque of 35 Nm.`

- type: `section_header`
- order index: `1261`
- page: `64`
- section title: `Maintenance of the Screw 7.2.13`
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(75.0, 664.6666666666666) -> (233.25181579589844, 652.0)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1329`
- text/content preview: `Maintenance of the Screw 7.2.13`

### #/texts/1330
- type: `text`
- order index: `1262`
- page: `64`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(112.00875854492188, 636.3594970703125) -> (521.2034912109375, 602.0036010742188)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1330`
- text/content preview: `If it is necessary to change the screw or carry out an inspection, then first remove the screen basket as described above. After dismantling the screen basket, the outer holding screws of the screw mounting plate can be released.`

### #/texts/1344
- type: `section_header`
- order index: `1275`
- page: `65`
- section title: `Pulling out the Screw`
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(112.43344116210938, 662.7305908203125) -> (201.65765380859375, 653.7238159179688)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1344`
- text/content preview: `Pulling out the Screw`

### #/texts/1345
- type: `text`
- order index: `1276`
- page: `65`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(111.56336212158203, 650.1610107421875) -> (521.20361328125, 628.4058227539062)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1345`
- text/content preview: `The locating holes for the screw holder can be used for inserting a tool for pulling the screw from the shaft (available on request from FMD).`

### #/texts/1346
- type: `text`
- order index: `1277`
- page: `65`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(111.98804473876953, 624.843017578125) -> (521.2034912109375, 603.204345703125)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1346`
- text/content preview: `Once the screw has been released and the initial friction overcome, the screw can be pulled out carefully. Two people may be required to lift it out.`

### #/pictures/176
- type: `picture`
- order index: `1278`
- page: `65`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(111.02997589111328, 589.2164306640625) -> (293.7488098144531, 374.52569580078125)`
- raw_ref: `#/pictures/176`
- text/content preview: ``

### #/pictures/177
- type: `picture`
- order index: `1279`
- page: `65`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(76.30303955078125, 359.65509033203125) -> (119.82167053222656, 321.6031494140625)`
- raw_ref: `#/pictures/177`
- text/content preview: ``

### #/pictures/178
- type: `picture`
- order index: `1280`
- page: `65`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(312.243408203125, 590.2926025390625) -> (475.32293701171875, 374.590087890625)`
- raw_ref: `#/pictures/178`
- text/content preview: `CAUTION: As the screw is pulled through the rear hole, DO NOT allow the screw to drop freely into the housing! The carbide edges of the screw are brittle and easily damaged by impact!`

### #/texts/1347
- type: `caption`
- order index: `1281`
- page: `65`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(133.1856231689453, 349.81219482421875) -> (483.71661376953125, 330.1393127441406)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1347`
- text/content preview: `CAUTION: As the screw is pulled through the rear hole, DO NOT allow the screw to drop freely into the housing! The carbide edges of the screw are brittle and easily damaged by impact!`

### #/texts/1348
- type: `section_header`
- order index: `1282`
- page: `65`
- section title: `Greasing of Rear and Front`
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(111.98804473876953, 304.68133544921875) -> (225.37757873535156, 295.6434326171875)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1348`
- text/content preview: `Greasing of Rear and Front`

### #/texts/1349
- type: `text`
- order index: `1283`
- page: `65`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(112.3298568725586, 291.96087646484375) -> (521.2034912109375, 270.4432067871094)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1349`
- text/content preview: `Prior to reinserting a renovated or new screw, the holding and mounting zones of the screw must be treated with grease so that installation (and subsequent removal) can be performed easily:`
