### #/texts/1358
- type: `section_header`
- order index: `1295`
- page: `66`
- section title: `Inserting the Screw`
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(112.43344116210938, 662.7305908203125) -> (193.8891143798828, 653.7238159179688)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1358`
- text/content preview: `Inserting the Screw`

### #/texts/1359
- type: `text`
- order index: `1296`
- page: `66`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(112.00875854492188, 650.1610107421875) -> (521.203369140625, 628.4058227539062)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1359`
- text/content preview: `Lift the screw onto the shaft and make sure not to strike the carbide edges of the screw as they are easily damaged by impact.`

### #/pictures/183
- type: `picture`
- order index: `1297`
- page: `66`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(111.03036499023438, 615.1259765625) -> (311.8824768066406, 373.30841064453125)`
- raw_ref: `#/pictures/183`
- text/content preview: ``

### #/texts/1360
- type: `section_header`
- order index: `1298`
- page: `66`
- section title: `Screw in Fully Home Position`
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(111.8637466430664, 359.7309265136719) -> (233.66400146484375, 350.7241516113281)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1360`
- text/content preview: `Screw in Fully Home Position`

### #/texts/1361
- type: `text`
- order index: `1299`
- page: `66`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(111.68766021728516, 347.2822570800781) -> (521.2035522460938, 325.644287109375)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1361`
- text/content preview: `At the end of the mounting zone, the resistance when introducing the screw will be noticeably greater. At this point, the fully home position should be reached carefully using a soft-face hammer.`

### #/texts/1362
- type: `section_header`
- order index: `1300`
- page: `66`
- section title: `Attaching the Fixing Plate`
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(111.68766021728516, 309.33367919921875) -> (219.36990356445312, 300.326904296875)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1362`
- text/content preview: `Attaching the Fixing Plate`

### #/texts/1363
- type: `text`
- order index: `1301`
- page: `66`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(112.22628021240234, 296.76153564453125) -> (521.2034912109375, 275.1235046386719)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1363`
- text/content preview: `Finally, the fixing plate must be attached to the shaft. In this process, the correct play-free installation must be ensured and the correct tightening torque applied.`

### #/texts/1364
- type: `text`
- order index: `1302`
- page: `66`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(111.68766021728516, 271.4410095214844) -> (427.25592041015625, 262.4031066894531)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1364`
- text/content preview: `After this step, the screen basket can be reinserted as described previously.`

- order index: `1303`
- page: `66`

- section path: ``

### #/texts/1367
- type: `text`
- order index: `1308`
- page: `66`

- order index: `1312`

- section title: `7.2.13.1 Maintenance of the Shaft & Shaft Seals`
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(77.39595794677734, 662.4264526367188) -> (304.2169189453125, 654.5198974609375)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1374`
- text/content preview: `7.2.13.1 Maintenance of the Shaft & Shaft Seals`

### #/texts/1375
- type: `section_header`
- order index: `1313`
- page: `67`
- section title: `Loosening the Retaining Plate Screw`
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(125.75021362304688, 636.328369140625) -> (277.7441711425781, 627.3215942382812)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1375`
- text/content preview: `Loosening the Retaining Plate Screw`

### #/texts/1376
- type: `text`
- order index: `1314`
- page: `67`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(125.23230743408203, 623.7637939453125) -> (521.2620849609375, 589.40283203125)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1376`
- text/content preview: `If the screen basket and the screw are removed, maintenance work and replacement of the shaft and the shaft seals can be performed. To do this, the screw of the retaining plate is to be released on the gear side.`

- type: `picture`
- order index: `1315`

### #/texts/1377
- type: `section_header`
- order index: `1316`
- page: `67`
- section title: `Driving out the Shaft`
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(125.75021362304688, 295.68487548828125) -> (212.79922485351562, 286.64697265625)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1377`
- text/content preview: `Driving out the Shaft`

### #/texts/1378
- type: `text`
- order index: `1317`
- page: `67`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(124.88013458251953, 282.9612731933594) -> (519.3974609375, 261.3232727050781)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1378`
- text/content preview: `The shaft can be driven forward to the press side by lightly hitting it with a soft-faced hammer. Ensure that the shaft is not knocked out completely.`

### #/texts/1390
- type: `section_header`
- order index: `1327`
- page: `68`
- section title: `Loosening and Removing the Shaft`
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(125.75021362304688, 662.76171875) -> (270.90789794921875, 653.7238159179688)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1390`
- text/content preview: `Loosening and Removing the Shaft`

### #/texts/1391
- type: `text`
- order index: `1328`
- page: `68`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(124.99407196044922, 650.4722900390625) -> (521.2620849609375, 604.9683227539062)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1391`
- text/content preview: `If the shaft has been loosened, it can be pulled out to the front/separator side. The feather key will fall out and remain on the gearbox side. Make sure that the feather key does not fall out of the housing. The key and shaft should be cleaned of dirt and grease residues before they are reinstalled.`

- type: `picture`
- order index: `1329`

- type: `section_header`
- order index: `1330`
- page: `68`
- section title: `Shaft seals in Position`
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(125.1805191040039, 402.0019836425781) -> (216.94244384765625, 394.72808837890625)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1392`
- text/content preview: `Shaft seals in Position`

### #/texts/1393
- type: `text`
- order index: `1331`
- page: `68`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(125.6466293334961, 389.40191650390625) -> (521.261962890625, 367.646728515625)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1393`
- text/content preview: `During shaft removal, be sure not to damage the shaft seats or the holder for the shaft seals located in the rear housing.`

### #/texts/1405
- type: `section_header`
- order index: `1342`
- page: `69`
- section title: `Greasing the Holder`
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(125.30481719970703, 662.7305908203125) -> (210.41688537597656, 653.7238159179688)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1405`
- text/content preview: `Greasing the Holder`

### #/texts/1406
- type: `text`
- order index: `1343`
- page: `69`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(125.00443267822266, 650.1610107421875) -> (521.261962890625, 604.9683227539062)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1406`
- text/content preview: `Once the shaft has been removed, the shaft seals located in the rear housing can be removed. After an inspection or replacement of the shaft, the shaft seals must always be replaced. The holder for the shaft and for the shaft seals must be cleaned and greased prior to inserting the shaft.`

- page: `69`

### #/texts/1408
- type: `section_header`
- order index: `1346`
- page: `69`
- section title: `Feather Key Insertion`
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(125.75021362304688, 362.96722412109375) -> (216.01022338867188, 353.96044921875)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1408`
- text/content preview: `Feather Key Insertion`

### #/texts/1409
- type: `text`
- order index: `1347`
- page: `69`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(124.88013458251953, 350.2810974121094) -> (521.2620849609375, 316.0429992675781)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1409`
- text/content preview: `After cleaning and applying grease, the shaft can be reinserted. During this process, it must be ensured that the bracket for the feather key on the shaft matches the location on the gear unit. The feather key can be introduced through light hitting with a soft-faced hammer.`

### #/texts/1419
- type: `section_header`
- order index: `1355`
- page: `70`
- section title: `Mount the Retaining Plate`
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(125.75021362304688, 662.7305908203125) -> (236.31199645996094, 653.7238159179688)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1419`
- text/content preview: `Mount the Retaining Plate`

### #/texts/1420
- type: `text`
- order index: `1356`
- page: `70`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(125.32553100585938, 650.1610107421875) -> (521.261962890625, 615.8051147460938)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1420`
- text/content preview: `Once the feather key has been inserted flush, the retaining plate can be attached. For corrosion protection, the grease discharged during installation can be distributed on the surface and the excess grease removed.`

### #/texts/1421
- type: `text`
- order index: `1357`
- page: `70`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(124.88013458251953, 612.2422485351562) -> (389.81817626953125, 603.204345703125)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1421`
- text/content preview: `The retaining plate must be attached with the specified torque.`

- raw_ref: `#/texts/1423`
- text/content preview: `Inserting the Rear Shaft Seal Now the two shaft seals can be inserted, ensuring they are greased prior to insertion.`

### #/texts/1432
- type: `section_header`
- order index: `1367`
- page: `71`
- section title: `Inserting the Front Shaft Seal`
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(125.75021362304688, 662.76171875) -> (247.70584106445312, 653.7238159179688)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1432`
- text/content preview: `Inserting the Front Shaft Seal`

### #/texts/1433
- type: `text`
- order index: `1368`
- page: `71`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(125.32553100585938, 650.1610107421875) -> (521.2620849609375, 628.4058227539062)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1433`
- text/content preview: `If the rear shaft is inserted, then the front shaft can be inserted. It must be ensured that careful and correct positioning of the seal is carried out.`

### #/texts/1435
- type: `text`
- order index: `1371`
- page: `71`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(125.15980529785156, 364.08453369140625) -> (521.261962890625, 329.84326171875)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1435`
- text/content preview: `If both shaft seals have been inserted correctly, they seal flush with the housing. When the seals are properly inserted, the installation of the screw and the screen basket can be carried out as previously described.`

- raw_ref: `#/texts/1441`
- text/content preview: `7.3 Vacuum / Transfer Pump`

### #/texts/1442
- type: `section_header`
- order index: `1377`
- page: `72`
- section title: `Safety Precautions 7.3.1`
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(75.0, 636.3333333333334) -> (198.12448120117188, 623.6666666666666)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1442`
- text/content preview: `Safety Precautions 7.3.1`

### #/texts/1443
- type: `text`
- order index: `1378`
- page: `72`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(111.56336212158203, 608.0108642578125) -> (521.2034912109375, 573.8026733398438)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1443`
- text/content preview: `This manual contains basic instructions which must be observed when installing, operating and servicing the vacuum / transfer pump. It is essential for the user / installer or responsible technician to read the manual thoroughly prior to installation and operation.`

### #/texts/1444
- type: `text`
- order index: `1379`
- page: `72`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(111.67729949951172, 557.6390991210938) -> (521.2035522460938, 523.2831420898438)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1444`
- text/content preview: `A copy of the manual must always be at hand where the pump is being used. In addition to the general safety instructions listed in the main manual section on safety, it is necessary to observe the specific safety rules included in the various sections of the manual.`

### #/texts/1445
- type: `text`
- order index: `1380`
- page: `72`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(111.6980209350586, 507.0988464355469) -> (521.2037353515625, 472.763671875)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1445`
- text/content preview: `It shall be the plant operator's responsibility to ensure that all maintenance, inspection and assembly work is performed by authorized and qualified personnel who have adequately familiarized themselves with the subject matter by studying this manual in detail.`

### #/texts/1446
- type: `text`
- order index: `1381`
- page: `72`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(111.67729949951172, 456.7217102050781) -> (521.20361328125, 422.3664245605469)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1446`
- text/content preview: `Any work on the machine shall only be performed when it is at a standstill, it being imperative that the procedure for shutting down the machine described in this manual be followed. Pumps and pumps units which convey hazardous media must be decontaminated.`

### #/texts/1447
- type: `text`
- order index: `1382`
- page: `72`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(112.00875854492188, 406.20098876953125) -> (521.2035522460938, 371.842529296875)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1447`
- text/content preview: `Replacement parts that have not been supplied by the manufacturer are not tested and not approved for use. The installation and usage of such replacement parts can have a negative impact upon the pump characteristics.`

### #/texts/1448
- type: `text`
- order index: `1383`
- page: `72`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(111.56336212158203, 355.6833801269531) -> (485.36468505859375, 346.6454772949219)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1448`
- text/content preview: `The manufacturer is not liable for any damages caused by the usage of non-original parts.`

### #/texts/1458
- type: `text`
- order index: `1391`
- page: `73`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(111.56336212158203, 636.328369140625) -> (521.2037353515625, 614.7258911132812)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1458`
- text/content preview: `The illustrations in these instructions may not always correspond exactly to the installed machine. But they correctly describe the basic structure and the sequence of work steps.`

### #/texts/1459
- type: `text`
- order index: `1392`
- page: `73`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(111.56336212158203, 598.7520141601562) -> (521.2035522460938, 564.3229370117188)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1459`
- text/content preview: `The vacuum / transfer pump is a rotary lobe pump, which is of a positive displacement type. The main components which determine the pumping principle are two lobe rotors rotating in opposite directions within a housing, basically as shown below:`

### #/tables/12
- type: `table`
- order index: `1428`
- page: `74`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(112.92807006835938, 393.95556640625) -> (506.8834228515625, 322.71075439453125)`
- raw_ref: `#/tables/12`
- text/content preview: `| (1) | drive shaft | (5) | hull | |-------|---------------|-------|-------------| | (2) | housing | (6) | lobe rotor | | (3) | shaft | (7) | plate | | (4) | wear plate | (8) | front cover |`

### #/texts/1496
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `1429`
- page: `74`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(117.42068481445312, 301.8723449707031) -> (308.937255859375, 292.87591552734375)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1496`
- text/content preview: ` The drive is attached to the drive shaft (1).`

### #/texts/1497
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `1430`
- page: `74`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(117.42068481445312, 286.03277587890625) -> (469.17626953125, 276.9222106933594)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1497`
- text/content preview: ` The drive shaft (1) is the extension of one of the two shafts (3) of the housing (2).`

### #/texts/1498
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `1431`
- page: `74`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(117.42068481445312, 269.9525146484375) -> (521.1737060546875, 248.24496459960938)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1498`
- text/content preview: ` In the housing (2) the movement of the drive shaft (1) is transmitted to shaft (3b), which turns in the opposite direction.`

### #/texts/1499
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `1432`
- page: `74`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(117.42068481445312, 241.2753143310547) -> (521.173828125, 219.56466674804688)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1499`
- text/content preview: ` The pump housing is formed by the front plate of the housing (2), the two hulls (5), the two wear plates (4), the plate (7) and the cover plate (8).`

### #/texts/1500
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `1433`
- page: `74`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(117.42068481445312, 212.8356170654297) -> (412.9320983886719, 203.72506713867188)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1500`
- text/content preview: ` The lobe rotors (6) transport the medium within the pump housing.`

### #/texts/1501
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `1434`
- page: `74`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(117.42068481445312, 196.75535583496094) -> (481.295166015625, 187.64480590820312)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1501`
- text/content preview: ` Different versions of this pump have different forms and numbers of lobe rotors (6).`

### #/texts/1509
- type: `section_header`
- order index: `1439`
- page: `75`
- section title: `Storage / Transport 7.3.5`
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(75.0, 664.6666666666666) -> (202.17762756347656, 652.0)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1509`
- text/content preview: `Storage / Transport 7.3.5`

### #/texts/1510
- type: `text`
- order index: `1440`
- page: `75`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(111.56336212158203, 636.3594970703125) -> (488.78277587890625, 614.7258911132812)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1510`
- text/content preview: `The pumps are preserved for transport and short-term storage unless specified otherwise. In cases of longer storage, the pumps should be handled as follows until commissioning:`

### #/texts/1511
- type: `section_header`
- order index: `1441`
- page: `75`
- section title: `Storage of Lobe Rotors`
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(111.8637466430664, 598.4407348632812) -> (208.70111083984375, 589.40283203125)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1511`
- text/content preview: `Storage of Lobe Rotors`

### #/texts/1512
- type: `text`
- order index: `1442`
- page: `75`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(111.56336212158203, 585.8400268554688) -> (521.2034912109375, 564.3229370117188)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1512`
- text/content preview: `The following applies to a storage period of up to six months. Standard DIN7716 summarizes detailed information on the storage of rubber products, of which the following is an extract:`

### #/texts/1513
- type: `section_header`
- order index: `1443`
- page: `75`
- section title: `General`
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(112.09162139892578, 548.01171875) -> (146.34568786621094, 540.7689208984375)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1513`
- text/content preview: `General`

### #/texts/1514
- type: `text`
- order index: `1444`
- page: `75`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(111.8637466430664, 535.442138671875) -> (521.203369140625, 488.4854736328125)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1514`
- text/content preview: `Most rubber products may change their physical properties under unfavourable conditions or if treated improperly, which will result in a shorter lifetime. They can become unsuitable for use through excessive hardening, ageing, degeneration or permanent deformation, or because of blistering, cracking or other damage...`

### #/texts/1515
- type: `text`
- order index: `1445`
- page: `75`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(111.8637466430664, 484.9226379394531) -> (521.203369140625, 463.1623840332031)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1515`
- text/content preview: `These changes may occur under the influence of oxygen, ozone, heat, light, humidity, solvents or because of storing the products under load.`

### #/texts/1516
- type: `text`
- order index: `1446`
- page: `75`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(111.54264831542969, 459.6001892089844) -> (521.2032470703125, 438.08251953125)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1516`
- text/content preview: `If stored and treated properly, rubber products will retain their properties even during long term storage (some years) with little change. However, this does not apply to uncured rubber compounds.`

### #/texts/1517
- type: `section_header`
- order index: `1447`
- page: `75`
- section title: `Storage Environment:`
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(111.5115737915039, 421.34649658203125) -> (203.72926330566406, 412.76513671875)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1517`
- text/content preview: `Storage Environment:`

### #/texts/1518
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `1448`
- page: `75`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(117.42068481445312, 393.2430419921875) -> (521.173583984375, 371.4815368652344)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1518`
- text/content preview: ` The environment in which rubber products are being kept must be cool, dry, free of dust and naturally ventilated.`

### #/texts/1519
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `1449`
- page: `75`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(117.42068481445312, 364.5595397949219) -> (521.1735229492188, 344.6886901855469)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1519`
- text/content preview: ` Rubber products must not be stored in the open, not even in an area sheltered from the weather.`

### #/texts/1520
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `1450`
- page: `75`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(117.42068481445312, 335.9715270996094) -> (521.173583984375, 314.3646545410156)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1520`
- text/content preview: ` Rubber products should be stored at temperatures above minus 10 °C and not more than plus 15 °C. Storerooms should not be damp and there should be no condensation.`

### #/texts/1521
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `1451`
- page: `75`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(117.42068481445312, 307.32232666015625) -> (514.54443359375, 298.284423828125)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1521`
- text/content preview: ` Rubber products should be stored in an environment offering a relative humidity under 65 %.`

### #/texts/1522
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `1452`
- page: `75`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(117.42068481445312, 291.3312683105469) -> (521.1735229492188, 269.7243957519531)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1522`
- text/content preview: ` Rubber products must be protected against light, particularly direct sunlight or high UV artificial.`

### #/texts/1523
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `1453`
- page: `75`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(117.42068481445312, 262.8023986816406) -> (521.17333984375, 241.16122436523438)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1523`
- text/content preview: ` Rubber products should be kept away from forced ventilation and draughts; under these conditions they should be wrapped.`

### #/texts/1524
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `1454`
- page: `75`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(117.42068481445312, 234.12522888183594) -> (521.1737670898438, 199.88394165039062)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1524`
- text/content preview: ` As ozone is very aggressive and harmful to rubber products, they should not be stored in the same room with equipment likely to produce ozone, e.g. electric motors or other equipment which could electrically discharge or cause sparks.`

### #/texts/1525
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `1455`
- page: `75`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(117.42068481445312, 192.81040954589844) -> (521.1736450195312, 172.96759033203125)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1525`
- text/content preview: ` Rubber products should not be stored together with solvents, oil, grease, lubricants or any chemicals.`

- page: `75`
- section title: ``

### #/texts/1535
- type: `section_header`
- order index: `1462`
- page: `76`
- section title: `Installation Instructions 7.3.6`
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(75.33333333333333, 664.3333333333334) -> (220.41680908203125, 652.0)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1535`
- text/content preview: `Installation Instructions 7.3.6`

### #/texts/1536
- type: `text`
- order index: `1463`
- page: `76`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(111.91553497314453, 636.3594970703125) -> (521.2035522460938, 614.7258911132812)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1536`
- text/content preview: `Unless specified otherwise the pump is designed for a horizontal mounting, bolted securely to a sub-structure. The vent plug of the housing must always be mounted at the top of the gear box.`

- raw_ref: `#/texts/1538`
- text/content preview: `Pumps supplied as a machine compete with baseplate and drive will be aligned when assembled in the factory.`

### #/texts/1553
- type: `text`
- order index: `1482`
- page: `76`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(313.644287109375, 532.321044921875) -> (521.1781005859375, 460.2839050292969)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1553`
- text/content preview: `After bolting the baseplate to the foundation, remove the coupling guard and check the alignment of the coupling with a ruler and re-align if necessary. There is danger of distorting the baseplate if the foundation is uneven which will result in misalignment.`

### #/texts/1554
- type: `text`
- order index: `1483`
- page: `76`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(313.6339416503906, 443.99810791015625) -> (521.1781005859375, 422.3664245605469)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1554`
- text/content preview: `Permitted maximum misalignment tolerances for the coupling between drive and pump are:`

### #/texts/1555
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `1484`
- page: `76`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(313.9757385253906, 412.63226318359375) -> (520.8722534179688, 403.5216979980469)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1555`
- text/content preview: ` Radial shift (1): 1% of the largest diameter (2)`

### #/texts/1556
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `1485`
- page: `76`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(313.9757385253906, 399.4336853027344) -> (463.5923156738281, 390.3231201171875)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1556`
- text/content preview: ` Angular misalignment (3): 1°30'`

- type: `text`

### #/texts/1558
- type: `text`
- order index: `1488`
- page: `76`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(426.6666666666667, 703.0) -> (524.3333333333333, 694.6666666666666)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1558`
- text/content preview: `FundamentalMarineDevelopments`

### #/texts/1559
- type: `text`
- order index: `1489`
- page: `76`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(314.0004577636719, 282.7237854003906) -> (521.1406860351562, 248.60598754882812)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1559`
- text/content preview: `The lobe pumps are reversible and therefore direction of rotation can be selected to provide for the required direction of flow.`

### #/texts/1560
- type: `text`
- order index: `1490`
- page: `76`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(314.0004577636719, 232.3202362060547) -> (507.57159423828125, 211.169921875)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1560`
- text/content preview: `There are two ways to change the direction of rotation/flow:`

### #/texts/1561
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `1491`
- page: `76`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(314.4562072753906, 200.88169860839844) -> (521.0660400390625, 168.2904052734375)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1561`
- text/content preview: ` Pumps with one drive shaft: by changing the direction of rotation of the drive`

### #/texts/1562
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `1492`
- page: `76`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(314.4562072753906, 159.7216033935547) -> (521.0659790039062, 125.4772720336914)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1562`
- text/content preview: ` Pumps with two drive shafts: by switching the cardan shaft (3) from drive shaft (1) to (2)`

### #/texts/1567
- type: `section_header`
- order index: `1493`
- page: `77`
- section title: `Environmentally`

- type: `section_header`

### #/texts/1569
- type: `section_header`
- order index: `1495`
- page: `77`
- section title: `Engineered`
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(72.0, 719.3333333333334) -> (136.66666666666669, 705.0)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1569`
- text/content preview: `Engineered`

### #/texts/1570
- type: `section_header`
- order index: `1496`
- page: `77`
- section title: `7.3.6.3 Piping System`
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(77.39595794677734, 661.93017578125) -> (190.1657257080078, 652.6025390625)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1570`
- text/content preview: `7.3.6.3 Piping System`

### #/texts/1571
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `1497`
- page: `77`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(130.61607360839844, 633.0003051757812) -> (429.67205810546875, 623.96240234375)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1571`
- text/content preview: ` Clean the pipework and rinse thoroughly before installing the pump.`

### #/texts/1572
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `1498`
- page: `77`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(130.61607360839844, 616.8927001953125) -> (521.2373657226562, 571.8477172851562)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1572`
- text/content preview: ` Arrange the inlet and outlet pipework so that when the pump is not running, the pumped media is still present before and after the pump (pump remains flooded); sufficient pumped media should remain inside the pump head to lubricate the pump head components during restart.`

### #/texts/1573
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `1499`
- page: `77`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(130.61607360839844, 563.1617431640625) -> (521.2372436523438, 528.8057861328125)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1573`
- text/content preview: ` Connect the pipework ensuring sufficient pipe supports are used so that no external forces or stress act on the pump. Where required pulsation dampers or compensators can be used between the pump and pipework`

### #/texts/1574
- type: `text`
- order index: `1500`
- page: `77`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(124.88013458251953, 512.71484375) -> (521.2618408203125, 491.0035705566406)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1574`
- text/content preview: `The maximum allowable twisting loads (Fx, Fy, Fz) and bending loads (Mx, My, Mz) for the pump inlet and outlet connections have to comply with the requirements of API 676 and EN ISO 14847:`

### #/tables/13
- type: `table`
- order index: `1501`
- page: `77`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(124.32420349121094, 476.3688659667969) -> (367.0370788574219, 302.80767822265625)`
- raw_ref: `#/tables/13`
- text/content preview: `| Standard nominal diameter [DN] | Fx, Fy, Fz [N] | Mx, My, Mz [Nm] | |----------------------------------|------------------|-------------------| | 50 | 650 | 350 | | 65 | 850 | 435 | | 80 | 1040 | 560 | | 100 | 1300 | 700 | | 125 | 1700 | 865 | | 150 | 1950 | 1050 | | 200 | 2600 | 1400 | | 250 | 3250 | 1750 | | 300...`

### #/texts/1575
- type: `section_header`
- order index: `1502`
- page: `77`
- section title: `7.3.6.4 Electrical Connection`
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(77.39595794677734, 283.6686096191406) -> (223.04129028320312, 275.7959289550781)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1575`
- text/content preview: `7.3.6.4 Electrical Connection`

### #/texts/1576
- type: `text`
- order index: `1503`
- page: `77`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(125.6466293334961, 257.7299499511719) -> (521.2620849609375, 223.40261840820312)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1576`
- text/content preview: `Electric current can kill or cause serious injuries. All work relating to the electrical suppl should be carried out by authorized and qualified personnel and should be in compliance with the requirements of the relevant national regulations.`

### #/texts/1577
- type: `text`
- order index: `1504`
- page: `77`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(125.1805191040039, 207.24034118652344) -> (521.2618408203125, 187.24920654296875)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1577`
- text/content preview: `In particular for control systems the latest version of the EC-Directive for Machinery, Annex I, Section 1.2 Controls should be observed.`

### #/texts/1578
- type: `text`
- order index: `1505`
- page: `77`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(133.1848907470703, 165.01072692871094) -> (475.38128662109375, 133.93603515625)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1578`
- text/content preview: `WARNING: Follow all local and national electrical codes for all wiring. A qualified electrician must perform all wiring. Failure to comply may result in severe personal injury or property damage`

- raw_ref: `#/texts/1589`

- type: `section_header`
- order index: `1516`
- page: `78`
- section title: `7.3.7`
- section path: ``

- raw_ref: `#/texts/1590`
- text/content preview: `7.3.7`

### #/texts/1591
- type: `text`
- order index: `1517`
- page: `78`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(111.89366149902344, 661.93017578125) -> (152.3013458251953, 652.6025390625)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1591`
- text/content preview: `Start-Up`

### #/pictures/216
- type: `picture`
- order index: `1518`
- page: `78`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(76.1294174194336, 638.9557037353516) -> (116.74000549316406, 597.5992431640625)`
- raw_ref: `#/pictures/216`
- text/content preview: ``

### #/texts/1592
- type: `text`
- order index: `1519`
- page: `78`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(133.1856231689453, 626.6531982421875) -> (476.6385498046875, 608.57177734375)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1592`
- text/content preview: `Take Note: Never run the pump dry! - A few rotations in dry condition will damage the rotor lobes.`

### #/texts/1593
- type: `text`
- order index: `1520`
- page: `78`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(112.43344116210938, 573.2392578125) -> (263.3916015625, 564.2013549804688)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1593`
- text/content preview: `Pay strict attention to the following:`

### #/texts/1594
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `1521`
- page: `78`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(117.42068481445312, 554.5230712890625) -> (441.6238708496094, 545.4851684570312)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1594`
- text/content preview: ` Before starting up for the first time, fill the pump with medium to prime it.`

### #/texts/1595
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `1522`
- page: `78`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(117.42068481445312, 538.4104614257812) -> (368.1852722167969, 529.4036865234375)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1595`
- text/content preview: ` Priming is vital to initially lubricate the rubber lobe parts.`

### #/texts/1596
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `1523`
- page: `78`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(117.42068481445312, 522.481689453125) -> (334.93597412109375, 513.4437866210938)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1596`
- text/content preview: ` Open valves and vents before starting the pump.`

### #/texts/1597
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `1524`
- page: `78`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(117.42068481445312, 506.4001159667969) -> (462.4434814453125, 497.3622131347656)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1597`
- text/content preview: ` Check the direction of rotation and flow by briefly switching on the pump drive.`

### #/pictures/217
- type: `picture`
- order index: `1525`
- page: `78`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(76.37296295166016, 480.34637451171875) -> (119.75958251953125, 441.4966125488281)`
- raw_ref: `#/pictures/217`
- text/content preview: ``

### #/texts/1598
- type: `text`
- order index: `1526`
- page: `78`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(133.35025024414062, 469.456298828125) -> (476.54644775390625, 449.9005432128906)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1598`
- text/content preview: `CAUTION: This a positive displacement pump, which is capable of generating pressures that could cause damage – in extreme cases the bursting of pipes or vessels.`

### #/pictures/218
- type: `picture`
- order index: `1527`
- page: `78`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(76.6649169921875, 427.9152526855469) -> (119.52375030517578, 389.54290771484375)`
- raw_ref: `#/pictures/218`
- text/content preview: ``

### #/texts/1599
- type: `text`
- order index: `1528`
- page: `78`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(133.36892700195312, 418.094970703125) -> (476.9762878417969, 398.4163818359375)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1599`
- text/content preview: `CAUTION: Possible damage to the pump by exceeding the pressure rating of the pump head and inlet and outlet connections. Never run the pump against a closed valve.`

### #/texts/1600
- type: `section_header`
- order index: `1529`
- page: `78`
- section title: `Temporary Shutdown 7.3.8`
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(75.33333333333333, 357.6666666666667) -> (212.423095703125, 345.3333333333333)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1600`
- text/content preview: `Temporary Shutdown 7.3.8`

### #/texts/1601
- type: `section_header`
- order index: `1530`
- page: `78`
- section title: `General`
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(111.98804473876953, 329.4925842285156) -> (146.55284118652344, 322.24981689453125)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1601`
- text/content preview: `General`

### #/texts/1602
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `1531`
- page: `78`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(117.42068481445312, 313.68096923828125) -> (504.18658447265625, 304.64306640625)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1602`
- text/content preview: ` Stop the pump by turning off the power and make sure it cannot be turned on accidently.`

### #/texts/1603
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `1532`
- page: `78`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(117.42068481445312, 297.6038513183594) -> (521.1734619140625, 275.9658508300781)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1603`
- text/content preview: ` Drain the pump head and if necessary, wash through if there is a risk of freezing or if the medium may solidify.`

### #/texts/1604
- type: `section_header`
- order index: `1533`
- page: `78`
- section title: `Standby Pumps`
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(111.8637466430664, 259.7692565917969) -> (178.04132080078125, 250.76248168945312)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1604`
- text/content preview: `Standby Pumps`

### #/texts/1605
- type: `text`
- order index: `1534`
- page: `78`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(111.84303283691406, 247.0800018310547) -> (521.20361328125, 225.44509887695312)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1605`
- text/content preview: `Where a standby pump is installed as a back-up for the main pump and it is likely to stand idle for an extended period then it is recommended that it is operated from time to time.`

### #/texts/1606
- type: `section_header`
- order index: `1535`
- page: `78`
- section title: `Maintenance 7.3.9`
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(75.0, 209.33333333333337) -> (173.9181671142578, 197.0)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1606`
- text/content preview: `Maintenance 7.3.9`

### #/texts/1607
- type: `section_header`
- order index: `1536`
- page: `78`
- section title: `7.3.9.1 Pump in General`
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(77.39595794677734, 178.78591918945312) -> (203.11331176757812, 168.99581909179688)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1607`
- text/content preview: `7.3.9.1 Pump in General`

### #/texts/1608
- type: `text`
- order index: `1537`
- page: `78`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(124.88013458251953, 152.7644500732422) -> (521.2620849609375, 131.00296020507812)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1608`
- text/content preview: `The pump head should be regularly washed through or rinsed out if sediment from the pumped media is likely to settle out in the pump head.`

- type: `picture`
- order index: `1538`
- page: `78`
- section title: ``

- type: `text`
- order index: `1539`
- page: `78`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(82.33333333333333, 99.33333333333337) -> (111.66666666666666, 79.33333333333337)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1609`
- text/content preview: `A`

### #/texts/1610
- type: `text`
- order index: `1540`
- page: `78`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(131.92333984375, 111.6780014038086) -> (491.11785888671875, 80.53485107421875)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1610`
- text/content preview: `WARNING: Hands can be crushed by moving parts! Before opening the pump head (removing the cover plate) turn off the power supply and ensure it cannot be turned on accidently (remove fuse).`

### #/texts/1619
- type: `section_header`
- order index: `1546`
- page: `79`
- section title: `Engineered`
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(72.0, 719.3333333333334) -> (136.66666666666669, 705.0)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1619`
- text/content preview: `Engineered`

### #/texts/1620
- type: `section_header`
- order index: `1547`
- page: `79`
- section title: `7.3.9.2 Lubricating the Shaft Seals`
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(77.39595794677734, 662.4264526367188) -> (246.79727172851562, 652.6025390625)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1620`
- text/content preview: `7.3.9.2 Lubricating the Shaft Seals`

### #/texts/1621
- type: `text`
- order index: `1548`
- page: `79`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(124.88013458251953, 636.3594970703125) -> (521.261962890625, 614.7258911132812)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1621`
- text/content preview: `The pump shaft seals are lubricated with grease via two grease points on the side of the gear housing, with two grease outlet points on the opposite side.`

### #/texts/1622
- type: `text`
- order index: `1549`
- page: `79`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(125.75021362304688, 598.4096069335938) -> (510.2684326171875, 576.8021240234375)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1622`
- text/content preview: `Lubrication should always be carried out while the pump is running – never during standstill . For this purpose, a high duty water-resistant grease, type NLGI – class 2, should be applied.`

### #/texts/1623
- type: `section_header`
- order index: `1550`
- page: `79`
- section title: `Lubrication Schedule`
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(125.75021362304688, 560.6124877929688) -> (213.7314453125, 553.3696899414062)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1623`
- text/content preview: `Lubrication Schedule`

### #/texts/1624
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `1551`
- page: `79`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(130.61607360839844, 534.8392333984375) -> (290.14910888671875, 525.8013305664062)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1624`
- text/content preview: ` After every 350 hours of operation`

### #/texts/1625
- type: `text`
- order index: `1552`
- page: `79`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(125.13908386230469, 509.52117919921875) -> (521.2618408203125, 487.8825378417969)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1625`
- text/content preview: `NB: The filling quantity with the hand-lever grease gun should not exceed 2 to 3 strokes per grease nipple.`

### #/texts/1626
- type: `text`
- order index: `1553`
- page: `79`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(125.75021362304688, 471.80816650390625) -> (272.6687316894531, 462.8013916015625)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1626`
- text/content preview: `Recommended Lubricating Grease:`

### #/pictures/221
- type: `picture`
- order index: `1554`
- page: `79`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(256.1670837402344, 404.9287414550781) -> (311.8138122558594, 371.1771240234375)`

- text/content preview: ``

### #/texts/1627
- type: `text`
- order index: `1555`
- page: `79`
- section title: ``

### #/texts/1662
- type: `text`
- order index: `1590`
- page: `80`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(124.88013458251953, 467.2316589355469) -> (427.9358825683594, 445.5241394042969)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1662`
- text/content preview: `The deaeration screw (1) has always to be at the top position. The magnetic oil drain screw (3) has always to be on the lowest position.`

### #/texts/1663
- type: `section_header`
- order index: `1591`
- page: `80`
- section title: `Draining`
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(125.75021362304688, 428.78497314453125) -> (161.94122314453125, 420.20361328125)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1663`
- text/content preview: `Draining`

### #/texts/1664
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `1592`
- page: `80`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(142.38014221191406, 410.5929260253906) -> (415.47601318359375, 401.48236083984375)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1664`
- text/content preview: ` Open the magnetic drain screw (3) and let all the oil flow out.`

### #/texts/1665
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `1593`
- page: `80`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(142.38014221191406, 394.6330261230469) -> (400.45684814453125, 385.5224609375)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1665`
- text/content preview: ` Clean the magnetic oil drain screw (3) at every oil change.`

### #/texts/1666
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `1594`
- page: `80`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(142.38014221191406, 378.5559387207031) -> (319.3533630371094, 369.44537353515625)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1666`
- text/content preview: ` Close the magnetic oil drain screw (3).`

### #/texts/1667
- type: `section_header`
- order index: `1595`
- page: `80`
- section title: `Filling`
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(125.75021362304688, 350.37347412109375) -> (151.27243041992188, 341.36669921875)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1667`
- text/content preview: `Filling`

### #/texts/1668
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `1596`
- page: `80`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(142.38014221191406, 331.63250732421875) -> (502.2765197753906, 322.5219421386719)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1668`
- text/content preview: ` Fill through the deaeration screw (1) until approx. the middle of the sight glass (2).`

### #/texts/1669
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `1597`
- page: `80`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``

- raw_ref: `#/texts/1669`
- text/content preview: ` Close the deaeration screw (1).`

### #/texts/1731
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `1655`
- page: `83`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(130.61607360839844, 209.11279296875) -> (501.66021728515625, 199.76358032226562)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1731`
- text/content preview: ` Remove screws/spring washers (5030/5040) or hex nuts/spring washers (5035/5040).`

### #/texts/1732
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `1656`
- page: `83`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(130.61607360839844, 192.79075622558594) -> (276.6837158203125, 183.68020629882812)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1732`
- text/content preview: ` Remove the cover plate (5000).`

### #/texts/1733
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `1657`
- page: `83`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(130.61607360839844, 176.8308563232422) -> (385.0287780761719, 167.72030639648438)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1733`
- text/content preview: ` Remove screws (2070 with O-ring (2075) and fuse (2260).`

### #/texts/1734
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `1658`
- page: `83`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(130.61607360839844, 160.7568817138672) -> (335.82806396484375, 151.64633178710938)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1734`
- text/content preview: ` Remove end parts (2080) with O-rings (2085).`

### #/texts/1735
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `1659`
- page: `83`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(130.61607360839844, 144.91099548339844) -> (476.9630432128906, 135.80044555664062)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1735`
- text/content preview: ` Pull off the lobe rotors (2010) separately using a lobe extractor (pull-off device).`

- text/content preview: `Assembly is a reversal of the above disassembly procedure, but additionally:`

### #/texts/1746
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `1667`

- section title: ``
- section path: ``

- raw_ref: `#/texts/1746`
- text/content preview: ` In case of visible wear of the housings, crescents or wear plates these should be replaced.`

- raw_ref: `#/texts/1747`
- text/content preview: ` Fasten screws/nuts with a torque wrench as given in the following table:`

### #/texts/1882
- type: `text`
- order index: `1801`
- page: `88`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(112.01911926269531, 153.2394256591797) -> (521.20361328125, 131.60140991210938)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1882`
- text/content preview: `Close-coupled, centrifugal pumps; electric motor with extended shaft directly connected to the pump with open impeller.`

### #/texts/1883
- type: `text`
- order index: `1802`
- page: `88`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(112.00875854492188, 128.11509704589844) -> (518.6553955078125, 106.40438842773438)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1883`
- text/content preview: `Intended use for moderately dirty liquids (maximum size of solids: 4 mm), non-explosive, nonaggressive for the pump materials. Liquid temperature from -10 °C to +90 °C.`

- type: `picture`
- order index: `1808`
- page: `89`

### #/texts/1892
- type: `text`
- order index: `1809`
- page: `89`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(135.8075408935547, 627.0143432617188) -> (490.28936767578125, 607.4603271484375)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1892`
- text/content preview: `Take Note: When first starting, check the direction of rotation is as per the arrow on the casing Never run the pump dry, only start the pump after filling with liquid and venting the case.`

### #/texts/1893
- type: `text`
- order index: `1810`
- page: `89`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(112.43344116210938, 569.16064453125) -> (263.3916015625, 560.1227416992188)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1893`
- text/content preview: `Pay strict attention to the following:`

### #/texts/1894
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `1811`
- page: `89`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(117.42068481445312, 550.3228759765625) -> (334.93597412109375, 541.2849731445312)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1894`
- text/content preview: ` Open valves and vents before starting the pump.`

### #/texts/1895
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `1812`
- page: `89`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(117.42068481445312, 534.2413330078125) -> (507.5011901855469, 525.2034301757812)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1895`
- text/content preview: ` Before starting up for the first time, fill the pump and vent the casing using the vent fitted.`

### #/texts/1896
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `1813`
- page: `89`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(117.42068481445312, 518.4030151367188) -> (462.4434814453125, 509.3650817871094)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1896`
- text/content preview: ` Check the direction of rotation and flow by briefly switching on the pump drive.`

### #/texts/1897
- type: `list_item`
- order index: `1814`
- page: `89`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(117.36410522460938, 502.9193115234375) -> (521.1739501953125, 470.44903564453125)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1897`
- text/content preview: ` If the pump discharge piping is routed above the liquor tank a non return valve will be required to prevent back filling of the food waste system, a valve suitable for water with sediment should be selected.`

### #/texts/1995
- type: `text`
- order index: `1910`
- page: `93`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(111.56336212158203, 636.3594970703125) -> (521.2037353515625, 589.40283203125)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/1995`
- text/content preview: `The actuators are suited to the operation of ball and butterfly valves with a 90° rotation angle. They feature a water-resistant body with overload protection and a heating device against condensation formation. Power is transferred to the driveshaft via a self-stopping reduction worm gear to achieve precision control.`

### #/texts/2067
- type: `text`
- order index: `1978`
- page: `95`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``

- raw_ref: `#/texts/2067`
- text/content preview: `Manually set the valve in the closed position. Loosen screw (1) on the lower cam (2) and adjust the cam to contact the lower micro switch (3). If the mechanical stop prevents the cam rotating sufficiently turn the mechanical stop screw 2 turns counterclockwise from the closed position and lock it off. After adjustme...`

### #/texts/2068
- type: `section_header`
- order index: `1979`
- page: `95`

### #/texts/2069
- type: `text`
- order index: `1980`
- page: `95`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``

- raw_ref: `#/texts/2069`
- text/content preview: `Loosen screw (4) on cam (5) and adjust the cam to contact the micro switch (6). After adjustment of cam (5) secure the cam with the screw (4).`

### #/texts/2073
- type: `section_header`
- order index: `1985`
- page: `95`
- section title: `Adjustment of 1st "OPEN" Limit Switch`
- section path: ``

### #/texts/2074
- type: `text`
- order index: `1986`
- page: `95`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(111.91553497314453, 334.0360107421875) -> (521.2035522460938, 288.885986328125)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/2074`
- text/content preview: `Manually set the valve in the open position. Loosen screw (1) on the upper cam (2) and adjust the cam to contact the upper micro switch (3). If the mechanical stop prevents the cam rotating sufficiently turn the mechanical stop screw 2 turns counterclockwise from the closed position and lock it off.`

### #/texts/2075
- type: `section_header`
- order index: `1987`
- page: `95`
- section title: `Adjustment of 2 nd "OPEN" Limit Switch`

- raw_ref: `#/texts/2075`
- text/content preview: `Adjustment of 2 nd "OPEN" Limit Switch`

### #/texts/2076
- type: `text`
- order index: `1988`
- page: `95`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(111.98804473876953, 258.3150634765625) -> (521.2034912109375, 236.7153778076172)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/2076`
- text/content preview: `Loosen screw (4) on cam (5) and adjust the cam to contact the micro switch (6). After adjustment of cam (5) secure the cam with the screw (4).`

### #/texts/2093
- type: `section_header`
- order index: `2005`
- page: `96`
- section title: `Emergency Operation 7.5.7`
- section path: ``

### #/texts/2094
- type: `text`
- order index: `2006`
- page: `96`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(111.6980209350586, 636.3594970703125) -> (521.2034912109375, 614.7258911132812)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/2094`
- text/content preview: `In the case of a power or control failure, or a fault in the actuator, the actuator has the capability for manual operation. Take care about the turning direction of the manual override.`

### #/texts/2095
- type: `text`
- order index: `2007`
- page: `96`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(111.56336212158203, 598.4407348632812) -> (521.20361328125, 564.3229370117188)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/2095`
- text/content preview: `The actuator is fitted with an Allen key on the underside, it fits in the socket on the end of the gear shaft. To close the actuator, turn the Allen key clockwise and to open the actuator turn the Allen key counterclockwise.`

### #/pictures/264
- type: `picture`
- order index: `2008`
- page: `96`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``

### #/texts/2096
- type: `text`
- order index: `2009`
- page: `96`
- section title: ``
- section path: ``
- bbox: `(132.97645568847656, 540.8547973632812) -> (488.5826416015625, 511.3731994628906)`
- raw_ref: `#/texts/2096`
- text/content preview: `CAUTION: When finished with manual operation, remove the Allen key from the gear shaft to prevent the injury of persons or the damage of the actuator by normal operation of the electric actuator.`

- type: `text`

- page_start/page_end: `7`
- order_index: `83`
- effective heading_level: ``
- heading level source: ``
- text preview: `The technical manual must be treated confidential. It is distributed exclusively for those persons working on and with the plant. All content-related information, text, drawings, pictures, and other representations are protected as defin...`

### el_26cdc256f14c4bc1bc049f4696667af4
- type: `text`

- resolved section path: `1 General > 1.6 Copyright Protection`
- page_start/page_end: `7`
- order_index: `84`
- effective heading_level: ``
- heading level source: ``
- text preview: `It is not permitted to pass on the technical manual to third parties, to copy it in any way or form even extracts - or to recycle and/or communicate the contents without written permission of FMD (the manufacturer).`

### el_0a48e4aadbe94190b9a9546d99a1a077
- type: `text`

- heading level source: ``
- text preview: `This technical manual has been compiled while taking into consideration the applicable regulations, current technology and the experiences and developments of many years. FMD assumes no liability for any damages or malfunctions that occu...`

### el_ea0493dc241e4ad5aa1dac4b3a7d9dbc
- type: `text`

- order_index: `94`
- effective heading_level: ``
- heading level source: ``
- text preview: `All obligations of the manufacturer are defined in the purchase contract, which also includes the entire and sole valid warranty agreement. The contents of the technical manual will not amplify or restrict any contractual warranty.`

### el_bcfbc4d4192a4913aa01077b6f3b4c99
- type: `text`
- section id: `sec_3b875d06e48d4541a689627daba5c4bc`
- resolved section path: `2 Safety`
- page_start/page_end: `9`
- order_index: `101`
- effective heading_level: ``
- heading level source: ``
- text preview: `This section includes instructions that must be observed during installation, operation, and maintenance of the equipment.`

### el_05afa63a171d4f24b0db7325c25348da
- type: `text`
- section id: `sec_3b875d06e48d4541a689627daba5c4bc`
- resolved section path: `2 Safety`
- page_start/page_end: `9`
- order_index: `102`
- effective heading_level: ``
- heading level source: ``
- text preview: `The operation instructions must be read by any contractor, operator or person prior to installation, start-up, operation, or maintenance and must always be available.`

### el_9be25c08628f4578bfb8a726c4eb34ae
- type: `section_header`
- section id: `sec_87826e56f19b435a9aada7b3aa368d2b`
- resolved section path: `2 Safety > 2.1 General Operating Information`
- page_start/page_end: `9`
- order_index: `103`
- effective heading_level: `2`
- heading level source: `toc_page_range`
- text preview: `2.1 General Operating Information`

### el_199313f1c7ef4fc49e8c03fddb02a436
- type: `text`
- section id: `sec_87826e56f19b435a9aada7b3aa368d2b`
- resolved section path: `2 Safety > 2.1 General Operating Information`
- page_start/page_end: `9`
- order_index: `104`
- effective heading_level: ``
- heading level source: ``
- text preview: `Personnel charged with installation, operation, maintenance, inspection, and assembly must be appropriately qualified. Before carrying out any work which involves complete or partial opening of the plant, the person responsible must ensu...`

### el_f10b20919c144fcf87edf7fed03abf5d
- type: `text`
- section id: `sec_87826e56f19b435a9aada7b3aa368d2b`
- resolved section path: `2 Safety > 2.1 General Operating Information`
- page_start/page_end: `9`
- order_index: `105`
- effective heading_level: ``
- heading level source: ``
- text preview: `Before restarting the plant, all guards must be in place.`

### el_fe69b84dc3da4c68aa2038950a29699d
- type: `section_header`
- section id: `sec_f084aa27c604470caf5b785191f23d91`
- resolved section path: `2 Safety > 2.2 Operator Safety`
- page_start/page_end: `9`
- order_index: `106`
- effective heading_level: `2`
- heading level source: `toc_page_range`
- text preview: `2.2 Operator Safety`

### el_47cc9a7c4dd64416b983cb85a4510e5e
- type: `list_item`
- section id: `sec_f084aa27c604470caf5b785191f23d91`
- resolved section path: `2 Safety > 2.2 Operator Safety`
- page_start/page_end: `9`
- order_index: `107`
- effective heading_level: ``
- heading level source: ``
- text preview: `Do not operate the equipment without the proper instructions as given within this manual.`

### el_af7f629638a5460e8158a967705135c4
- type: `section_header`
- section id: `sec_c5e5f491b8284549b7e2097d94597680`
- resolved section path: `2 Safety > 2.2 Operator Safety > · WHEN IN DOUBT ASK`
- page_start/page_end: `9`
- order_index: `108`
- effective heading_level: `3`
- heading level source: `toc_context`
- text preview: `· WHEN IN DOUBT ASK`

### el_681e208441af4a4198722c7900ddd06a
- type: `list_item`
- section id: `sec_c5e5f491b8284549b7e2097d94597680`
- resolved section path: `2 Safety > 2.2 Operator Safety > · WHEN IN DOUBT ASK`
- page_start/page_end: `9`
- order_index: `109`
- effective heading_level: ``
- heading level source: ``
- text preview: `Remember that the equipment operates automatically and can start and stop at any time.`

### el_bb3aacfdeecc4525a56eebd319f016f4
- type: `list_item`
- section id: `sec_c5e5f491b8284549b7e2097d94597680`
- resolved section path: `2 Safety > 2.2 Operator Safety > · WHEN IN DOUBT ASK`
- page_start/page_end: `9`
- order_index: `110`
- effective heading_level: ``
- heading level source: ``
- text preview: `Isolate any equipment before working on it, or before asking others to work on it.`

### el_aa051558a5cb498b97fedba0d097b559
- type: `list_item`
- section id: `sec_c5e5f491b8284549b7e2097d94597680`
- resolved section path: `2 Safety > 2.2 Operator Safety > · WHEN IN DOUBT ASK`
- page_start/page_end: `9`
- order_index: `111`
- effective heading_level: ``
- heading level source: ``
- text preview: `When opening a component of the system such as a pump, pipe or housing WEAR PPE including, but not limited to, protective clothing, gloves and a face shield.`

### el_e39fb56ee513493c869d83f7c4af0d73
- type: `list_item`
- section id: `sec_c5e5f491b8284549b7e2097d94597680`
- resolved section path: `2 Safety > 2.2 Operator Safety > · WHEN IN DOUBT ASK`
- page_start/page_end: `9`
- order_index: `112`
- effective heading_level: ``
- heading level source: ``
- text preview: `DO NOT ASK a tradesman to repair the equipment if they may come in contact with the process stream by doing so.`

### el_3bda1ab5f7b1404fbaf30b31d91d8cac
- type: `list_item`
- section id: `sec_c5e5f491b8284549b7e2097d94597680`
- resolved section path: `2 Safety > 2.2 Operator Safety > · WHEN IN DOUBT ASK`
- page_start/page_end: `9`
- order_index: `113`
- effective heading_level: ``
- heading level source: ``
- text preview: `MAKE IT SAFE FIRST flush out bio-residues from the pumps and pipelines and isolate the equipment. Many pipes contain wastewater even when shut down for some time.`

### el_068ff19fd62f4a3d9b3a905b28849d22
- type: `list_item`
- section id: `sec_c5e5f491b8284549b7e2097d94597680`
- resolved section path: `2 Safety > 2.2 Operator Safety > · WHEN IN DOUBT ASK`
- page_start/page_end: `9`
- order_index: `114`
- effective heading_level: ``
- heading level source: ``
- text preview: `Always electrically isolate the equipment and lock out the local isolator BEFORE you dismantle any electrical equipment. Remember that equipment can be turned on by accident.`

### el_6f1cd9636b524a27b7c37f2f7b58d089
- type: `list_item`
- section id: `sec_c5e5f491b8284549b7e2097d94597680`
- resolved section path: `2 Safety > 2.2 Operator Safety > · WHEN IN DOUBT ASK`
- page_start/page_end: `9`
- order_index: `115`
- effective heading_level: ``
- heading level source: ``
- text preview: `Do not undertake any works unless the consequences are carefully thought through.`

### el_4e2e4452e18e44ac96e7a0b9d00bedd3
- type: `section_header`
- section id: `sec_5ed85322082f4fbaa119edbe1d632ac6`
- resolved section path: `2 Safety > 2.3 Maintenance Safety`
- page_start/page_end: `9`
- order_index: `116`
- effective heading_level: `2`
- heading level source: `toc_page_range`
- text preview: `2.3 Maintenance Safety`

### el_61df135b0c1544f087d1fe9cf40088ae
- type: `text`
- section id: `sec_5ed85322082f4fbaa119edbe1d632ac6`
- resolved section path: `2 Safety > 2.3 Maintenance Safety`
- page_start/page_end: `9`
- order_index: `117`
- effective heading_level: ``
- heading level source: ``
- text preview: `It is in your best interest to clean the FWC plant prior to working on it to minimize the danger of infection.`

### el_db9113927bde4fa48b601f97b7f14d76
- type: `section_header`
- section id: `sec_be4bbd355f984591b24e5a639205fdd3`
- resolved section path: `2 Safety > 2.4 Proper Use`
- page_start/page_end: `10`
- order_index: `124`
- effective heading_level: `2`
- heading level source: `toc_page_range`
- text preview: `2.4 Proper Use`

### el_cecf8e9e4e8e4b5ab1e65e7ee28efdf1
- type: `text`
- section id: `sec_be4bbd355f984591b24e5a639205fdd3`
- resolved section path: `2 Safety > 2.4 Proper Use`
- page_start/page_end: `10`
- order_index: `125`
- effective heading_level: ``
- heading level source: ``
- text preview: `The FWC12 may only be operated within the performance parameters specified.`

### el_b80321e2f0ad4ef1ac0be84a07be01db
- type: `text`
- section id: `sec_be4bbd355f984591b24e5a639205fdd3`
- resolved section path: `2 Safety > 2.4 Proper Use`
- page_start/page_end: `10`
- order_index: `126`
- effective heading_level: ``
- heading level source: ``
- text preview: `The FWC12 may only be used in conjunction with auxiliary equipment that is recommended and approved by FMD.`

### el_61c285c0e3094bb3849100b233ce6cec
- type: `text`
- section id: `sec_be4bbd355f984591b24e5a639205fdd3`
- resolved section path: `2 Safety > 2.4 Proper Use`
- page_start/page_end: `10`
- order_index: `127`
- effective heading_level: ``
- heading level source: ``
- text preview: `For safety and functionality reasons the FWC12 may not be altered or modified. If any modification of the system is required, FMD is to be consulted for prior written approval.`

### el_d0a3ff0d481645a6abdb5e9b56e97da4
- type: `text`
- section id: `sec_be4bbd355f984591b24e5a639205fdd3`
- resolved section path: `2 Safety > 2.4 Proper Use`
- page_start/page_end: `10`
- order_index: `128`
- effective heading_level: ``
- heading level source: ``
- text preview: `The FWC12 is designed and manufactured with the latest technology and is safe to operate.`

### el_6975ca42e0a6465f99dbac0dd0669654
- type: `text`
- section id: `sec_be4bbd355f984591b24e5a639205fdd3`
- resolved section path: `2 Safety > 2.4 Proper Use`
- page_start/page_end: `10`
- order_index: `129`
- effective heading_level: ``
- heading level source: ``
- text preview: `Any change in the plant which indicates a malfunction (increased noise level, higher temperatures than normal etc.) must be immediately investigated and where possible the fault rectified.`

### el_101981b1ac854b13b637c1559cae174e
- type: `text`
- section id: `sec_be4bbd355f984591b24e5a639205fdd3`
- resolved section path: `2 Safety > 2.4 Proper Use`
- page_start/page_end: `10`
- order_index: `130`
- effective heading_level: ``
- heading level source: ``
- text preview: `The operator/operating company are required to immediately report to FMD all changes that may or will detrimentally affect the condition and safety of the system. This also applies to warranty and warranty claims.`

### el_2b8aaa0232254fa18e2edad01c21d65e
- type: `section_header`
- section id: `sec_f8fed64102154e58b9e3c4d6aa31f0d9`

- text preview: `2.5 Qualified Personnel`

### el_a0c06269f6164b6dbcddd9014d693098

- resolved section path: `2 Safety > 2.5 Qualified Personnel`
- page_start/page_end: `10`
- order_index: `132`
- effective heading_level: ``
- heading level source: ``
- text preview: `All personnel that are instructed to work with or on the system must observe the rules and regulations for operational safety and accident prevention and must have read the system documentation, including all warning notices, prior to st...`

### el_aa51947f0d7b4bb6beab13c2c30ef471
- type: `text`
- section id: `sec_f8fed64102154e58b9e3c4d6aa31f0d9`
- resolved section path: `2 Safety > 2.5 Qualified Personnel`
- page_start/page_end: `10`
- order_index: `133`
- effective heading_level: ``
- heading level source: ``
- text preview: `Qualified personnel are by reason of their training, experience, instruction and their knowledge of the relevant standards, regulations, accident prevention rules and working conditions, authorized by the person responsible for the safet...`

### el_d8fd0ccca226454b87acefb5fb1095fb
- type: `text`
- section id: `sec_f8fed64102154e58b9e3c4d6aa31f0d9`
- resolved section path: `2 Safety > 2.5 Qualified Personnel`
- page_start/page_end: `10`
- order_index: `134`
- effective heading_level: ``
- heading level source: ``
- text preview: `Persons under the influence of drugs, alcohol or reaction-impairing medication must not be allowed to operate or work on the plant.`

### el_2758350fcd5d4c54a439f5c37787d1dd
- type: `text`
- section id: `sec_f8fed64102154e58b9e3c4d6aa31f0d9`
- resolved section path: `2 Safety > 2.5 Qualified Personnel`
- page_start/page_end: `10`
- order_index: `135`
- effective heading_level: ``
- heading level source: ``
- text preview: `The personnel responsible for the installation, operation and maintenance of the equipment must be appropriately qualified. The operator must ensure that they have completely understood the instructions contained within this manual.`

### el_186d507c6f5f41d4872c47aa75c33480
- type: `text`
- section id: `sec_f8fed64102154e58b9e3c4d6aa31f0d9`
- resolved section path: `2 Safety > 2.5 Qualified Personnel`
- page_start/page_end: `10`
- order_index: `136`
- effective heading_level: ``
- heading level source: ``
- text preview: `All warranties and guarantees with respect to the machine function and durability shall be void should the operator fail to adhere to these safety instructions or any other instructions within this manual.`

### el_0837ede8ae7b48f0a80e2d412ec9d197
- type: `section_header`
- section id: `sec_420742dc69ea4455a9cf09a04d5574d0`
- resolved section path: `2 Safety > 2.6 Protective Equipment`
- page_start/page_end: `10`
- order_index: `137`
- effective heading_level: `2`
- heading level source: `toc_page_range`
- text preview: `2.6 Protective Equipment`

### el_49694ef00f0e4062a0abce8890a16ee2
- type: `text`
- section id: `sec_420742dc69ea4455a9cf09a04d5574d0`
- resolved section path: `2 Safety > 2.6 Protective Equipment`
- page_start/page_end: `10`
- order_index: `138`
- effective heading_level: ``
- heading level source: ``
- text preview: `Protective clothing such as safety helmet, safety glasses, safety gloves and safety shoes must be worn when applicable to working on the plant. Rubber gloves suitable for contact with wastewater must be worn.`

### el_40f663c889ad483bb463bcf3422828bc
- type: `picture`
- section id: `sec_420742dc69ea4455a9cf09a04d5574d0`
- resolved section path: `2 Safety > 2.6 Protective Equipment`

- order_index: `139`
- effective heading_level: ``
- heading level source: ``
- text preview: ``

- order_index: `140`
- effective heading_level: ``
- heading level source: ``

- page_start/page_end: `10`
- order_index: `141`

### el_12f28342ddff4297bdd02ccb0968b462
- type: `section_header`
- section id: `sec_9adf33449fe64084b1547f1c7f5b82fc`
- resolved section path: `2 Safety > 2.7 Risk of Ignored Safety Instructions`
- page_start/page_end: `11`
- order_index: `142`
- effective heading_level: `2`
- heading level source: `toc_page_range`
- text preview: `2.7 Risk of Ignored Safety Instructions`

### el_a62b1d6dc91545f6af3142cb2b33f332
- type: `text`
- section id: `sec_9adf33449fe64084b1547f1c7f5b82fc`
- resolved section path: `2 Safety > 2.7 Risk of Ignored Safety Instructions`
- page_start/page_end: `11`
- order_index: `143`
- effective heading_level: ``
- heading level source: ``
- text preview: `There is a danger to life and limb for personnel if the plant is operated incorrectly or improperly.`

### el_69c7e3b13b5a413282654e1c35862d1a
- type: `text`
- section id: `sec_9adf33449fe64084b1547f1c7f5b82fc`
- resolved section path: `2 Safety > 2.7 Risk of Ignored Safety Instructions`
- page_start/page_end: `11`
- order_index: `144`
- effective heading_level: ``
- heading level source: ``
- text preview: `Rotating parts and the energy released with a sudden stop can cause serious damage to personnel and equipment, which can also result in extended downtime and high repair costs with damaged parts.`

### el_50b8333957c94f24b0d1c80c66d66c63
- type: `text`
- section id: `sec_9adf33449fe64084b1547f1c7f5b82fc`
- resolved section path: `2 Safety > 2.7 Risk of Ignored Safety Instructions`
- page_start/page_end: `11`
- order_index: `145`
- effective heading_level: ``
- heading level source: ``
- text preview: `The associated risks due to failure to adhere to these safety instructions include but are not limited to:`

### el_dceb360cc28340e0a0257945143f3efc
- type: `list_item`
- section id: `sec_9adf33449fe64084b1547f1c7f5b82fc`
- resolved section path: `2 Safety > 2.7 Risk of Ignored Safety Instructions`
- page_start/page_end: `11`
- order_index: `146`
- effective heading_level: ``
- heading level source: ``
- text preview: ` Endangering people due to electrical, mechanical, and/or chemical/biochemical hazards.`

### el_af74640aebf045539744b8a7b3cb2d05
- type: `list_item`
- section id: `sec_9adf33449fe64084b1547f1c7f5b82fc`
- resolved section path: `2 Safety > 2.7 Risk of Ignored Safety Instructions`
- page_start/page_end: `11`
- order_index: `147`
- effective heading_level: ``
- heading level source: ``
- text preview: ` Endangering the environment due to leakage of hazardous material (where chemicals are involved).`

### el_b120dd7cb1c44551bf7271bb1f976fd4
- type: `text`
- section id: `sec_9adf33449fe64084b1547f1c7f5b82fc`
- resolved section path: `2 Safety > 2.7 Risk of Ignored Safety Instructions`
- page_start/page_end: `11`
- order_index: `148`
- effective heading_level: ``
- heading level source: ``
- text preview: `Failure of important equipment and process functions leading to inferior performance.`

### el_52a98532c2da4b04816156fae2d991a6
- type: `section_header`
- section id: `sec_56b38bcff429435aa0f67fd4e2a167d4`
- resolved section path: `2 Safety > 2.8 Spare Parts`
- page_start/page_end: `11`
- order_index: `149`
- effective heading_level: `2`
- heading level source: `toc_page_range`
- text preview: `2.8 Spare Parts`

### el_1efbc86ff0fb414fa79a73a5da860bbf
- type: `text`
- section id: `sec_56b38bcff429435aa0f67fd4e2a167d4`
- resolved section path: `2 Safety > 2.8 Spare Parts`
- page_start/page_end: `11`
- order_index: `150`
- effective heading_level: ``
- heading level source: ``
- text preview: `Only original spare parts and equipment authorised by FMD are suitable and safe for use.`

### el_8c7c8e7f30e2484085e4085e4c25b792
- type: `picture`
- section id: `sec_56b38bcff429435aa0f67fd4e2a167d4`

- effective heading_level: ``

- text preview: ``

### el_feca85f8bd914a3da3ae7a22a04240c2
- type: `text`
- section id: `sec_56b38bcff429435aa0f67fd4e2a167d4`
- resolved section path: `2 Safety > 2.8 Spare Parts`
- page_start/page_end: `11`
- order_index: `152`
- effective heading_level: ``
- heading level source: ``
- text preview: `Note: Incorrect or faulty spare parts can lead to damage, malfunction or complete breakdown of the equipment!`

### el_4f397d48cf6047a2a392ea04b9cf077a
- type: `text`
- section id: `sec_56b38bcff429435aa0f67fd4e2a167d4`
- resolved section path: `2 Safety > 2.8 Spare Parts`
- page_start/page_end: `11`
- order_index: `153`
- effective heading_level: ``
- heading level source: ``
- text preview: `Installation of any parts or any modifications not authorised by FMD will nullify liability for any resulting damage or injury and change in performance, all guarantee, service, compensation, and liability claim against the manufacturer,...`

### el_34513bff9ce54f9bb39aea911aeda182
- type: `section_header`
- section id: `sec_dabd511a49c64f5a8afe4782194fd124`
- resolved section path: `3 System Introduction > 3.3 What it Does`
- page_start/page_end: `13`
- order_index: `173`
- effective heading_level: `2`
- heading level source: `toc_page_range`
- text preview: `3.3 What it Does`

### el_a1ad6a2ed26b4630b294f93514d402f0
- type: `text`
- section id: `sec_dabd511a49c64f5a8afe4782194fd124`
- resolved section path: `3 System Introduction > 3.3 What it Does`
- page_start/page_end: `13`
- order_index: `174`
- effective heading_level: ``
- heading level source: ``
- text preview: `The FWC system is designed to collect food waste from attached macerator stations using vacuum generated by the integrated pump and transfer the macerated slurry to the food waste dewatering press for separation of the solids from the li...`

### el_17cf192ccfab45d1a71ca2d07b211dda
- type: `section_header`
- section id: `sec_2dc494e053fd4b67a9fba8a66a2d17dc`
- resolved section path: `3 System Introduction > 3.4 How it Works`
- page_start/page_end: `13`
- order_index: `175`
- effective heading_level: `2`
- heading level source: `toc_page_range`
- text preview: `3.4 How it Works`

### el_cbe26dbb9c424d5bb5e6f0d68136632d
- type: `text`
- section id: `sec_2dc494e053fd4b67a9fba8a66a2d17dc`
- resolved section path: `3 System Introduction > 3.4 How it Works`
- page_start/page_end: `13`
- order_index: `176`
- effective heading_level: ``
- heading level source: ``
- text preview: `When a macerator station lid is closed and the start button is pressed, the control system of the FWC12 opens the appropriate valves based on the selected mode and then starts the vacuum pump. When vacuum builds up in the piping system t...`

### el_e4da4dd12c6240a6816ceeb51bee65bf
- type: `text`
- section id: `sec_2dc494e053fd4b67a9fba8a66a2d17dc`
- resolved section path: `3 System Introduction > 3.4 How it Works`
- page_start/page_end: `13`
- order_index: `177`
- effective heading_level: ``
- heading level source: ``
- text preview: `Normal operation will see the food waste sent to the dewatering press immediately with the food waste tank remaining empty during normal operation, this prevents the anaerobic breakdown of any organic material sitting in the tank and the...`

### el_bcfdf0d23e314fd1921c47c427c31974
- type: `text`
- section id: `sec_2dc494e053fd4b67a9fba8a66a2d17dc`
- resolved section path: `3 System Introduction > 3.4 How it Works`
- page_start/page_end: `13`
- order_index: `178`
- effective heading_level: ``
- heading level source: ``
- text preview: `The food waste press separates the solids and the liquids at 150 microns, the liquid is transferred via pump to the ships grease trap. The solids fall by gravity into an endless bag that seals in all smells whilst the unit is in operatio...`

### el_f244ccab1e294a2aa8073074245ebd89
- type: `text`
- section id: `sec_2dc494e053fd4b67a9fba8a66a2d17dc`
- resolved section path: `3 System Introduction > 3.4 How it Works`
- page_start/page_end: `13`
- order_index: `179`
- effective heading_level: ``
- heading level source: ``
- text preview: `Food waste can be discharged in accordance with the most recent revision Marpol Annex V regulations.`

### el_d11e4d8290e14dcdbc2d91249ea74590
- type: `section_header`
- section id: `sec_0c2bf7147c9f4dd0beec853d81dcae92`

### el_032679484593426f9300b6e3777e2e63

- order_index: `181`
- effective heading_level: ``
- heading level source: ``
- text preview: `Do not attempt to process the following waste groups in the macerators or FWC12 system:`

- heading level source: ``
- text preview: ` Cooking oils & Fats`

- order_index: `198`
- effective heading_level: ``

- page_start/page_end: `14`
- order_index: `199`
- effective heading_level: ``
- heading level source: ``
- text preview: `Prior to commissioning FMD must be consulted.`

### el_7a6eb3e9e43f4512b2fcf3ab0aa7a3c3

- page_start/page_end: `14`
- order_index: `200`
- effective heading_level: ``
- heading level source: ``
- text preview: `It is recommended that commissioning be completed by a service technician from FMD.`

- type: `text`

- effective heading_level: ``

- effective heading_level: ``

- effective heading_level: ``
