- text preview: `Assembly of Disposer`

### el_3e8af6ed4a2c4346bcce70a7235ab3f9
- type: `list_item`
- section id: `sec_aad699ab973445658a10fa538e382339`
- resolved section path: `7 Components > 7.1 Macerators > Commissioning & Shutdown 7.1.8 > Check before Start Up > Environmentally Responsible Solutions Engineered > Checks during Start Up > Operation 7.1.9 > Start and stop > Trouble Shooting 7.1.10 > Disposer Reduces Speed, Stops or does not Start > Disposer starts but there is no flushing water > Machine does not Start and makes no Sound > Environmentally Responsible Solutions Engineered > Maintenance 7.1.11 > Environmentally Responsible Solutions Engineered > Dismantling of Disposer > Environmentally > Responsible Solutions > Environmentally > Responsible Solutions > Environmentally Responsible Solutions Engineered > Assembly of Disposer`
- page_start/page_end: `36`
- order_index: `790`
- effective heading_level: ``
- heading level source: ``
- text preview: `Clean all components carefully. Wipe the surface of the motor (P1) upper flange and its shaft. Make sure that there is no dust or grease residue.`

### el_d2f7199a95d7472aac64a9ff9e63d9b9
- type: `list_item`
- section id: `sec_aad699ab973445658a10fa538e382339`
- resolved section path: `7 Components > 7.1 Macerators > Commissioning & Shutdown 7.1.8 > Check before Start Up > Environmentally Responsible Solutions Engineered > Checks during Start Up > Operation 7.1.9 > Start and stop > Trouble Shooting 7.1.10 > Disposer Reduces Speed, Stops or does not Start > Disposer starts but there is no flushing water > Machine does not Start and makes no Sound > Environmentally Responsible Solutions Engineered > Maintenance 7.1.11 > Environmentally Responsible Solutions Engineered > Dismantling of Disposer > Environmentally > Responsible Solutions > Environmentally > Responsible Solutions > Environmentally Responsible Solutions Engineered > Assembly of Disposer`
- page_start/page_end: `36`
- order_index: `791`
- effective heading_level: ``
- heading level source: ``
- text preview: `Make sure that the motor shaft key (P30) is in the correct position. Apply a thin layer of manufacturer specified special grease (P26) on the motor shaft.`

### el_6dd0b8e04ed141c7bbfbc64bd5996632
- type: `list_item`
- section id: `sec_aad699ab973445658a10fa538e382339`
- resolved section path: `7 Components > 7.1 Macerators > Commissioning & Shutdown 7.1.8 > Check before Start Up > Environmentally Responsible Solutions Engineered > Checks during Start Up > Operation 7.1.9 > Start and stop > Trouble Shooting 7.1.10 > Disposer Reduces Speed, Stops or does not Start > Disposer starts but there is no flushing water > Machine does not Start and makes no Sound > Environmentally Responsible Solutions Engineered > Maintenance 7.1.11 > Environmentally Responsible Solutions Engineered > Dismantling of Disposer > Environmentally > Responsible Solutions > Environmentally > Responsible Solutions > Environmentally Responsible Solutions Engineered > Assembly of Disposer`
- page_start/page_end: `36`
- order_index: `792`
- effective heading_level: ``
- heading level source: ``
- text preview: `Wipe the carrier (P2) clean on the inside and outside.`

### el_641b1cd501e949e5bf102f9d2d9af7be
- type: `list_item`
- section id: `sec_aad699ab973445658a10fa538e382339`
- resolved section path: `7 Components > 7.1 Macerators > Commissioning & Shutdown 7.1.8 > Check before Start Up > Environmentally Responsible Solutions Engineered > Checks during Start Up > Operation 7.1.9 > Start and stop > Trouble Shooting 7.1.10 > Disposer Reduces Speed, Stops or does not Start > Disposer starts but there is no flushing water > Machine does not Start and makes no Sound > Environmentally Responsible Solutions Engineered > Maintenance 7.1.11 > Environmentally Responsible Solutions Engineered > Dismantling of Disposer > Environmentally > Responsible Solutions > Environmentally > Responsible Solutions > Environmentally Responsible Solutions Engineered > Assembly of Disposer`
- page_start/page_end: `36`
- order_index: `793`
- effective heading_level: ``
- heading level source: ``
- text preview: `Mark onto the motor shaft the depth of the hole in the carrier (P2). From the top of the motor shaft, this measure is 38 mm for models 510, 515, and 48 mm for model 520, and 58 mm for models 530, 550 and 575. Carefully press the carrier...`

### el_5851f4a3716a4091841cfffcffc47798
- type: `list_item`
- section id: `sec_aad699ab973445658a10fa538e382339`
- resolved section path: `7 Components > 7.1 Macerators > Commissioning & Shutdown 7.1.8 > Check before Start Up > Environmentally Responsible Solutions Engineered > Checks during Start Up > Operation 7.1.9 > Start and stop > Trouble Shooting 7.1.10 > Disposer Reduces Speed, Stops or does not Start > Disposer starts but there is no flushing water > Machine does not Start and makes no Sound > Environmentally Responsible Solutions Engineered > Maintenance 7.1.11 > Environmentally Responsible Solutions Engineered > Dismantling of Disposer > Environmentally > Responsible Solutions > Environmentally > Responsible Solutions > Environmentally Responsible Solutions Engineered > Assembly of Disposer`
- page_start/page_end: `36`
- order_index: `794`
- effective heading_level: ``
- heading level source: ``
- text preview: `On the end shield (P3), clean the center hole for the axle seals (P5)`

### el_73e9946707ad499989a45c008ac4658c
- type: `text`
- section id: `sec_aad699ab973445658a10fa538e382339`
- resolved section path: `7 Components > 7.1 Macerators > Commissioning & Shutdown 7.1.8 > Check before Start Up > Environmentally Responsible Solutions Engineered > Checks during Start Up > Operation 7.1.9 > Start and stop > Trouble Shooting 7.1.10 > Disposer Reduces Speed, Stops or does not Start > Disposer starts but there is no flushing water > Machine does not Start and makes no Sound > Environmentally Responsible Solutions Engineered > Maintenance 7.1.11 > Environmentally Responsible Solutions Engineered > Dismantling of Disposer > Environmentally > Responsible Solutions > Environmentally > Responsible Solutions > Environmentally Responsible Solutions Engineered > Assembly of Disposer`
- page_start/page_end: `36`
- order_index: `795`
- effective heading_level: ``
- heading level source: ``
- text preview: `.`

### el_d015f2c0cd194e52ae4df7f2466cc2b9
- type: `list_item`
- section id: `sec_aad699ab973445658a10fa538e382339`
- resolved section path: `7 Components > 7.1 Macerators > Commissioning & Shutdown 7.1.8 > Check before Start Up > Environmentally Responsible Solutions Engineered > Checks during Start Up > Operation 7.1.9 > Start and stop > Trouble Shooting 7.1.10 > Disposer Reduces Speed, Stops or does not Start > Disposer starts but there is no flushing water > Machine does not Start and makes no Sound > Environmentally Responsible Solutions Engineered > Maintenance 7.1.11 > Environmentally Responsible Solutions Engineered > Dismantling of Disposer > Environmentally > Responsible Solutions > Environmentally > Responsible Solutions > Environmentally Responsible Solutions Engineered > Assembly of Disposer`
- page_start/page_end: `36`
- order_index: `796`
- effective heading_level: ``
- heading level source: ``
- text preview: `Place the washer (P4) in the end shield with the flange facing towards the motor (see the sketch below under item 8, where the parts are seen with the end shield placed upside down as on the photo to the left).`

### el_2dea7215483e4a6b8d0837fcea24274a
- type: `list_item`
- section id: `sec_aad699ab973445658a10fa538e382339`
- resolved section path: `7 Components > 7.1 Macerators > Commissioning & Shutdown 7.1.8 > Check before Start Up > Environmentally Responsible Solutions Engineered > Checks during Start Up > Operation 7.1.9 > Start and stop > Trouble Shooting 7.1.10 > Disposer Reduces Speed, Stops or does not Start > Disposer starts but there is no flushing water > Machine does not Start and makes no Sound > Environmentally Responsible Solutions Engineered > Maintenance 7.1.11 > Environmentally Responsible Solutions Engineered > Dismantling of Disposer > Environmentally > Responsible Solutions > Environmentally > Responsible Solutions > Environmentally Responsible Solutions Engineered > Assembly of Disposer`
- page_start/page_end: `36`
- order_index: `797`
- effective heading_level: ``
- heading level source: ``
- text preview: `Grease the sealing face of this center hole in the end-shield (P3) with special grease (P26)`

### el_e59769244a3741bca8dd118dbc2fb307
- type: `list_item`

- resolved section path: `7 Components > 7.1 Macerators > Commissioning & Shutdown 7.1.8 > Check before Start Up > Environmentally Responsible Solutions Engineered > Checks during Start Up > Operation 7.1.9 > Start and stop > Trouble Shooting 7.1.10 > Disposer Reduces Speed, Stops or does not Start > Disposer starts but there is no flushing water > Machine does not Start and makes no Sound > Environmentally Responsible Solutions Engineered > Maintenance 7.1.11 > Environmentally Responsible Solutions Engineered > Dismantling of Disposer > Environmentally > Responsible Solutions > Environmentally > Responsible Solutions > Environmentally Responsible Solutions Engineered > Assembly of Disposer`

- text preview: `To avoid damaging the seals (P5, 2pcs), press each seal one at the time into position in the end shield using a tool (for example a shaft end or other round bar, see below photo) that has the same outer diameter as these seals. The seals...`

### el_959e97b3df3e45fdbfef1a71f0be5c53
- type: `list_item`
- section id: `sec_aad699ab973445658a10fa538e382339`
- resolved section path: `7 Components > 7.1 Macerators > Commissioning & Shutdown 7.1.8 > Check before Start Up > Environmentally Responsible Solutions Engineered > Checks during Start Up > Operation 7.1.9 > Start and stop > Trouble Shooting 7.1.10 > Disposer Reduces Speed, Stops or does not Start > Disposer starts but there is no flushing water > Machine does not Start and makes no Sound > Environmentally Responsible Solutions Engineered > Maintenance 7.1.11 > Environmentally Responsible Solutions Engineered > Dismantling of Disposer > Environmentally > Responsible Solutions > Environmentally > Responsible Solutions > Environmentally Responsible Solutions Engineered > Assembly of Disposer`
- page_start/page_end: `36`
- order_index: `800`
- effective heading_level: ``
- heading level source: ``
- text preview: `The seals are fixated by fitting the locking ring (P6) into the groove in the end shield (P3) according to the above sketch under item 8. Tap on this ring to ensure that it is seated properly in the groove in the end shield.`

### el_a5e391c145734a3bb7d90b6b619adb0e
- type: `list_item`
- section id: `sec_b3829490b7e54f3aaab7a5dbffff3e11`
- resolved section path: `7 Components > 7.1 Macerators > Commissioning & Shutdown 7.1.8 > Check before Start Up > Environmentally Responsible Solutions Engineered > Checks during Start Up > Operation 7.1.9 > Start and stop > Trouble Shooting 7.1.10 > Disposer Reduces Speed, Stops or does not Start > Disposer starts but there is no flushing water > Machine does not Start and makes no Sound > Environmentally Responsible Solutions Engineered > Maintenance 7.1.11 > Environmentally Responsible Solutions Engineered > Dismantling of Disposer > Environmentally > Responsible Solutions > Environmentally > Responsible Solutions > Environmentally Responsible Solutions Engineered > Assembly of Disposer > Environmentally > Responsible Solutions`
- page_start/page_end: `37`
- order_index: `816`
- effective heading_level: ``
- heading level source: ``
- text preview: `With a clean and soft putty knife fill the grooves along the sealing lips in the axle seals (P5) with special grease (P26). Be sure no dirt or particles happen to fall into this greasing.`

- type: `text`

### el_68636915b2d145c0b0f7dcbc8c0c6d02
- type: `list_item`
- section id: `sec_b3829490b7e54f3aaab7a5dbffff3e11`
- resolved section path: `7 Components > 7.1 Macerators > Commissioning & Shutdown 7.1.8 > Check before Start Up > Environmentally Responsible Solutions Engineered > Checks during Start Up > Operation 7.1.9 > Start and stop > Trouble Shooting 7.1.10 > Disposer Reduces Speed, Stops or does not Start > Disposer starts but there is no flushing water > Machine does not Start and makes no Sound > Environmentally Responsible Solutions Engineered > Maintenance 7.1.11 > Environmentally Responsible Solutions Engineered > Dismantling of Disposer > Environmentally > Responsible Solutions > Environmentally > Responsible Solutions > Environmentally Responsible Solutions Engineered > Assembly of Disposer > Environmentally > Responsible Solutions`
- page_start/page_end: `37`
- order_index: `819`
- effective heading_level: ``
- heading level source: ``
- text preview: `With a clean soft cloth lubricate a thin layer of special grease (P26) on the carrier (P2) sealing surface for the axle seals (P5) .`

### el_a09aafbe8bd64e01beeb795ed3dda069
- type: `list_item`
- section id: `sec_b3829490b7e54f3aaab7a5dbffff3e11`
- resolved section path: `7 Components > 7.1 Macerators > Commissioning & Shutdown 7.1.8 > Check before Start Up > Environmentally Responsible Solutions Engineered > Checks during Start Up > Operation 7.1.9 > Start and stop > Trouble Shooting 7.1.10 > Disposer Reduces Speed, Stops or does not Start > Disposer starts but there is no flushing water > Machine does not Start and makes no Sound > Environmentally Responsible Solutions Engineered > Maintenance 7.1.11 > Environmentally Responsible Solutions Engineered > Dismantling of Disposer > Environmentally > Responsible Solutions > Environmentally > Responsible Solutions > Environmentally Responsible Solutions Engineered > Assembly of Disposer > Environmentally > Responsible Solutions`
- page_start/page_end: `37`
- order_index: `820`
- effective heading_level: ``
- heading level source: ``
- text preview: `With reference to section 9.4, item 13 above, refit the end shield (P3) so that its outlet ends up 180° offset from the motor (P1) terminal box for cable connection. Take great care so that the lips on the axle seals (P5, 2pcs) not are d...`

### el_eb93d2223edd43e2897711fc9c3d6f28
- type: `list_item`
- section id: `sec_b3829490b7e54f3aaab7a5dbffff3e11`
- resolved section path: `7 Components > 7.1 Macerators > Commissioning & Shutdown 7.1.8 > Check before Start Up > Environmentally Responsible Solutions Engineered > Checks during Start Up > Operation 7.1.9 > Start and stop > Trouble Shooting 7.1.10 > Disposer Reduces Speed, Stops or does not Start > Disposer starts but there is no flushing water > Machine does not Start and makes no Sound > Environmentally Responsible Solutions Engineered > Maintenance 7.1.11 > Environmentally Responsible Solutions Engineered > Dismantling of Disposer > Environmentally > Responsible Solutions > Environmentally > Responsible Solutions > Environmentally Responsible Solutions Engineered > Assembly of Disposer > Environmentally > Responsible Solutions`
- page_start/page_end: `37`
- order_index: `821`
- effective heading_level: ``
- heading level source: ``
- text preview: `Grease the sealing lip of the V-ring seal (P8) and its seal washer (P4) using special grease (P26) . Fit the V-ring seal over the carrier (P2) with its seal lip against the seal washer (P4) .`

### el_33732675742b4ea28381c524fa92233a
- type: `list_item`
- section id: `sec_b3829490b7e54f3aaab7a5dbffff3e11`
- resolved section path: `7 Components > 7.1 Macerators > Commissioning & Shutdown 7.1.8 > Check before Start Up > Environmentally Responsible Solutions Engineered > Checks during Start Up > Operation 7.1.9 > Start and stop > Trouble Shooting 7.1.10 > Disposer Reduces Speed, Stops or does not Start > Disposer starts but there is no flushing water > Machine does not Start and makes no Sound > Environmentally Responsible Solutions Engineered > Maintenance 7.1.11 > Environmentally Responsible Solutions Engineered > Dismantling of Disposer > Environmentally > Responsible Solutions > Environmentally > Responsible Solutions > Environmentally Responsible Solutions Engineered > Assembly of Disposer > Environmentally > Responsible Solutions`
- page_start/page_end: `37`
- order_index: `822`
- effective heading_level: ``
- heading level source: ``
- text preview: `Insert a small click of special grease (P26) into the keyway of the carrier (P2) and push on the key (P9) .`

### el_b489c2499f2d487595e4e7da5feaf6b7
- type: `list_item`
- section id: `sec_b3829490b7e54f3aaab7a5dbffff3e11`
- resolved section path: `7 Components > 7.1 Macerators > Commissioning & Shutdown 7.1.8 > Check before Start Up > Environmentally Responsible Solutions Engineered > Checks during Start Up > Operation 7.1.9 > Start and stop > Trouble Shooting 7.1.10 > Disposer Reduces Speed, Stops or does not Start > Disposer starts but there is no flushing water > Machine does not Start and makes no Sound > Environmentally Responsible Solutions Engineered > Maintenance 7.1.11 > Environmentally Responsible Solutions Engineered > Dismantling of Disposer > Environmentally > Responsible Solutions > Environmentally > Responsible Solutions > Environmentally Responsible Solutions Engineered > Assembly of Disposer > Environmentally > Responsible Solutions`
- page_start/page_end: `37`
- order_index: `823`
- effective heading_level: ``
- heading level source: ``
- text preview: `Wipe clean the axle hole in the rotary shredder (P10). Also make sure that the mating surfaces on the end shield (P3) and the stationary shredder (P13) are clean.`

### el_797fe0ed5bb843b8b29a3b6f32d38a41
- type: `list_item`
- section id: `sec_b3829490b7e54f3aaab7a5dbffff3e11`
- resolved section path: `7 Components > 7.1 Macerators > Commissioning & Shutdown 7.1.8 > Check before Start Up > Environmentally Responsible Solutions Engineered > Checks during Start Up > Operation 7.1.9 > Start and stop > Trouble Shooting 7.1.10 > Disposer Reduces Speed, Stops or does not Start > Disposer starts but there is no flushing water > Machine does not Start and makes no Sound > Environmentally Responsible Solutions Engineered > Maintenance 7.1.11 > Environmentally Responsible Solutions Engineered > Dismantling of Disposer > Environmentally > Responsible Solutions > Environmentally > Responsible Solutions > Environmentally Responsible Solutions Engineered > Assembly of Disposer > Environmentally > Responsible Solutions`
- page_start/page_end: `37`
- order_index: `824`
- effective heading_level: ``
- heading level source: ``
- text preview: `Carefully fit the rotary shredder (P10) on the carrier (P2) .`

### el_5366ddd77c024ff7951b9ed4f2f461e5
- type: `list_item`
- section id: `sec_b3829490b7e54f3aaab7a5dbffff3e11`
- resolved section path: `7 Components > 7.1 Macerators > Commissioning & Shutdown 7.1.8 > Check before Start Up > Environmentally Responsible Solutions Engineered > Checks during Start Up > Operation 7.1.9 > Start and stop > Trouble Shooting 7.1.10 > Disposer Reduces Speed, Stops or does not Start > Disposer starts but there is no flushing water > Machine does not Start and makes no Sound > Environmentally Responsible Solutions Engineered > Maintenance 7.1.11 > Environmentally Responsible Solutions Engineered > Dismantling of Disposer > Environmentally > Responsible Solutions > Environmentally > Responsible Solutions > Environmentally Responsible Solutions Engineered > Assembly of Disposer > Environmentally > Responsible Solutions`
- page_start/page_end: `37`
- order_index: `825`
- effective heading_level: ``
- heading level source: ``
- text preview: `Wipe the carrier (P2) clean from excess grease.`

### el_ed6f59da13ce4ae4809f7ae5b6b07857
- type: `list_item`
- section id: `sec_b3829490b7e54f3aaab7a5dbffff3e11`
- resolved section path: `7 Components > 7.1 Macerators > Commissioning & Shutdown 7.1.8 > Check before Start Up > Environmentally Responsible Solutions Engineered > Checks during Start Up > Operation 7.1.9 > Start and stop > Trouble Shooting 7.1.10 > Disposer Reduces Speed, Stops or does not Start > Disposer starts but there is no flushing water > Machine does not Start and makes no Sound > Environmentally Responsible Solutions Engineered > Maintenance 7.1.11 > Environmentally Responsible Solutions Engineered > Dismantling of Disposer > Environmentally > Responsible Solutions > Environmentally > Responsible Solutions > Environmentally Responsible Solutions Engineered > Assembly of Disposer > Environmentally > Responsible Solutions`
- page_start/page_end: `37`
- order_index: `826`
- effective heading_level: ``
- heading level source: ``
- text preview: `Apply a layer of rubber sealing compound (P27) over the joint between rotary shredder and carrier (see photo below). Make sure that no sealing compound enters the screw hole of the carrier.`

### el_5eee62828ecd4723a0d61a312e74ed75
- type: `list_item`
- section id: `sec_394163a017da45a9910b2b3294d960aa`
- resolved section path: `7 Components > 7.1 Macerators > Commissioning & Shutdown 7.1.8 > Check before Start Up > Environmentally Responsible Solutions Engineered > Checks during Start Up > Operation 7.1.9 > Start and stop > Trouble Shooting 7.1.10 > Disposer Reduces Speed, Stops or does not Start > Disposer starts but there is no flushing water > Machine does not Start and makes no Sound > Environmentally Responsible Solutions Engineered > Maintenance 7.1.11 > Environmentally Responsible Solutions Engineered > Dismantling of Disposer > Environmentally > Responsible Solutions > Environmentally > Responsible Solutions > Environmentally Responsible Solutions Engineered > Assembly of Disposer > Environmentally > Responsible Solutions > Environmentally Responsible Solutions Engineered`
- page_start/page_end: `38`
- order_index: `836`
- effective heading_level: ``
- heading level source: ``
- text preview: `Fit the axle washer (P11) on the rotary shredder. Apply rubber sealing compound around the underside of the entire head of the axle screw (P12) and mount this screw. Make sure that sealing compound is squeezed out around the entire circu...`

### el_5db97aeeff77417f9fb8dbb7e9f70931
- type: `list_item`
- section id: `sec_394163a017da45a9910b2b3294d960aa`
- resolved section path: `7 Components > 7.1 Macerators > Commissioning & Shutdown 7.1.8 > Check before Start Up > Environmentally Responsible Solutions Engineered > Checks during Start Up > Operation 7.1.9 > Start and stop > Trouble Shooting 7.1.10 > Disposer Reduces Speed, Stops or does not Start > Disposer starts but there is no flushing water > Machine does not Start and makes no Sound > Environmentally Responsible Solutions Engineered > Maintenance 7.1.11 > Environmentally Responsible Solutions Engineered > Dismantling of Disposer > Environmentally > Responsible Solutions > Environmentally > Responsible Solutions > Environmentally Responsible Solutions Engineered > Assembly of Disposer > Environmentally > Responsible Solutions > Environmentally Responsible Solutions Engineered`
- page_start/page_end: `38`
- order_index: `837`
- effective heading_level: ``
- heading level source: ``
- text preview: `Apply a thin uninterrupted string of rubber sealing compound (P27) in the seat of the end shield (P3) in which the stationary shredder (P13) should be pressed down. See below photo.`

### el_d765376acb984cae84cae6e78df7eeac
- type: `list_item`
- section id: `sec_394163a017da45a9910b2b3294d960aa`
- resolved section path: `7 Components > 7.1 Macerators > Commissioning & Shutdown 7.1.8 > Check before Start Up > Environmentally Responsible Solutions Engineered > Checks during Start Up > Operation 7.1.9 > Start and stop > Trouble Shooting 7.1.10 > Disposer Reduces Speed, Stops or does not Start > Disposer starts but there is no flushing water > Machine does not Start and makes no Sound > Environmentally Responsible Solutions Engineered > Maintenance 7.1.11 > Environmentally Responsible Solutions Engineered > Dismantling of Disposer > Environmentally > Responsible Solutions > Environmentally > Responsible Solutions > Environmentally Responsible Solutions Engineered > Assembly of Disposer > Environmentally > Responsible Solutions > Environmentally Responsible Solutions Engineered`
- page_start/page_end: `38`
- order_index: `838`
- effective heading_level: ``
- heading level source: ``
- text preview: `Carefully position the stationary shredder (P13) with its upper large tooth closest to the outlet of the end shield (P3) .`

### el_88007a14f2dc436d8477f756c965073c
- type: `list_item`
- section id: `sec_394163a017da45a9910b2b3294d960aa`
- resolved section path: `7 Components > 7.1 Macerators > Commissioning & Shutdown 7.1.8 > Check before Start Up > Environmentally Responsible Solutions Engineered > Checks during Start Up > Operation 7.1.9 > Start and stop > Trouble Shooting 7.1.10 > Disposer Reduces Speed, Stops or does not Start > Disposer starts but there is no flushing water > Machine does not Start and makes no Sound > Environmentally Responsible Solutions Engineered > Maintenance 7.1.11 > Environmentally Responsible Solutions Engineered > Dismantling of Disposer > Environmentally > Responsible Solutions > Environmentally > Responsible Solutions > Environmentally Responsible Solutions Engineered > Assembly of Disposer > Environmentally > Responsible Solutions > Environmentally Responsible Solutions Engineered`
- page_start/page_end: `38`
- order_index: `839`
- effective heading_level: ``
- heading level source: ``
- text preview: `Tap around the top of the stationary shredder (P13) with a plastic hammer to fix it in the end shield (P3), and make sure that the stationary shredder is all the way down in the seat of the end shield.`

### el_77ab1ec4f2294931b50c67070201e5da
- type: `list_item`
- section id: `sec_394163a017da45a9910b2b3294d960aa`
- resolved section path: `7 Components > 7.1 Macerators > Commissioning & Shutdown 7.1.8 > Check before Start Up > Environmentally Responsible Solutions Engineered > Checks during Start Up > Operation 7.1.9 > Start and stop > Trouble Shooting 7.1.10 > Disposer Reduces Speed, Stops or does not Start > Disposer starts but there is no flushing water > Machine does not Start and makes no Sound > Environmentally Responsible Solutions Engineered > Maintenance 7.1.11 > Environmentally Responsible Solutions Engineered > Dismantling of Disposer > Environmentally > Responsible Solutions > Environmentally > Responsible Solutions > Environmentally Responsible Solutions Engineered > Assembly of Disposer > Environmentally > Responsible Solutions > Environmentally Responsible Solutions Engineered`
- page_start/page_end: `38`
- order_index: `840`
- effective heading_level: ``
- heading level source: ``
- text preview: `Secure the stationary shredder (P13) to the end shield (P3) by hammering 6 punch marks on the end shield with even distances around the joint between these two articles. See below photo.`

### el_65e3ebb0c0e94831a6f6a2b846c9248c
- type: `list_item`
- section id: `sec_394163a017da45a9910b2b3294d960aa`
- resolved section path: `7 Components > 7.1 Macerators > Commissioning & Shutdown 7.1.8 > Check before Start Up > Environmentally Responsible Solutions Engineered > Checks during Start Up > Operation 7.1.9 > Start and stop > Trouble Shooting 7.1.10 > Disposer Reduces Speed, Stops or does not Start > Disposer starts but there is no flushing water > Machine does not Start and makes no Sound > Environmentally Responsible Solutions Engineered > Maintenance 7.1.11 > Environmentally Responsible Solutions Engineered > Dismantling of Disposer > Environmentally > Responsible Solutions > Environmentally > Responsible Solutions > Environmentally Responsible Solutions Engineered > Assembly of Disposer > Environmentally > Responsible Solutions > Environmentally Responsible Solutions Engineered`
- page_start/page_end: `38`
- order_index: `841`
- effective heading_level: ``
- heading level source: ``
- text preview: `Fit a new rubber seal (P14) on the top of the stationary shredder (P13). Make sure that it is centered.`

### el_e6057c6a25fd4517bc90d32d827ed7e6
- type: `list_item`
- section id: `sec_394163a017da45a9910b2b3294d960aa`
- resolved section path: `7 Components > 7.1 Macerators > Commissioning & Shutdown 7.1.8 > Check before Start Up > Environmentally Responsible Solutions Engineered > Checks during Start Up > Operation 7.1.9 > Start and stop > Trouble Shooting 7.1.10 > Disposer Reduces Speed, Stops or does not Start > Disposer starts but there is no flushing water > Machine does not Start and makes no Sound > Environmentally Responsible Solutions Engineered > Maintenance 7.1.11 > Environmentally Responsible Solutions Engineered > Dismantling of Disposer > Environmentally > Responsible Solutions > Environmentally > Responsible Solutions > Environmentally Responsible Solutions Engineered > Assembly of Disposer > Environmentally > Responsible Solutions > Environmentally Responsible Solutions Engineered`
- page_start/page_end: `38`
- order_index: `842`
- effective heading_level: ``
- heading level source: ``
- text preview: `Wipe clean the surface of the hood (P15) that faces the rubber seal (P14) .`

### el_c451d58f89ea4b1ba901d82ffc83babb
- type: `list_item`
- section id: `sec_d46576028bd3495781292143a1eb2c36`

### el_22c434cc82fe421b8a28f7fd574272b0
- type: `list_item`
- section id: `sec_d46576028bd3495781292143a1eb2c36`
- resolved section path: `7 Components > 7.1 Macerators > Commissioning & Shutdown 7.1.8 > Check before Start Up > Environmentally Responsible Solutions Engineered > Checks during Start Up > Operation 7.1.9 > Start and stop > Trouble Shooting 7.1.10 > Disposer Reduces Speed, Stops or does not Start > Disposer starts but there is no flushing water > Machine does not Start and makes no Sound > Environmentally Responsible Solutions Engineered > Maintenance 7.1.11 > Environmentally Responsible Solutions Engineered > Dismantling of Disposer > Environmentally > Responsible Solutions > Environmentally > Responsible Solutions > Environmentally Responsible Solutions Engineered > Assembly of Disposer > Environmentally > Responsible Solutions > Environmentally Responsible Solutions Engineered > Environmentally Responsible Solutions Engineered`

- text preview: `Place the strap (P19) diagonally over the two remaining screws and fix it with 2 pcs. of washers and 2 pcs. of new unused locking nuts (P16). Tighten all four lock nuts crosswise. For models 510, 515 and 520 with torque 9,5 Nm and for mo...`

### el_eb70801ed7304009951786aea652d4aa
- type: `list_item`

- order_index: `854`

- text preview: `Pass the motor cable through the cable gland (P22) in the disposer housing (P20) .`

### el_277f52e1df3b4ed0a6f74d7989581c2a
- type: `list_item`
- section id: `sec_8fa9c3e157da4dac9f36dbab0461c39e`
- resolved section path: `7 Components > 7.1 Macerators > Commissioning & Shutdown 7.1.8 > Check before Start Up > Environmentally Responsible Solutions Engineered > Checks during Start Up > Operation 7.1.9 > Start and stop > Trouble Shooting 7.1.10 > Disposer Reduces Speed, Stops or does not Start > Disposer starts but there is no flushing water > Machine does not Start and makes no Sound > Environmentally Responsible Solutions Engineered > Maintenance 7.1.11 > Environmentally Responsible Solutions Engineered > Dismantling of Disposer > Environmentally > Responsible Solutions > Environmentally > Responsible Solutions > Environmentally Responsible Solutions Engineered > Assembly of Disposer > Environmentally > Responsible Solutions > Environmentally Responsible Solutions Engineered > Environmentally Responsible Solutions Engineered > Environmentally Responsible Solutions Engineered`
- page_start/page_end: `40`
- order_index: `861`
- effective heading_level: ``
- heading level source: ``
- text preview: `Pull out the cable as far as it goes through the cable gland. Then feed back about 5 cm to get a good relief of the cable. Lock the cable by tightening the nut of the cable gland (P22). Turn the disposer over again.`

- heading level source: ``
- text preview: `The disposer is now ready to be remounted under the assembly using the same trolley with lifting plate (or the same steady jack with lifting plate) as previously used when the disposer was dismantled. Be aware of the motor power supply c...`

### el_eedcaaa45f6b415db3fcb7a0914927e8
- type: `list_item`
- section id: `sec_8fa9c3e157da4dac9f36dbab0461c39e`

- page_start/page_end: `40`
- order_index: `864`
- effective heading_level: ``
- heading level source: ``
- text preview: `Make sure that the seal for the hood (P17) is placed correctly before you move the disposer into position under the assembly for mounting with 6 pcs. of screws and nuts (P18) .`

- section id: `sec_8fa9c3e157da4dac9f36dbab0461c39e`

### el_9c6c2a8a0a124daeb5a288c1f3a88af9
- type: `list_item`
- section id: `sec_8fa9c3e157da4dac9f36dbab0461c39e`

- order_index: `866`
- effective heading_level: ``
- heading level source: ``
- text preview: `Reconnect and seal the water trap with sewer pipe to the outlet on the disposer end shield (P3) .`

- page_start/page_end: `40`
- order_index: `867`
- effective heading_level: ``

- text preview: `Reconnect the disposer motor (P1) connection cable to the start & stop control unit according to the electrical connection diagram supplied with the machine from Disperator.`

### el_febfde18c93a4750975665f164327c40
- type: `section_header`
- section id: `sec_4063794085c8468ebc0a5b3dffb9dbaf`
- resolved section path: `7 Components > 7.2 Food Waste Press > Safety Precautions 7.2.1 > Owner / User Responsibility`
- page_start/page_end: `48`
- order_index: `979`
- effective heading_level: `4`
- heading level source: `toc_context`
- text preview: `Owner / User Responsibility`

### el_ffb3cb64609c4900829b19144b1cae99
- type: `text`
- section id: `sec_4063794085c8468ebc0a5b3dffb9dbaf`
- resolved section path: `7 Components > 7.2 Food Waste Press > Safety Precautions 7.2.1 > Owner / User Responsibility`
- page_start/page_end: `48`
- order_index: `980`
- effective heading_level: ``
- heading level source: ``
- text preview: `The owner and/or user must have a sound understanding of the operating instructions and warnings before using this equipment.`

### el_10891be9595c47cebc7d88bb085f2130
- type: `text`
- section id: `sec_4063794085c8468ebc0a5b3dffb9dbaf`
- resolved section path: `7 Components > 7.2 Food Waste Press > Safety Precautions 7.2.1 > Owner / User Responsibility`
- page_start/page_end: `48`
- order_index: `981`
- effective heading_level: ``
- heading level source: ``
- text preview: `There are several forewarnings indicated throughout this manual that may stress a possible unsafe condition or important information regarding the use of this equipment.`

### el_14e414c7eed0444aa841b6cded991774
- type: `text`
- section id: `sec_4063794085c8468ebc0a5b3dffb9dbaf`
- resolved section path: `7 Components > 7.2 Food Waste Press > Safety Precautions 7.2.1 > Owner / User Responsibility`
- page_start/page_end: `48`
- order_index: `982`
- effective heading_level: ``
- heading level source: ``
- text preview: `The system operator must ensure that all relevant accident prevention regulations of their industry are observed and complied with. These safety regulations are only supplementary to the existing safety regulations of the entire system.`

### el_c2d536be51d44fcb98af74c0f89c1a8d
- type: `text`
- section id: `sec_4063794085c8468ebc0a5b3dffb9dbaf`
- resolved section path: `7 Components > 7.2 Food Waste Press > Safety Precautions 7.2.1 > Owner / User Responsibility`
- page_start/page_end: `48`
- order_index: `983`
- effective heading_level: ``
- heading level source: ``
- text preview: `This manual has been prepared to provide you with a simple and understandable guide for equipment operation and maintenance. To keep your unit in top running condition, follow the specific maintenance procedures given in this manual.`

- type: `text`
- section id: `sec_a0f47841112e41a58e330951b53aa057`
- resolved section path: `7 Components > 7.2 Food Waste Press > Safety Precautions 7.2.1 > Owner / User Responsibility > General Warnings:`
- page_start/page_end: `48`
- order_index: `986`
- effective heading_level: ``
- heading level source: ``
- text preview: `WARNING: Ensure you have read the safety definitions and symbols and understand all instructions before installing, operating, or servicing this machine . Failure to do so could result in severe personal injury or property damage .`

### el_da4ff2dc0e3f4e61af9b09fbdcae63f8
- type: `text`
- section id: `sec_a0f47841112e41a58e330951b53aa057`
- resolved section path: `7 Components > 7.2 Food Waste Press > Safety Precautions 7.2.1 > Owner / User Responsibility > General Warnings:`
- page_start/page_end: `48`
- order_index: `991`
- effective heading_level: ``
- heading level source: ``
- text preview: `CAUTION: When installing or maintaining the pre-screen, shut off and lock out power before removing any covers. Never make adjustments while in operation, except for those prescribed in this manual.`

### el_1139770d63b04f58a1a1156f503869aa
- type: `text`
- section id: `sec_a0f47841112e41a58e330951b53aa057`
- resolved section path: `7 Components > 7.2 Food Waste Press > Safety Precautions 7.2.1 > Owner / User Responsibility > General Warnings:`
- page_start/page_end: `48`
- order_index: `992`
- effective heading_level: ``
- heading level source: ``
- text preview: `DANGER: Keep doors and guards in place at all times to avoid exposure to rotating parts. While the power is on, severe injury can occur if hands or feet reach inside the unit.`

### el_40c8ba02d2f7457180399088b3a72973
- type: `text`
- section id: `sec_a0f47841112e41a58e330951b53aa057`
- resolved section path: `7 Components > 7.2 Food Waste Press > Safety Precautions 7.2.1 > Owner / User Responsibility > General Warnings:`
- page_start/page_end: `48`
- order_index: `993`
- effective heading_level: ``
- heading level source: ``
- text preview: `WARNING: A qualified electrician must perform all wiring. Failure to comply may result in severe personal injury or property damage.`

- text preview: `Electrical System Precautions`

### el_1555cd66485846be89afa87db6a18257
- type: `text`
- section id: `sec_d8065cd0236f42d0ae9a0f4b1cfd66c8`
- resolved section path: `7 Components > 7.2 Food Waste Press > Safety Precautions 7.2.1 > Owner / User Responsibility > General Warnings: > Environmentally > Responsible Solutions > Electrical System Precautions`
- page_start/page_end: `49`
- order_index: `1001`
- effective heading_level: ``
- heading level source: ``
- text preview: `The electrical equipment must be secured against unauthorised access and may only be tested and maintained by trained specialists.`

### el_ed51ad9074bd4fc0bac6bc8269c766dc
- type: `text`
- section id: `sec_d8065cd0236f42d0ae9a0f4b1cfd66c8`
- resolved section path: `7 Components > 7.2 Food Waste Press > Safety Precautions 7.2.1 > Owner / User Responsibility > General Warnings: > Environmentally > Responsible Solutions > Electrical System Precautions`
- page_start/page_end: `49`
- order_index: `1003`
- effective heading_level: ``
- heading level source: ``
- text preview: `WARNING: Electrical Hazard! ALWAYS check for no voltage before starting work!`

### el_4f86b8d5e03a44b6935775f5c0b6b271
- type: `text`
- section id: `sec_d8065cd0236f42d0ae9a0f4b1cfd66c8`
- resolved section path: `7 Components > 7.2 Food Waste Press > Safety Precautions 7.2.1 > Owner / User Responsibility > General Warnings: > Environmentally > Responsible Solutions > Electrical System Precautions`
- page_start/page_end: `49`
- order_index: `1004`
- effective heading_level: ``
- heading level source: ``
- text preview: `When working on the switchgear and motors, the system must de-energized, tagged out and secured against re-connection in accordance with the ship's working practices and permit to work policy.`

### el_dc9c3431cae24fc7be85838bf94f1c37
- type: `section_header`
- section id: `sec_ca811019e3084d6885c6fbcd336f038b`
- resolved section path: `7 Components > 7.2 Food Waste Press > Safety Precautions 7.2.1 > Owner / User Responsibility > General Warnings: > Environmentally > Responsible Solutions > Electrical System Precautions > Biohazard`
- page_start/page_end: `49`
- order_index: `1005`
- effective heading_level: `6`
- heading level source: `toc_context`
- text preview: `Biohazard`

### el_ac8b3ac6c3b44beeb474183ee8ad1e24
- type: `text`
- section id: `sec_ca811019e3084d6885c6fbcd336f038b`
- resolved section path: `7 Components > 7.2 Food Waste Press > Safety Precautions 7.2.1 > Owner / User Responsibility > General Warnings: > Environmentally > Responsible Solutions > Electrical System Precautions > Biohazard`
- page_start/page_end: `49`
- order_index: `1006`
- effective heading_level: ``
- heading level source: ``
- text preview: `The food waste press can contain a variety of bacteria and viruses. In general, these are nonpathogenic strains, however, the inhalation of aerosols and contact with the skin and mucous membranes should be avoided.`

### el_81dbc85b93e14684b79b0f70e586945c
- type: `text`
- section id: `sec_ca811019e3084d6885c6fbcd336f038b`
- resolved section path: `7 Components > 7.2 Food Waste Press > Safety Precautions 7.2.1 > Owner / User Responsibility > General Warnings: > Environmentally > Responsible Solutions > Electrical System Precautions > Biohazard`
- page_start/page_end: `49`
- order_index: `1008`
- effective heading_level: ``
- heading level source: ``
- text preview: `WARNING: Biohazard! When working on the system the operator must wear suitable clothes, eye protection and rubber gloves suitable for contact with wastewater. Failure to do so could lead to illness or death.`

### el_4400f5dee9144d34bd05ca3114105a77
- type: `text`
- section id: `sec_ca811019e3084d6885c6fbcd336f038b`
- resolved section path: `7 Components > 7.2 Food Waste Press > Safety Precautions 7.2.1 > Owner / User Responsibility > General Warnings: > Environmentally > Responsible Solutions > Electrical System Precautions > Biohazard`

- order_index: `1009`
- effective heading_level: ``
- heading level source: ``
- text preview: `The nature, control and extent of the necessary vaccinations and pre/post treatment examinations should be determined by the ship or company medical professionals.`

### el_c5e09e9e01e0473b93bb70c76c16e876
- type: `text`
- section id: `sec_1e457a61d9384f9b8e70d7c1e2eeb7ee`
- resolved section path: `7 Components > 7.2 Food Waste Press > Safety Precautions 7.2.1 > Owner / User Responsibility > General Warnings: > Environmentally > Responsible Solutions > Electrical System Precautions > Biohazard > Environmentally Responsible Solutions Engineered > Food Waste Press Description 7.2.2`
- page_start/page_end: `50`
- order_index: `1015`
- effective heading_level: ``
- heading level source: ``
- text preview: `The FMD food waste press is exclusively designed for separating solids from wastewater at a maximum inlet flow rate of up to 20 m³/hr (the 'intended use'). Intended use also includes compliance with the operating, maintenance and servici...`

### el_1ab81696de1f45fba9742ce834022d02
- type: `text`
- section id: `sec_1e457a61d9384f9b8e70d7c1e2eeb7ee`
- resolved section path: `7 Components > 7.2 Food Waste Press > Safety Precautions 7.2.1 > Owner / User Responsibility > General Warnings: > Environmentally > Responsible Solutions > Electrical System Precautions > Biohazard > Environmentally Responsible Solutions Engineered > Food Waste Press Description 7.2.2`
- page_start/page_end: `50`
- order_index: `1016`
- effective heading_level: ``
- heading level source: ``
- text preview: `The press must not be used for flow rates higher than those specified and must not be subjected to inlet pressure in excess of 100mbar.`

### el_46e2d39cb5ce4185bab8eff6db571d11
- type: `text`
- section id: `sec_1e457a61d9384f9b8e70d7c1e2eeb7ee`
- resolved section path: `7 Components > 7.2 Food Waste Press > Safety Precautions 7.2.1 > Owner / User Responsibility > General Warnings: > Environmentally > Responsible Solutions > Electrical System Precautions > Biohazard > Environmentally Responsible Solutions Engineered > Food Waste Press Description 7.2.2`
- page_start/page_end: `50`
- order_index: `1017`
- effective heading_level: ``
- heading level source: ``
- text preview: `Any use above and beyond the "intended use" is considered improper and the manufacturer assumes no liability for damage resulting from this, such risk is borne solely by the operator.`

- text preview: `Environmentally Responsible Solutions Engineered`

### el_d239d4f9aa7c4e57ac0a4bbe5749b7e4
- type: `section_header`
- section id: `sec_5e1bec31031844b0815dfa1af78cfcdc`
- resolved section path: `4 Installation > What it Does 7.2.4`
- page_start/page_end: `51`
- order_index: `1036`
- effective heading_level: `2`
- heading level source: `toc_context`
- text preview: `What it Does 7.2.4`

### el_3d7e758664f3405cbecb5a5f56f70584
- type: `text`
- section id: `sec_5e1bec31031844b0815dfa1af78cfcdc`
- resolved section path: `4 Installation > What it Does 7.2.4`
- page_start/page_end: `51`
- order_index: `1037`
- effective heading_level: ``
- heading level source: ``
- text preview: `The press separates the solids from wastewater by means of a 150 micron screen and a rotating screw. The screened liquid falls by gravity to the intermediate tank and the solids fall into the wheelie bin, via the solids discharge chute,...`

### el_c81e1c96111d452697f65ca42850f6ec
- type: `section_header`
- section id: `sec_dab3face7f1b42db85cdacb4840d4564`
- resolved section path: `4 Installation > How it Works 7.2.5`
- page_start/page_end: `51`
- order_index: `1038`
- effective heading_level: `2`
- heading level source: `toc_context`
- text preview: `How it Works 7.2.5`

### el_c16ba58d1f0d48e4ab591eba1401a5fa
- type: `text`
- section id: `sec_dab3face7f1b42db85cdacb4840d4564`
- resolved section path: `4 Installation > How it Works 7.2.5`
- page_start/page_end: `51`
- order_index: `1039`
- effective heading_level: ``
- heading level source: ``
- text preview: `The press has been designed specifically for screening solids from wastewater and sludge streams. The inlet wastewater should be such that it freely flows into the press without being pressurized.`

### el_dce29b3ed43a48e193a3ff32100e41c9
- type: `text`
- section id: `sec_dab3face7f1b42db85cdacb4840d4564`
- resolved section path: `4 Installation > How it Works 7.2.5`
- page_start/page_end: `51`
- order_index: `1040`
- effective heading_level: ``
- heading level source: ``
- text preview: `The principle is simple: a slow rotating screw is enclosed in a basket with a "press zone" integrated at the end which is controlled and adjusted automatically by the air cylinder load on the conical end cap.`

### el_31476925b3794f86a954d0a78605e72e
- type: `text`
- section id: `sec_dab3face7f1b42db85cdacb4840d4564`
- resolved section path: `4 Installation > How it Works 7.2.5`
- page_start/page_end: `51`
- order_index: `1041`
- effective heading_level: ``
- heading level source: ``
- text preview: `The liquid passes through the openings of the screen basket while the slowly rotating screw transports the retained solids to the press zone.`

### el_a02ae61d7a4848aba9e106dfa5e5c8ef
- type: `text`
- section id: `sec_dab3face7f1b42db85cdacb4840d4564`
- resolved section path: `4 Installation > How it Works 7.2.5`
- page_start/page_end: `51`
- order_index: `1042`
- effective heading_level: ``
- heading level source: ``
- text preview: `In the press zone the material is compressed, de-watered and finally pushed through the conically tapered end cap to remove the solids with a consistent dryness quality.`

### el_9aa8d5d0548d4ca2b756eb6fb9fdeb8a
- type: `text`
- section id: `sec_dab3face7f1b42db85cdacb4840d4564`
- resolved section path: `4 Installation > How it Works 7.2.5`
- page_start/page_end: `51`
- order_index: `1043`
- effective heading_level: ``
- heading level source: ``
- text preview: `The solid content is a function of the input material, the installed basket screen size, and the press zone cone pre-load (which is adjusted using a precision air pressure regulating valve).`

### el_dd94cfb3df434db382d73a2f338d8837
- type: `text`
- section id: `sec_dab3face7f1b42db85cdacb4840d4564`
- resolved section path: `4 Installation > How it Works 7.2.5`
- page_start/page_end: `51`
- order_index: `1044`
- effective heading_level: ``
- heading level source: ``
- text preview: `The pressed solids drop by gravity through the solids discharge chute into the endless bag which is contained in the wheelie bin.`

### el_4989981dba834f7cb98b6929be37723a
- type: `picture`
- section id: `sec_dab3face7f1b42db85cdacb4840d4564`
- resolved section path: `4 Installation > How it Works 7.2.5`

- order_index: `1045`
- effective heading_level: ``
- heading level source: ``
- text preview: ``

- text preview: `WARNING: During lifting and transporting of loads, there is the risk that lifting accessories may fail. Never step under a suspended load, keep a safe distance and cordon off the danger area.`

### el_0c7442a529f748e19c8aed896c367b01
- type: `section_header`
- section id: `sec_48f9231f335d45369dd58e3d3d79b412`
- resolved section path: `4 Installation > 7.2.6.1 Mounting`
- page_start/page_end: `53`
- order_index: `1072`
- effective heading_level: `4`
- heading level source: `numbering_hierarchy`
- text preview: `7.2.6.1 Mounting`

### el_5812d994ce48450ba23bc3dd307273f9
- type: `text`
- section id: `sec_48f9231f335d45369dd58e3d3d79b412`
- resolved section path: `4 Installation > 7.2.6.1 Mounting`
- page_start/page_end: `53`
- order_index: `1073`
- effective heading_level: ``
- heading level source: ``
- text preview: `The frame to which the press is bolted must be flat and horizontal. If this is not the case, the screw separator alignment will be distorted when bolted down to an uneven surface – and this will potentially damage the screw separator and...`

### el_99111c3be1b5432a9082cb49731ecf55
- type: `picture`
- section id: `sec_48f9231f335d45369dd58e3d3d79b412`
- resolved section path: `4 Installation > 7.2.6.1 Mounting`
- page_start/page_end: `53`
- order_index: `1074`
- effective heading_level: ``
- heading level source: ``
- text preview: ``

### el_c886ee3010234092a279eb253895e5af
- type: `text`
- section id: `sec_48f9231f335d45369dd58e3d3d79b412`
- resolved section path: `4 Installation > 7.2.6.1 Mounting`
- page_start/page_end: `53`
- order_index: `1075`
- effective heading_level: ``
- heading level source: ``
- text preview: `CAUTION: If the press is solidly bolted to an uneven surface there may be severe misalignment that can permanently damage the press! Inform FMD immediately and carefully document the incidence.`

### el_eb93bd4f7c214f74a9c9fb3bd742fd59
- type: `section_header`
- section id: `sec_8660b50d67434c3d8860c6f15da0b87d`
- resolved section path: `4 Installation > 7.2.6.2 Electrical Installation`
- page_start/page_end: `53`
- order_index: `1076`
- effective heading_level: `4`
- heading level source: `numbering_hierarchy`
- text preview: `7.2.6.2 Electrical Installation`

### el_c14f57febd894dffb1aeedab557aab51
- type: `text`
- section id: `sec_8660b50d67434c3d8860c6f15da0b87d`
- resolved section path: `4 Installation > 7.2.6.2 Electrical Installation`
- page_start/page_end: `53`
- order_index: `1077`
- effective heading_level: ``
- heading level source: ``
- text preview: `If all mechanical connections are examined and satisfactory, the drive can be connected according to the switching plan attached to the terminal box.`

### el_51adbe59c31d4eb5894b5fc0b36b3845
- type: `text`
- section id: `sec_8660b50d67434c3d8860c6f15da0b87d`
- resolved section path: `4 Installation > 7.2.6.2 Electrical Installation`
- page_start/page_end: `53`
- order_index: `1078`
- effective heading_level: ``
- heading level source: ``
- text preview: `Thermal motor protection (T1 and T2) is only optionally installed.`

### el_2e3fa1308b3e4f468dd94ae50fb10f15
- type: `text`
- section id: `sec_8660b50d67434c3d8860c6f15da0b87d`
- resolved section path: `4 Installation > 7.2.6.2 Electrical Installation`
- page_start/page_end: `53`
- order_index: `1079`
- effective heading_level: ``
- heading level source: ``
- text preview: `The press must be earthed according to the ship's electrical requirements.`

### el_bdb85cba5e1d4a3cbda4981cf1be2ebb
- type: `text`
- section id: `sec_8660b50d67434c3d8860c6f15da0b87d`
- resolved section path: `4 Installation > 7.2.6.2 Electrical Installation`
- page_start/page_end: `53`
- order_index: `1080`
- effective heading_level: ``
- heading level source: ``
- text preview: `WARNING: For the electrical connections, the relevant safety regulations should be followed! Electrical installation must be in accordance with relevant standards and completed by a qualified electrician.`

### el_07551dbed9504629b3bb63626ce4458a
- type: `text`
- section id: `sec_8660b50d67434c3d8860c6f15da0b87d`
- resolved section path: `4 Installation > 7.2.6.2 Electrical Installation`
- page_start/page_end: `53`
- order_index: `1081`
- effective heading_level: ``
- heading level source: ``
- text preview: `CAUTION: The correct direction of rotation is to be observed; this is clearly marked by the red arrow on the drive. Incorrect direction of rotation can lead to the damage of system parts!`

### el_8a0e635c0e3c4b5dadc186e0571922bd

### el_5e448bb4a2fb4ae395c8a404c01e067b
- type: `list_item`

### el_9c0ad8adf1794049bd8911beae102dab
- type: `list_item`
- section id: `sec_f52651bc5e7b4335a2e9be1101bd6ef1`
- resolved section path: `7 Components > 7.1 Macerators > Commissioning & Shutdown 7.1.8 > 7.2.7.1 Pre-commissioning Checks`
- page_start/page_end: `54`
- order_index: `1095`
- effective heading_level: ``
- heading level source: ``
- text preview: ` Are all transport locks removed?`

### el_0e4ea9b96ada4aea8d137f968aabc506
- type: `list_item`
- section id: `sec_f52651bc5e7b4335a2e9be1101bd6ef1`
- resolved section path: `7 Components > 7.1 Macerators > Commissioning & Shutdown 7.1.8 > 7.2.7.1 Pre-commissioning Checks`
- page_start/page_end: `54`
- order_index: `1096`
- effective heading_level: ``
- heading level source: ``
- text preview: ` Are the inlet and outlet pipes connected?`

### el_ab5b7ebcbafe42bc8848bfa537042a86
- type: `list_item`
- section id: `sec_f52651bc5e7b4335a2e9be1101bd6ef1`
- resolved section path: `7 Components > 7.1 Macerators > Commissioning & Shutdown 7.1.8 > 7.2.7.1 Pre-commissioning Checks`
- page_start/page_end: `54`
- order_index: `1097`
- effective heading_level: ``
- heading level source: ``
- text preview: ` Open the inspection covers of the screen and check for any foreign objects such as construction or mounting materials, tools, rags etc.`

### el_86e9cc185bb84f5b9653ffef9f9fa02e
- type: `section_header`
- section id: `sec_76a24d4ccd5c4283bc93106354cdb93b`
- resolved section path: `7 Components > 7.1 Macerators > Commissioning & Shutdown 7.1.8 > 7.2.7.2 Initial Test Run`
- page_start/page_end: `54`
- order_index: `1098`
- effective heading_level: `4`
- heading level source: `numbering_hierarchy`
- text preview: `7.2.7.2 Initial Test Run`

### el_b9bee1901a2b493eb399f900ef63d66d
- type: `picture`
- section id: `sec_76a24d4ccd5c4283bc93106354cdb93b`
- resolved section path: `7 Components > 7.1 Macerators > Commissioning & Shutdown 7.1.8 > 7.2.7.2 Initial Test Run`
- page_start/page_end: `54`
- order_index: `1099`
- effective heading_level: ``
- heading level source: ``
- text preview: ``

### el_003896446fcd45d494eb14257f28159d
- type: `text`
- section id: `sec_76a24d4ccd5c4283bc93106354cdb93b`
- resolved section path: `7 Components > 7.1 Macerators > Commissioning & Shutdown 7.1.8 > 7.2.7.2 Initial Test Run`
- page_start/page_end: `54`
- order_index: `1100`
- effective heading_level: ``
- heading level source: ``
- text preview: `WARNING: Risk of crushing / rupture of limbs! Ensure the inspection covers are fitted and secured before starting the machine.`

### el_3b7f6119c5eb4c1aa196ca132c3532b8
- type: `text`
- section id: `sec_76a24d4ccd5c4283bc93106354cdb93b`
- resolved section path: `7 Components > 7.1 Macerators > Commissioning & Shutdown 7.1.8 > 7.2.7.2 Initial Test Run`
- page_start/page_end: `54`
- order_index: `1101`
- effective heading_level: ``
- heading level source: ``
- text preview: `If all the pre-commissioning points are checked and found in order, then the test run can be started by following the below procedure:`

### el_dea349dc559a4d23a40acd5fc45447b4
- type: `list_item`
- section id: `sec_76a24d4ccd5c4283bc93106354cdb93b`
- resolved section path: `7 Components > 7.1 Macerators > Commissioning & Shutdown 7.1.8 > 7.2.7.2 Initial Test Run`
- page_start/page_end: `54`
- order_index: `1102`
- effective heading_level: ``
- heading level source: ``
- text preview: ` The press gearmotor should be bumped without water to verify the direction of rotation is correct. The press must not be operated in the wrong direction for more than a few seconds.`

### el_c8bb692384c1423c941e5184a98fb264
- type: `list_item`
- section id: `sec_76a24d4ccd5c4283bc93106354cdb93b`
- resolved section path: `7 Components > 7.1 Macerators > Commissioning & Shutdown 7.1.8 > 7.2.7.2 Initial Test Run`
- page_start/page_end: `54`
- order_index: `1103`
- effective heading_level: ``
- heading level source: ``
- text preview: ` Before the first test run with water, the system must be ensured clear of debris, tools, sharp-edged objects, iron filings or other objects located upstream of the inlet. Such objects can damage the press.`

### el_a2065a8a87344ca1bf7ccef6d52fcca5
- type: `list_item`
- section id: `sec_76a24d4ccd5c4283bc93106354cdb93b`
- resolved section path: `7 Components > 7.1 Macerators > Commissioning & Shutdown 7.1.8 > 7.2.7.2 Initial Test Run`
- page_start/page_end: `54`
- order_index: `1104`
- effective heading_level: ``
- heading level source: ``
- text preview: ` For the first test run with water, the air pressure regulating valve for the press zone should be set to ~1.5 bar. Check that the cone seals the press zone, a drip every 5-10 seconds is normal at this stage.`

### el_d454763f7882420dbc08e1a9a47250bc
- type: `text`
- section id: `sec_76a24d4ccd5c4283bc93106354cdb93b`
- resolved section path: `7 Components > 7.1 Macerators > Commissioning & Shutdown 7.1.8 > 7.2.7.2 Initial Test Run`
- page_start/page_end: `54`
- order_index: `1105`
- effective heading_level: ``
- heading level source: ``
- text preview: `When starting up the press, liquid may leak briefly from around the press zone gasket.`

### el_0227068d3ad346bca7f957809ab76f83
- type: `text`
- section id: `sec_76a24d4ccd5c4283bc93106354cdb93b`
- resolved section path: `7 Components > 7.1 Macerators > Commissioning & Shutdown 7.1.8 > 7.2.7.2 Initial Test Run`
- page_start/page_end: `54`
- order_index: `1106`
- effective heading_level: ``
- heading level source: ``
- text preview: `For safety purposes protect yourself and other from any liquid that may potentially spray out if the doors on the discharge chute are open.`

### el_8b0be15122074c24b7c18ec56f094210
- type: `text`
- section id: `sec_76a24d4ccd5c4283bc93106354cdb93b`
- resolved section path: `7 Components > 7.1 Macerators > Commissioning & Shutdown 7.1.8 > 7.2.7.2 Initial Test Run`
- page_start/page_end: `54`
- order_index: `1107`
- effective heading_level: ``
- heading level source: ``
- text preview: `For the first run using wastewater do not run the feed pump at full power. Leave the TSP running for 30-60 minutes with the wastewater inlet flow at ~30% of maximum capacity during this period:`

### el_d4624fbe66e9423d92dddc427eb9739c
- type: `list_item`
- section id: `sec_76a24d4ccd5c4283bc93106354cdb93b`
- resolved section path: `7 Components > 7.1 Macerators > Commissioning & Shutdown 7.1.8 > 7.2.7.2 Initial Test Run`
- page_start/page_end: `54`
- order_index: `1108`
- effective heading_level: ``
- heading level source: ``
- text preview: ` Check the press for leaks.`

### el_f2ffeb1d945b49bb8b00a55e743d818f
- type: `list_item`
- section id: `sec_76a24d4ccd5c4283bc93106354cdb93b`
- resolved section path: `7 Components > 7.1 Macerators > Commissioning & Shutdown 7.1.8 > 7.2.7.2 Initial Test Run`
- page_start/page_end: `54`
- order_index: `1109`
- effective heading_level: ``
- heading level source: ``
- text preview: ` Check the solids bag is not filling with water.`

### el_5f931d102e3e42258ae6212f1b45a1c2
- type: `list_item`
- section id: `sec_76a24d4ccd5c4283bc93106354cdb93b`
- resolved section path: `7 Components > 7.1 Macerators > Commissioning & Shutdown 7.1.8 > 7.2.7.2 Initial Test Run`
- page_start/page_end: `54`
- order_index: `1110`
- effective heading_level: ``
- heading level source: ``
- text preview: ` Observe the press discharge cone for leakage initially and later when using wastewater for movement to indicate a solids plug is forming.`

### el_c9f74ff2c3ef4110a2a70af6d3b8fb8f
- type: `list_item`
- section id: `sec_76a24d4ccd5c4283bc93106354cdb93b`
- resolved section path: `7 Components > 7.1 Macerators > Commissioning & Shutdown 7.1.8 > 7.2.7.2 Initial Test Run`
- page_start/page_end: `54`
- order_index: `1111`
- effective heading_level: ``
- heading level source: ``
- text preview: ` If the separation and the pressing result are within the required range, the inlet flow rate can be increased slowly.`

### el_8d04c7d69a4641aeab76691e9182dbd8
- type: `picture`
- section id: `sec_76a24d4ccd5c4283bc93106354cdb93b`
- resolved section path: `7 Components > 7.1 Macerators > Commissioning & Shutdown 7.1.8 > 7.2.7.2 Initial Test Run`
- page_start/page_end: `54`
- order_index: `1112`
- effective heading_level: ``
- heading level source: ``
- text preview: ``

### el_5a2c5a2a46da4e98840b0e36b0a39818
- type: `text`
- section id: `sec_76a24d4ccd5c4283bc93106354cdb93b`
- resolved section path: `7 Components > 7.1 Macerators > Commissioning & Shutdown 7.1.8 > 7.2.7.2 Initial Test Run`
- page_start/page_end: `54`
- order_index: `1113`
- effective heading_level: ``
- heading level source: ``
- text preview: `FMD`

### el_70590c0031dc4b48a31315479cd14a26
- type: `text`
- section id: `sec_76a24d4ccd5c4283bc93106354cdb93b`
- resolved section path: `7 Components > 7.1 Macerators > Commissioning & Shutdown 7.1.8 > 7.2.7.2 Initial Test Run`
- page_start/page_end: `54`
- order_index: `1114`
- effective heading_level: ``
- heading level source: ``
- text preview: `FundamentalMarineDevelopments`

### el_b145d0eba8a64211a291d7f16c1278d3
- type: `section_header`
- section id: `sec_3f8e0a9f678c44f38cbd924f367b9bd4`
- resolved section path: `7 Components > 7.1 Macerators > Commissioning & Shutdown 7.1.8 > Environmentally`
- page_start/page_end: `55`
- order_index: `1115`
- effective heading_level: `4`
- heading level source: `toc_context`
- text preview: `Environmentally`

### el_528bca9add12413ba643f91c1c6c06c9
- type: `section_header`
- section id: `sec_9e4190d1f78e48ac96c422580fd8a065`
- resolved section path: `7 Components > 7.1 Macerators > Commissioning & Shutdown 7.1.8 > Responsible Solutions`
- page_start/page_end: `55`
- order_index: `1116`
- effective heading_level: `4`
- heading level source: `toc_context`
- text preview: `Responsible Solutions`

### el_4dfd85a693d0482e8deea142dad18bd7
- type: `section_header`
- section id: `sec_f44d66467e0e4b7a96bfd080686e4b5c`
- resolved section path: `7 Components > 7.1 Macerators > Commissioning & Shutdown 7.1.8 > Engineered`
- page_start/page_end: `55`
- order_index: `1117`
- effective heading_level: `4`
- heading level source: `toc_context`
- text preview: `Engineered`

### el_a830771269784fe2b5e631a0cba34650
- type: `section_header`
- section id: `sec_491d04b5dc0240c98222d065f8e98a7b`
- resolved section path: `7 Components > 7.1 Macerators > Commissioning & Shutdown 7.1.8 > 7.2.7.3 Setting & Optimising the Press Discharge`
- page_start/page_end: `55`
- order_index: `1118`
- effective heading_level: `4`
- heading level source: `numbering_hierarchy`
- text preview: `7.2.7.3 Setting & Optimising the Press Discharge`

### el_10b4a7887af14638b60dd0efbd74aae2
- type: `section_header`
- section id: `sec_da0145a020864bc2823e62e76648f164`
- resolved section path: `7 Components > 7.1 Macerators > Commissioning & Shutdown 7.1.8 > As general rules:`
- page_start/page_end: `55`
- order_index: `1119`
- effective heading_level: `4`
- heading level source: `toc_context`
- text preview: `As general rules:`

### el_a042e5ab54bd4cf8bd086596a834e228
- type: `list_item`
- section id: `sec_da0145a020864bc2823e62e76648f164`
- resolved section path: `7 Components > 7.1 Macerators > Commissioning & Shutdown 7.1.8 > As general rules:`
- page_start/page_end: `55`
- order_index: `1120`
- effective heading_level: ``
- heading level source: ``
- text preview: ` Never set the air pressure higher than 2.0 bar.`

### el_4bbb3781fa42450681c398cbba3a679d
- type: `list_item`
- section id: `sec_da0145a020864bc2823e62e76648f164`
- resolved section path: `7 Components > 7.1 Macerators > Commissioning & Shutdown 7.1.8 > As general rules:`
- page_start/page_end: `55`
- order_index: `1121`
- effective heading_level: ``
- heading level source: ``
- text preview: ` Once the plug is established the optimum air pressure is generally 0.6 – 0.8 bar for GW/BW and 1.0-1.5 bar for food waste.`

### el_ed09f6c095724332b63e20893f15ac89
- type: `list_item`
- section id: `sec_da0145a020864bc2823e62e76648f164`
- resolved section path: `7 Components > 7.1 Macerators > Commissioning & Shutdown 7.1.8 > As general rules:`
- page_start/page_end: `55`
- order_index: `1122`
- effective heading_level: ``
- heading level source: ``
- text preview: ` The higher the air pressure the higher the chance a blockage may form in the press, which in turn leads to increased wear, break down and possible irreparable damage.`

### el_96915d95880f4b148d4634a5940a184d
- type: `list_item`
- section id: `sec_da0145a020864bc2823e62e76648f164`
- resolved section path: `7 Components > 7.1 Macerators > Commissioning & Shutdown 7.1.8 > As general rules:`
- page_start/page_end: `55`
- order_index: `1123`
- effective heading_level: ``
- heading level source: ``
- text preview: ` Observe the press for a while. Reduce or increase the pressing force until the solid discharge runs evenly and continuously.`

### el_08b02f89cac84b3a9580003a66763a4f
- type: `list_item`
- section id: `sec_da0145a020864bc2823e62e76648f164`
- resolved section path: `7 Components > 7.1 Macerators > Commissioning & Shutdown 7.1.8 > As general rules:`
- page_start/page_end: `55`
- order_index: `1124`
- effective heading_level: ``
- heading level source: ``
- text preview: ` If the press begins to vibrate, this is often a sign of excessive pressing force and an impending blockage.`

### el_a55e2a1abec94821b8e281147171258e
- type: `section_header`
- section id: `sec_94e7600881d24f8f87a1da530de49c1c`
- resolved section path: `7 Components > 7.1 Macerators > Commissioning & Shutdown 7.1.8 > 7.2.7.4 Shutdown`
- page_start/page_end: `55`
- order_index: `1125`
- effective heading_level: `4`
- heading level source: `numbering_hierarchy`
- text preview: `7.2.7.4 Shutdown`

### el_bdb1fb314fc84984874220d41dc33a63
- type: `list_item`
- section id: `sec_94e7600881d24f8f87a1da530de49c1c`
- resolved section path: `7 Components > 7.1 Macerators > Commissioning & Shutdown 7.1.8 > 7.2.7.4 Shutdown`
- page_start/page_end: `55`
- order_index: `1126`
- effective heading_level: ``
- heading level source: ``
- text preview: ` Turn off and isolate the inlet supply pumps to prevent them starting.`

### el_3e0b81600cf241faa89d5d3b59983a20
- type: `list_item`
- section id: `sec_94e7600881d24f8f87a1da530de49c1c`
- resolved section path: `7 Components > 7.1 Macerators > Commissioning & Shutdown 7.1.8 > 7.2.7.4 Shutdown`
- page_start/page_end: `55`
- order_index: `1127`
- effective heading_level: ``
- heading level source: ``
- text preview: ` Wait until the feed pipes have emptied.`

### el_a2c85099792344299ac82a1a41ae2794
- type: `list_item`
- section id: `sec_94e7600881d24f8f87a1da530de49c1c`
- resolved section path: `7 Components > 7.1 Macerators > Commissioning & Shutdown 7.1.8 > 7.2.7.4 Shutdown`
- page_start/page_end: `55`
- order_index: `1128`
- effective heading_level: ``
- heading level source: ``
- text preview: ` Reduce the pressing force and move the compressed air cylinder to the rear.`

### el_39cc16221cb94c72b2950ca088f917f9
- type: `list_item`
- section id: `sec_94e7600881d24f8f87a1da530de49c1c`
- resolved section path: `7 Components > 7.1 Macerators > Commissioning & Shutdown 7.1.8 > 7.2.7.4 Shutdown`
- page_start/page_end: `55`
- order_index: `1129`
- effective heading_level: ``
- heading level source: ``
- text preview: ` Let the separator run for a short while longer until the solids in the machine have been completely discharged.`

### el_cccf95a229db434bac923c44d6687753
- type: `list_item`
- section id: `sec_94e7600881d24f8f87a1da530de49c1c`
- resolved section path: `7 Components > 7.1 Macerators > Commissioning & Shutdown 7.1.8 > 7.2.7.4 Shutdown`
- page_start/page_end: `55`
- order_index: `1130`
- effective heading_level: ``
- heading level source: ``
- text preview: ` Turn off the press motor and protect against inadvertent re-starting.`

### el_e8b798b42819419baba2d248df8fed26
- type: `list_item`
- section id: `sec_94e7600881d24f8f87a1da530de49c1c`
- resolved section path: `7 Components > 7.1 Macerators > Commissioning & Shutdown 7.1.8 > 7.2.7.4 Shutdown`
- page_start/page_end: `55`
- order_index: `1131`
- effective heading_level: ``
- heading level source: ``
- text preview: ` The system must be thoroughly cleaned.`

### el_292edc7114f24fc4b844f414ceefae3f
- type: `list_item`
- section id: `sec_94e7600881d24f8f87a1da530de49c1c`
- resolved section path: `7 Components > 7.1 Macerators > Commissioning & Shutdown 7.1.8 > 7.2.7.4 Shutdown`
- page_start/page_end: `55`
- order_index: `1132`
- effective heading_level: ``
- heading level source: ``
- text preview: ` Put up signage to notify that the press has been taken out of operation.`

### el_844cc5cb6fb4456ea9fb9b0ee4b38d33
- type: `text`
- section id: `sec_94e7600881d24f8f87a1da530de49c1c`
- resolved section path: `7 Components > 7.1 Macerators > Commissioning & Shutdown 7.1.8 > 7.2.7.4 Shutdown`
- page_start/page_end: `55`
- order_index: `1133`
- effective heading_level: ``
- heading level source: ``
- text preview: `Take Note: If the press is to be idle or shut down for more than 72 hours, there is a risk that the solids plug (formed against the cone) will begin dry out and solidify – see below:`

### el_0181ba5ccbd54abfb3f7426db9be52c5
- type: `picture`
- section id: `sec_94e7600881d24f8f87a1da530de49c1c`
- resolved section path: `7 Components > 7.1 Macerators > Commissioning & Shutdown 7.1.8 > 7.2.7.4 Shutdown`
- page_start/page_end: `55`
- order_index: `1134`
- effective heading_level: ``
- heading level source: ``
- text preview: ``

### el_25d52dcd96c542f990da6d40a984e7e8
- type: `text`
- section id: `sec_94e7600881d24f8f87a1da530de49c1c`
- resolved section path: `7 Components > 7.1 Macerators > Commissioning & Shutdown 7.1.8 > 7.2.7.4 Shutdown`
- page_start/page_end: `55`
- order_index: `1135`
- effective heading_level: ``
- heading level source: ``
- text preview: `If the plug has dried out and the press is restarted, after a short time of operation the pressure behind the plug will increase until it releases suddenly - and there is the potential for wastewater to carry over into the solids bag.`

### el_b0c4da8a7dcc46bf869bd8cefffcb6ae
- type: `section_header`
- section id: `sec_c8b26e0b9e24471890bdd75756a592a4`
- resolved section path: `7 Components > 7.2 Food Waste Press > Avoid unexpected stress testing of the solids bag.`
- page_start/page_end: `55`
- order_index: `1136`
- effective heading_level: `3`
- heading level source: `toc_context`
- text preview: `Avoid unexpected stress testing of the solids bag.`

### el_fcae2db103f3423bacaf047f98dfb9bc
- type: `text`
- section id: `sec_c8b26e0b9e24471890bdd75756a592a4`
- resolved section path: `7 Components > 7.2 Food Waste Press > Avoid unexpected stress testing of the solids bag.`
- page_start/page_end: `55`
- order_index: `1137`
- effective heading_level: ``
- heading level source: ``
- text preview: `Open the service port, retract the cone and remove the solidified solids plug before restarting the press.`

### el_7a57664edd034b61bdddc5ffef4b3180
- type: `text`
- section id: `sec_c8b26e0b9e24471890bdd75756a592a4`
- resolved section path: `7 Components > 7.2 Food Waste Press > Avoid unexpected stress testing of the solids bag.`
- page_start/page_end: `55`
- order_index: `1138`
- effective heading_level: ``
- heading level source: ``
- text preview: `Picture: Solids bag filled with wastewater`

### el_26de9b2446114e829d401ff4703de082
- type: `picture`
- section id: `sec_c8b26e0b9e24471890bdd75756a592a4`
- resolved section path: `7 Components > 7.2 Food Waste Press > Avoid unexpected stress testing of the solids bag.`
- page_start/page_end: `55`
- order_index: `1139`
- effective heading_level: ``
- heading level source: ``
- text preview: ``

### el_a699e4310b6b4d97a4b27ba3b7a5dad7
- type: `picture`
- section id: `sec_c8b26e0b9e24471890bdd75756a592a4`
- resolved section path: `7 Components > 7.2 Food Waste Press > Avoid unexpected stress testing of the solids bag.`

- resolved section path: `7 Components > 7.2 Food Waste Press > Avoid unexpected stress testing of the solids bag.`

### el_7b9a70c2afa04a98b6f16a202cd16baf
- type: `text`
- section id: `sec_c8b26e0b9e24471890bdd75756a592a4`
- resolved section path: `7 Components > 7.2 Food Waste Press > Avoid unexpected stress testing of the solids bag.`
- page_start/page_end: `55`
- order_index: `1142`
- effective heading_level: ``

### el_810e5536170f41a0bf6ee7f096e1813b

### el_b80af9ee382d4b118099cb69b84cd574
- type: `text`
- section id: `sec_6f505a5aabec4ed793259207522b116f`
- resolved section path: `7 Components > 7.2 Food Waste Press > Modifications to the Press 7.2.9 > Environmentally > Responsible Solutions > Engineered > Spare Parts > Environmentally > Responsible Solutions Engineered > Preventive Maintenance 7.2.11 > Environmentally > Responsible Solutions > Maintenance & Cleaning of the Screen Basket 7.2.12`
- page_start/page_end: `59`
- order_index: `1192`
- effective heading_level: ``
- heading level source: ``
- text preview: `WARNING: Before starting, ensure the compressed air hose to the pneumatic cylinder is disconnected, the cylinder is de-pressurised and has been secured against reactivation.`

### el_7375aa22810c4a9791cca732241b6e3e
- type: `text`
- section id: `sec_166882e86a07483ab9189fb1d76cde23`
- resolved section path: `7 Components > 7.2 Food Waste Press > Modifications to the Press 7.2.9 > Environmentally > Responsible Solutions > Engineered > Spare Parts > Environmentally > Responsible Solutions Engineered > Preventive Maintenance 7.2.11 > Environmentally > Responsible Solutions > Maintenance & Cleaning of the Screen Basket 7.2.12 > Disassembly of Cylinder Retaining Plate`
- page_start/page_end: `59`
- order_index: `1194`
- effective heading_level: ``
- heading level source: ``
- text preview: `Loosen and remove the screws on the discharge chute retaining plate, remove the retaining plate including the air cylinder and press cone.`

- effective heading_level: ``
- heading level source: ``
- text preview: `Now the screen basket can be pulled out of the separator using care.`

### el_9bbc3213b7cd4f0e9b4e6b86b3046654
- type: `section_header`
- section id: `sec_ca5c79e471b84d74aff82cefbe28cb98`
- resolved section path: `7 Components > 7.2 Food Waste Press > Modifications to the Press 7.2.9 > Environmentally > Responsible Solutions > Engineered > Spare Parts > Environmentally > Responsible Solutions Engineered > Preventive Maintenance 7.2.11 > Environmentally > Responsible Solutions > Maintenance & Cleaning of the Screen Basket 7.2.12 > Disassembly of Cylinder Retaining Plate > Removal of the Discharge Chute Retaining Plate and Enclosure > Environmentally > Responsible Solutions > Discharge Chute Removed > Removal of the Press Zone > Environmentally > Responsible Solutions > Removal of the Screen Basket > Ensure that this is carried out as straight as possible to prevent the screen basket jamming!`
- page_start/page_end: `61`

- effective heading_level: `6`

- text preview: `Ensure that this is carried out as straight as possible to prevent the screen basket jamming!`

### el_fdd71c44bb8244698fa0f41d6e8933b1
- type: `text`
- section id: `sec_ca5c79e471b84d74aff82cefbe28cb98`
- resolved section path: `7 Components > 7.2 Food Waste Press > Modifications to the Press 7.2.9 > Environmentally > Responsible Solutions > Engineered > Spare Parts > Environmentally > Responsible Solutions Engineered > Preventive Maintenance 7.2.11 > Environmentally > Responsible Solutions > Maintenance & Cleaning of the Screen Basket 7.2.12 > Disassembly of Cylinder Retaining Plate > Removal of the Discharge Chute Retaining Plate and Enclosure > Environmentally > Responsible Solutions > Discharge Chute Removed > Removal of the Press Zone > Environmentally > Responsible Solutions > Removal of the Screen Basket > Ensure that this is carried out as straight as possible to prevent the screen basket jamming!`
- page_start/page_end: `61`
- order_index: `1226`
- effective heading_level: ``
- heading level source: ``
- text preview: `Once the screen basket has been pulled out of the housing by roughly half of its length, the initial resistance experienced reduces considerably.`

- resolved section path: `7 Components > 7.2 Food Waste Press > Modifications to the Press 7.2.9 > Environmentally > Responsible Solutions > Engineered > Spare Parts > Environmentally > Responsible Solutions Engineered > Preventive Maintenance 7.2.11 > Environmentally > Responsible Solutions > Maintenance & Cleaning of the Screen Basket 7.2.12 > Disassembly of Cylinder Retaining Plate > Removal of the Discharge Chute Retaining Plate and Enclosure > Environmentally > Responsible Solutions > Discharge Chute Removed > Removal of the Press Zone > Environmentally > Responsible Solutions > Removal of the Screen Basket > Ensure that this is carried out as straight as possible to prevent the screen basket jamming!`

### el_4cea2ceae04f43599c8fad12deda7c01
- type: `text`
- section id: `sec_ac112fbbe8a74a29997c829d39028756`
- resolved section path: `7 Components > 7.2 Food Waste Press > Modifications to the Press 7.2.9 > Environmentally > Responsible Solutions > Engineered > Spare Parts > Environmentally > Responsible Solutions Engineered > Preventive Maintenance 7.2.11 > Environmentally > Responsible Solutions > Maintenance & Cleaning of the Screen Basket 7.2.12 > Disassembly of Cylinder Retaining Plate > Removal of the Discharge Chute Retaining Plate and Enclosure > Environmentally > Responsible Solutions > Discharge Chute Removed > Removal of the Press Zone > Environmentally > Responsible Solutions > Removal of the Screen Basket > Ensure that this is carried out as straight as possible to prevent the screen basket jamming! > Check the Screen Basket > Environmentally > Responsible Solutions > Screen Basket Installation`
- page_start/page_end: `63`
- order_index: `1249`
- effective heading_level: ``
- heading level source: ``
- text preview: `The installation of a cleaned or new screen basket occurs in the reverse order to disassembly. When inserting the screen basket, be sure to push it in as straight as possible in order to prevent it jamming and potentially damaging the sc...`

### el_371dd42c73d6453ca86712013aa9bdc3
- type: `section_header`
- section id: `sec_46a7162c3cdc469a9fe193a32a058f25`
